   701	        name: "Energy Stress",
   702	        score: scoreCandidates.energy_stress,
   703	        level: levelFor("energy_stress", scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   704	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   705	        headline: headlineFor("Energy complex", scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   706	        components: {
   707	          cl_price: getMetric(metricMap, ["cl_price", "crude_oil_price"]),
   708	          cl_change_5d: getMetric(metricMap, ["cl_change_5d", "crude_oil_change_5d"]),
   709	          ovx_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]),
   710	          energy_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["energy_news_count"]),
   711	        },
   712	        aiPowered: false,
   713	        dataDate: dateFor("energy_stress"),
   714	      },
   715	    };
   716	
   717	    const allDates = (Object.values(drivers) as DriverData[])
   718	      .map((d) => d.dataDate)
   719	      .filter((d): d is string => Boolean(d))
   720	      .sort();
   721	    const asOfDateMin = allDates[0] ?? null;
   722	    const asOfDateMax = allDates[allDates.length - 1] ?? null;
   723	    const asOfDate = asOfDateMin;
   724	    const mixedVintage = Boolean(asOfDateMin && asOfDateMax && asOfDateMin !== asOfDateMax);
   725	
   726	    const mergeDriver = (
   727	      key: DriverKey,
   728	      base: DriverData,
   729	      defaultHeadlineName: string,
   730	      defaultInstructions: StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   731	    ): DriverData => {
   732	      const ai = aiSnapshot?.drivers?.[key];
   733	      const aiScoreRaw = ai?.score;
   734	      const aiScore = aiScoreRaw === null || aiScoreRaw === undefined ? null : coerceScore(Number(aiScoreRaw));
   735	      const mergedScore = aiScore ?? base.score;
   736	      const mergedLevel = ai?.level ?? levelFor(key, mergedScore);
   737	      const mergedComponents = mergeDriverComponents(base.components, ai?.components);
   738	
   739	      const mergedPayload: DriverData = {
   740	        ...base,
   741	        score: mergedScore,
   742	        level: mergedLevel,
   743	        regime: regimeFor(mergedScore),
   744	        headline: ai?.headline ?? headlineFor(defaultHeadlineName, mergedScore),
   745	        components: mergedComponents,
   746	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   747	          ai?.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? defaultInstructions,
   748	        provenance:
   749	          ai?.provenance ??
   750	          buildDriverProvenance(
   751	            key,
   752	            base.dataDate,
   753	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   754	          ),
   755	        aiPowered: Boolean(ai),
   756	        dataDate: base.dataDate,
   757	      };
   758	
   759	      return {
   760	        ...mergedPayload,
   761	        whatsHappening: ai?.whatsHappening,
   762	      };
   763	    };
   764	
   765	    const mergedDrivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData> = {
   766	      vix_stress: mergeDriver(
   767	        "vix_stress",
   768	        drivers.vix_stress,
   769	        "Market volatility",
   770	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.vix_stress,
   771	      ),
   772	      crush_pressure: mergeDriver(
   773	        "crush_pressure",
   774	        drivers.crush_pressure,
   775	        "Crush margins",
   776	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.crush_pressure,
   777	      ),
   778	      china_tension: mergeDriver(
   779	        "china_tension",
   780	        drivers.china_tension,
   781	        "China demand/trade",
   782	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.china_tension,
   783	      ),
   784	      tariff_threat: mergeDriver(
   785	        "tariff_threat",
   786	        drivers.tariff_threat,
   787	        "Macro/geopolitical",
   788	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.tariff_threat,
   789	      ),
   790	      energy_stress: mergeDriver(
   791	        "energy_stress",
   792	        drivers.energy_stress,
   793	        "Energy complex",
   794	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.energy_stress,
   795	      ),
   796	    };
   797	
   798	    const mergedSummary = summarizeDrivers(mergedDrivers);
   799	    const mergedAverage = mergedSummary.average;
   800	    const mergedTopName = mergedSummary.topName;
   801	    const mergedTopScore = mergedSummary.topScore;
   802	    const mergedAlertCount = mergedSummary.alertCount;
   803	
   804	    for (const key of Object.keys(mergedDrivers) as DriverKey[]) {
   805	      const driver = mergedDrivers[key];
   806	      if (driver.whatsHappening) continue;
   807	      const instructions =
   808	        driver.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS[key];
   809	      driver.whatsHappening = buildDriverWhatsHappening(
   810	        key,
   811	        driver,
   812	        mergedTopScore === 0 && mergedTopName === "No Data"
   813	          ? "Hard stop: promoted analytics rows are missing."
   814	          : `Top concern is ${mergedTopName} at ${Math.round(mergedTopScore)}.`,
   815	        mergedTopName,
   816	        mergedAverage,
   817	        instructions,
   818	      );
   819	    }
   820	
   821	    const response: MarketDriversResponse = {
   822	      as_of_date: asOfDate,
   823	      as_of_date_min: asOfDateMin,
   824	      as_of_date_max: asOfDateMax,
   825	      mixed_vintage: mixedVintage,
   826	      drivers: mergedDrivers,
   827	      summary: {
   828	        average_pressure: mergedAverage,
   829	        highest_pressure: { name: mergedTopName, score: mergedTopScore },
   830	        alert_count: mergedAlertCount,
   831	      },
   832	      intelligence: {
   833	        headline:
   834	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.headline ??
   835	          (mergedTopScore >= 65 ? "ELEVATED MARKET - Watch Procurement Risk" : "NORMAL MARKET - Buy On Schedule"),
   836	        summary:
   837	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.summary ??
   838	          (mergedTopName === "No Data"
   839	            ? "Hard stop: promoted analytics rows are missing for cross-driver synthesis."
   840	            : `Top concern is ${mergedTopName} at ${Math.round(mergedTopScore)}. Average risk is ${mergedAverage}.`),
   841	        drivers: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.drivers ?? (Object.values(mergedDrivers) as DriverData[])
   842	          .filter((d) => d.score !== null)
   843	          .map((d) => ({
   844	            label: d.name,
   845	            outlook: d.score !== null && d.score >= 65 ? "PRESSURE" : d.score !== null && d.score <= 35 ? "SUPPORTIVE" : "MIXED",
   846	            detail: d.headline,
   847	          })),
   848	        zlOutlook: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlOutlook ?? outlookFromScore(mergedAverage),
   849	        zlColor: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlColor ?? colorFromScore(mergedAverage),
   850	        tradingImplication:
   851	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.tradingImplication ??
   852	          (mergedTopScore >= 65
   853	            ? "Risk elevated. Keep procurement flexible and monitor next refresh."
   854	            : "No major pressure signal yet. Continue normal buying schedule."),
   855	        aiPowered: Boolean(aiSnapshot?.intelligence),
   856	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   857	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   858	          MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS,
   859	        provenance:
   860	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.provenance ??
   861	          buildIntelligenceProvenance(
   862	            asOfDateMax ?? asOfDateMin,
   863	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   864	          ),
   865	      },
   866	      ai: {
   867	        enabled: Boolean(aiSnapshot),
   868	        source: aiSnapshot?.source ?? "weekly-db-plus-ai-snapshot",
   869	        model: aiSnapshot?.model ?? null,
   870	        reasoningEffort: aiSnapshot?.reasoningEffort ?? null,
   871	        generatedAt: aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   872	        refreshScheduleEt: aiSnapshot?.refreshScheduleEt ?? null,
   873	      },
   874	    };
   875	
   876	    return NextResponse.json(response, {
   877	      headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" },
   878	    });
   879	  } catch (err) {
   880	    return NextResponse.json(
   881	      { error: String(err) },
   882	      { status: 500, headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" } },
   883	    );
   884	  }
   885	}

     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	type DashboardMetric = {
     8	  key: string;
     9	  label: string;
    10	  value: number;
    11	};
    12	
    13	export async function GET() {
    14	  try {
    15	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    16	    if (unauthorized) {
    17	      return unauthorized;
    18	    }
    19	
    20	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    21	
    22	    // Get the latest dashboard metrics
    23	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    24	      .schema("analytics")
    25	      .from("dashboard_metrics")
    26	      .select("metric_key, metric_value, trade_date")
    27	      .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
    28	      .limit(20);
    29	
    30	    if (error) {
    31	      return NextResponse.json(
    32	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    33	        { status: 500 },
    34	      );
    35	    }
    36	
    37	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    38	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DashboardMetric[]> = {
    39	        ok: true,
    40	        data: [],
    41	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    42	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
    43	      };
    44	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    45	    }
    46	
    47	    // Filter to latest trade_date
    48	    const latestDate = rows[0].trade_date;
    49	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestDate);
    50	
    51	    const metrics: DashboardMetric[] = latestRows.map((row) => ({
    52	      key: row.metric_key,
    53	      label: row.metric_key.replace(/_/g, " "),
    54	      value: Number(row.metric_value),
    55	    }));
    56	
    57	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DashboardMetric[]> = {
    58	      ok: true,
    59	      data: metrics,
    60	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    61	      source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
    62	    };
    63	
    64	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    65	  } catch (err) {
    66	    return NextResponse.json(
    67	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    68	      { status: 500 },
    69	    );
    70	  }
    71	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	
     5	export async function GET() {
     6	  const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
     7	  const siteUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL?.trim() ?? null;
     8	  const siteUrlConfigured = Boolean(siteUrl);
     9	  const siteUrlIsLocalhost = Boolean(siteUrl && siteUrl.includes("localhost"));
    10	
    11	  try {
    12	    const admin = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    13	    const { error } = await admin
    14	      .schema("ops")
    15	      .from("source_registry")
    16	      .select("source_id", { count: "exact", head: true })
    17	      .limit(1);
    18	
    19	    if (!error) {
    20	      return NextResponse.json({
    21	        ok: true,
    22	        dbReachable: true,
    23	        schemaReady: true,
    24	        siteUrlConfigured,
    25	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    26	        checkedAt,
    27	      });
    28	    }
    29	
    30	    const schemaNotReady = error.code === "42P01";
    31	
    32	    return NextResponse.json(
    33	      {
    34	        ok: schemaNotReady,
    35	        dbReachable: true,
    36	        schemaReady: false,
    37	        siteUrlConfigured,
    38	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    39	        error: error.message,
    40	        checkedAt,
    41	      },
    42	      { status: schemaNotReady ? 200 : 503 },
    43	    );
    44	  } catch (error) {
    45	    return NextResponse.json(
    46	      {
    47	        ok: false,
    48	        dbReachable: false,
    49	        schemaReady: false,
    50	        siteUrlConfigured,
    51	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    52	        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown health error",
    53	        checkedAt,
    54	      },
    55	      { status: 503 },
    56	    );
    57	  }
    58	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
     4	import { hasEnvVars } from "@/lib/utils";
     5	
     6	export async function GET() {
     7	  if (!hasEnvVars) {
     8	    return NextResponse.json(
     9	      {
    10	        ok: false,
    11	        authenticated: false,
    12	        error: "Supabase auth env vars are not configured",
    13	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    14	      },
    15	      { status: 503 },
    16	    );
    17	  }
    18	
    19	  const supabase = await createClient();
    20	  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getClaims();
    21	
    22	  if (error) {
    23	    return NextResponse.json(
    24	      {
    25	        ok: false,
    26	        authenticated: false,
    27	        error: error.message,
    28	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    29	      },
    30	      { status: 401 },
    31	    );
    32	  }
    33	
    34	  if (!data?.claims) {
    35	    return NextResponse.json(
    36	      {
    37	        ok: false,
    38	        authenticated: false,
    39	        error: "No authenticated user claims",
    40	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    41	      },
    42	      { status: 401 },
    43	    );
    44	  }
    45	
    46	  return NextResponse.json({
    47	    ok: true,
    48	    authenticated: true,
    49	    checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    50	  });
    51	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import type { AiCardContent, AiCardProvenance, StrategicSpecialInstructions } from "@/lib/contracts/ai-card";
     4	import type { ApiEnvelope, StrategyPosture } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     5	import { readAiSnapshot, toAiEnvelopeMeta, type AiSnapshotMeta } from "@/lib/server/ai-snapshot";
     6	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     7	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     8	import {
     9	  fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot,
    10	  TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS,
    11	  uniqueTrustedMarketUrls,
    12	} from "@/lib/server/trusted-market-sources";
    13	
    14	type StrategyCards = {
    15	  contractImpactCalculator: AiCardContent;
    16	  factorWaterfall: AiCardContent;
    17	  riskMetrics: AiCardContent;
    18	};
    19	
    20	type StrategyAiSnapshot = {
    21	  posture?: StrategyPosture;
    22	  cards?: StrategyCards;
    23	} & AiSnapshotMeta;
    24	
    25	const STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS: Record<keyof StrategyCards, StrategicSpecialInstructions> = {
    26	  contractImpactCalculator: {
    27	    cardTopic: "Buyer-Side Contract Window Impact",
    28	    strategicObjective:
    29	      "Quantify staged-buy versus single-window contract execution under current volatility, crush, and macro tail conditions for soybean oil procurement.",
    30	    neuralConnectionThesis:
    31	      "Execution cost dispersion increases non-linearly when volatility transmission and macro-policy stress co-align; tranche-based timing reduces adverse selection probability for buyers.",
    32	    quantResearchProtocol: [
    33	      "Estimate scenario-weighted cost outcomes across staggered execution windows.",
    34	      "Compare one-shot entry slippage risk versus staged entry variance reduction.",
    35	      "Include downside tail amplification under volatility and macro co-escalation states.",
    36	      "Frame recommendation as buyer-side cost-control, not directional speculation.",
    37	    ],
    38	    inferenceConstraints: [
    39	      "Do not recommend one-shot execution when volatility and macro channels remain elevated.",
    40	      "Do not present strategy guidance without explicit downside-tail treatment.",
    41	      "Do not use generic timing language without quantified window tradeoffs.",
    42	    ],
    43	    outputRequirements: [
    44	      "State preferred execution structure and why.",
    45	      "Report cost-control logic in buyer terms.",
    46	      "Include trigger conditions that would invalidate the recommendation.",
    47	    ],
    48	  },
    49	  factorWaterfall: {
    50	    cardTopic: "Cross-Driver Procurement Pressure Ranking",
    51	    strategicObjective:
    52	      "Rank the active drivers by marginal procurement impact and explain causal ordering so purchase cadence can prioritize the right risk channels.",
    53	    neuralConnectionThesis:
    54	      "Procurement risk emerges from driver ordering and interaction effects; ranking volatility, crush, macro, energy, and China channels clarifies which signals should drive immediate action.",
    55	    quantResearchProtocol: [
    56	      "Rank each driver by current pressure, persistence, and transmission intensity.",
    57	      "Test interaction pairs for escalation pathways and conflict states.",
    58	      "Separate dominant drivers from secondary contextual drivers.",
    59	      "Preserve directional uncertainty labels when channels diverge.",
    60	    ],
    61	    inferenceConstraints: [
    62	      "Do not collapse all drivers into a single undifferentiated summary.",
    63	      "Do not hide conflict between top-ranked channels.",
    64	      "Do not assign confidence without data freshness context.",
    65	    ],
    66	    outputRequirements: [
    67	      "Provide ordered driver stack with concise rationale.",
    68	      "Call out interaction risk explicitly.",
    69	      "Translate ranking into procurement monitoring priorities.",
    70	    ],
    71	  },
    72	  riskMetrics: {
    73	    cardTopic: "Buyer Risk Math and Tail Exposure",
    74	    strategicObjective:
    75	      "Express near-term procurement risk using explicit asymmetry, latency risk, and exposure math so decision timing is grounded in quantified downside.",
    76	    neuralConnectionThesis:
    77	      "For buyers, decision latency under elevated risk networks is often more expensive than controlled over-hedging; quantified asymmetry clarifies when faster action is warranted.",
    78	    quantResearchProtocol: [
    79	      "Assess near-term tail asymmetry from active driver network state.",
    80	      "Measure decision-latency risk versus controlled execution-risk tradeoff.",
    81	      "Classify exposure state as contained, elevated, or escalation-prone.",
    82	      "Tie risk statements to buyer-side cost outcomes and cadence impact.",
    83	    ],
    84	    inferenceConstraints: [
    85	      "Do not report neutral risk when asymmetry is elevated.",
    86	      "Do not describe risk posture without latency implications.",
    87	      "Do not omit confidence qualifiers when metrics are stale or sparse.",
    88	    ],
    89	    outputRequirements: [
    90	      "State risk regime and asymmetry in plain buyer terms.",
    91	      "Explain latency risk versus hedge risk comparison.",
    92	      "Provide specific cadence/monitoring recommendation.",
    93	    ],
    94	  },

    96	
    97	function buildProvenance(
    98	  generatedAt: string,
    99	  tradeDate: string | null,
   100	  cardKey: keyof StrategyCards,
   101	  trustedUrls: string[],
   102	): AiCardProvenance {
   103	  return {
   104	    asOf: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   105	    generatedAt,
   106	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   107	    sourceFeeds: [
   108	      "analytics.market_posture",
   109	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   110	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   111	      ...trustedUrls,
   112	    ],
   113	    sourceRecords: [
   114	      {
   115	        source: "analytics.market_posture",
   116	        table: "analytics.market_posture",
   117	        recordHint: tradeDate ? `trade_date=${tradeDate}` : "latest row",
   118	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? undefined,
   119	      },
   120	      {
   121	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   122	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   123	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   124	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   125	      },
   126	    ],
   127	    notes: [
   128	      "Buyer posture is interpreted from verified table and market-source pulls.",
   129	      "Hard stop is applied when required driver or market evidence is missing.",
   130	    ],
   131	  };
   132	}
   133	
   134	export async function GET() {
   135	  try {
   136	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   137	    if (unauthorized) {
   138	      return unauthorized;
   139	    }
   140	
   141	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   142	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<StrategyAiSnapshot>(
   143	      "app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json",
   144	    );
   145	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   146	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   147	
   148	    const [{ data: row, error }, { data: attributionRows }, { data: metricRows }] = await Promise.all([
   149	      supabase
   150	        .schema("analytics")
   151	        .from("market_posture")
   152	        .select("posture, rationale, trade_date")
   153	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   154	        .limit(1)
   155	        .maybeSingle(),
   156	      supabase
   157	        .schema("analytics")
   158	        .from("driver_attribution_1d")
   159	        .select("trade_date, rank, factor, contribution")
   160	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   161	        .order("rank", { ascending: true })
   162	        .limit(40),
   163	      supabase
   164	        .schema("analytics")
   165	        .from("dashboard_metrics")
   166	        .select("trade_date, metric_key, metric_value")
   167	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   168	        .limit(300),
   169	    ]);
   170	
   171	    if (error) {
   172	      return NextResponse.json(
   173	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
   174	        { status: 500 },
   175	      );
   176	    }
   177	
   178	    const latestAttrDate = attributionRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   179	    const latestAttr = (attributionRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestAttrDate);
   180	    const topFactors = latestAttr
   181	      .slice(0, 4)
   182	      .map((r) => `${String(r.factor)} (${Number(r.contribution).toFixed(2)})`);
   183	
   184	    const latestMetricDate = metricRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   185	    const latestMetrics = (metricRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestMetricDate);
   186	    const metricMap = new Map<string, number>();
   187	    for (const rowMetric of latestMetrics) {
   188	      const n = Number(rowMetric.metric_value);
   189	      if (Number.isFinite(n)) {
   190	        metricMap.set(String(rowMetric.metric_key).toLowerCase(), n);
   191	      }
   192	    }
   193	
   194	    const dbVix = metricMap.get("vix_value") ?? null;
   195	    const dbOvx = metricMap.get("ovx_value") ?? null;
   196	    const dbCl5d = metricMap.get("cl_change_5d") ?? metricMap.get("crude_oil_change_5d") ?? null;
   197	    const liveVix = trustedMarket.vix.value ?? dbVix;
   198	    const liveOvx = trustedMarket.ovx.value ?? dbOvx;
   199	    const liveCl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d ?? dbCl5d;
   200	
   201	    const dbPosture: StrategyPosture | null = row
   202	      ? {
   203	          posture: row.posture as StrategyPosture["posture"],
   204	          rationale: row.rationale ?? "",
   205	          updatedAt: row.trade_date ?? new Date().toISOString(),
   206	        }
   207	      : null;
   208	
   209	    const posture: StrategyPosture | null = aiSnapshot?.posture ?? dbPosture;
   210	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   211	    const tradeDate = row?.trade_date ?? posture?.updatedAt ?? null;
   212	    const stagedExecutionBias =
   213	      posture?.posture === "ACCUMULATE"
   214	        ? "Staged accumulation remains favored."
   215	        : posture?.posture === "WAIT"
   216	          ? "Hold execution optionality and avoid urgency."
   217	          : "Defer new exposure until risk compression is visible.";
   218	    const volatilityLine =
   219	      liveVix !== null && liveOvx !== null
   220	        ? `VIX ${liveVix.toFixed(2)} and OVX ${liveOvx.toFixed(2)} remain active volatility constraints.`
   221	        : "Hard stop: verified VIX/OVX volatility reads are unavailable.";
   222	    const crudeLine =
   223	      liveCl5d !== null
   224	        ? `CL 5-day change is ${(liveCl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%, informing near-term pass-through risk.`
   225	        : "Hard stop: verified CL 5-day change is unavailable.";
   226	    const topFactorLine =
   227	      topFactors.length > 0
   228	        ? `Latest verified attribution stack: ${topFactors.join(", ")}.`
   229	        : "Hard stop: no verified attribution rows available in analytics.driver_attribution_1d.";
   230	    const noTrustedFeeds =
   231	      liveVix === null && liveOvx === null && liveCl5d === null;
   232	
   233	    const fallbackCards: StrategyCards = {
   234	      contractImpactCalculator: {
   235	        title: "Contract Impact Calculator",
   236	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   237	          ? "Hard stop: trusted market evidence from Yahoo/FRED is unavailable, so contract-impact guidance is blocked."
   238	          : `${stagedExecutionBias} ${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine}`,
   239	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.contractImpactCalculator,
   240	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "contractImpactCalculator", trustedUrls),
   241	      },
   242	      factorWaterfall: {
   243	        title: "Factor Waterfall",
   244	        body: topFactorLine,
   245	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.factorWaterfall,
   246	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "factorWaterfall", trustedUrls),
   247	      },
   248	      riskMetrics: {
   249	        title: "Risk Metrics",
   250	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   251	          ? "Hard stop: trusted volatility and crude metrics are unavailable; buyer risk-math output is blocked until verified feeds recover."
   252	          : `${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine} Decision-latency risk should be prioritized over single-window execution risk when these channels remain elevated.`,
   253	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.riskMetrics,
   254	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "riskMetrics", trustedUrls),
   255	      },
   256	    };
   257	
   258	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   259	    const cards: StrategyCards = {
   260	      contractImpactCalculator: {
   261	        ...fallbackCards.contractImpactCalculator,
   262	        ...rawCards.contractImpactCalculator,
   263	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   264	          rawCards.contractImpactCalculator?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   265	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.contractImpactCalculator,
   266	        provenance:
   267	          rawCards.contractImpactCalculator?.provenance ??
   268	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "contractImpactCalculator", trustedUrls),
   269	      },
   270	      factorWaterfall: {
   271	        ...fallbackCards.factorWaterfall,
   272	        ...rawCards.factorWaterfall,
   273	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   274	          rawCards.factorWaterfall?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   275	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.factorWaterfall,
   276	        provenance:
   277	          rawCards.factorWaterfall?.provenance ??
   278	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "factorWaterfall", trustedUrls),
   279	      },
   280	      riskMetrics: {
   281	        ...fallbackCards.riskMetrics,
   282	        ...rawCards.riskMetrics,
   283	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   284	          rawCards.riskMetrics?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   285	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.riskMetrics,
   286	        provenance:
   287	          rawCards.riskMetrics?.provenance ??
   288	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "riskMetrics", trustedUrls),
   289	      },
   290	    };
   291	
   292	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<StrategyPosture | null> = {
   293	      ok: true,
   294	      data: posture,
   295	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   296	      source: ["analytics.market_posture", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   297	    };
   298	
   299	    return NextResponse.json({
   300	      ...envelope,
   301	      cards,
   302	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   303	    });
   304	  } catch (err) {
   305	    return NextResponse.json(
   306	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   307	      { status: 500 },
   308	    );
   309	  }
   310	}

    83	    ],
    84	    inferenceConstraints: [
    85	      "Do not recommend static cadence in elevated mixed-risk states.",
    86	      "Do not issue binary buy/wait calls without uncertainty framing.",
    87	      "Do not ignore asymmetric downside scenarios.",
    88	    ],
    89	    outputRequirements: [
    90	      "Provide concrete pacing guidance.",
    91	      "State why buyer psychology risk is elevated or contained.",
    92	      "Include explicit reassessment triggers.",
    93	    ],
    94	  } satisfies StrategicSpecialInstructions,
    95	  positioningFlow: {
    96	    cardTopic: "Managed Money Bias Regime",
    97	    strategicObjective:
    98	      "Determine whether managed-money bias contributes to stabilizing or destabilizing procurement-cost expectations.",
    99	    neuralConnectionThesis:
   100	      "Managed-money bias influences the persistence of commodity moves and can widen procurement timing error when conviction is fragile and volatility is elevated.",
   101	    quantResearchProtocol: [
   102	      "Read latest CoT-linked bias state and classify confidence.",
   103	      "Cross-map bias state to sentiment score and volatility regime.",
   104	      "Differentiate supportive participation from reflexive positioning risk.",
   105	      "Translate bias regime into buyer-facing caution level.",
   106	    ],
   107	    inferenceConstraints: [
   108	      "Do not equate position size with conviction durability.",
   109	      "Do not treat stale CoT inputs as real-time certainty.",
   110	      "Do not omit confidence caveats.",
   111	    ],
   112	    outputRequirements: [
   113	      "State bias class and confidence.",
   114	      "Explain procurement risk implication.",
   115	      "Specify what would change the bias interpretation.",
   116	    ],
   117	  } satisfies StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   118	  headlineFlow: {
   119	    cardTopic: "Headline Velocity and Regime Coherence",
   120	    strategicObjective:
   121	      "Assess whether headline velocity is producing actionable regime signal or noisy churn for procurement decisions.",
   122	    neuralConnectionThesis:
   123	      "Headline velocity only becomes actionable when persistence and cross-channel coherence are present; otherwise it inflates noise and overreaction risk.",
   124	    quantResearchProtocol: [
   125	      "Measure 24h/7d headline velocity and cluster concentration.",
   126	      "Classify cluster persistence by macro, policy, and energy channels.",
   127	      "Validate coherence with sentiment score directionality.",
   128	      "Link outcome to procurement monitoring frequency.",
   129	    ],
   130	    inferenceConstraints: [
   131	      "Do not infer regime shifts from velocity alone.",
   132	      "Do not ignore channel concentration effects.",
   133	      "Do not provide cadence advice without coherence check.",
   134	    ],
   135	    outputRequirements: [
   136	      "State whether velocity is signal or noise.",
   137	      "Describe expected persistence horizon.",
   138	      "Provide monitoring cadence recommendation.",
   139	    ],
   140	  } satisfies StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   141	} as const;
   142	
   143	function buildProvenance(
   144	  generatedAt: string,
   145	  updatedAt: string,
   146	  cardKey: string,
   147	  trustedUrls: string[],
   148	): AiCardProvenance {
   149	  return {
   150	    asOf: updatedAt,
   151	    generatedAt,
   152	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   153	    sourceFeeds: ["alt.news_events", "mkt.cftc_1w", ...trustedUrls],
   154	    sourceRecords: [
   155	      {
   156	        source: "alt.news_events",
   157	        table: "alt.news_events",
   158	        recordHint: "latest 7-day sentiment rows",
   159	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   160	      },
   161	      {
   162	        source: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   163	        table: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   164	        recordHint: "symbol=ZL latest observation",
   165	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   166	      },
   167	      {
   168	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   169	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   170	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   171	      },
   172	    ],
   173	    notes: [
   174	      "Narrative output is buyer-facing procurement interpretation from verified rows.",
   175	      "Hard stop language is required when market or flow evidence is missing.",
   176	    ],
   177	  };
   178	}
   179	
   180	export async function GET() {
   181	  try {
   182	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   183	    if (unauthorized) {
   184	      return unauthorized;
   185	    }
   186	
   187	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   188	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<SentimentAiSnapshot>(
   189	      "app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json",
   190	    );
   191	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   192	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   193	
   194	    const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
   195	    sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
   196	    const oneDayAgo = new Date();
   197	    oneDayAgo.setDate(oneDayAgo.getDate() - 1);
   198	
   199	    const [{ data: newsRows, error: newsError }, { data: cftcRow }] = await Promise.all([
   200	      supabase
   201	        .schema("alt")
   202	        .from("news_events")
   203	        .select("source, published_at, specialist_tags")
   204	        .gte("published_at", sevenDaysAgo.toISOString())
   205	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   206	        .limit(300),
   207	      supabase
   208	        .schema("mkt")
   209	        .from("cftc_1w")
   210	        .select("observation_date, payload")
   211	        .eq("symbol", "ZL")
   212	        .order("observation_date", { ascending: false })
   213	        .limit(1)
   214	        .maybeSingle(),
   215	    ]);
   216	
   217	    if (newsError) {
   218	      return NextResponse.json(
   219	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: newsError.message },
   220	        { status: 500 },
   221	      );
   222	    }
   223	
   224	    const rows = newsRows ?? [];
   225	    const headlineCount = rows.length;
   226	    const last24h = rows.filter((row) => new Date(row.published_at).getTime() >= oneDayAgo.getTime()).length;
   227	    const pulseRatio = headlineCount > 0 ? last24h / Math.max(1, headlineCount / 7) : 0;
   228	    const flowState = pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? "elevated" : pulseRatio >= 1 ? "balanced" : "subdued";
   229	
   230	    const sourceSet = new Set<string>();
   231	    const tagCounts = new Map<string, number>();
   232	    for (const row of rows) {
   233	      if (row.source) sourceSet.add(row.source);
   234	      const tags = Array.isArray(row.specialist_tags) ? row.specialist_tags : [];
   235	      for (const tag of tags) {
   236	        const normalized = String(tag).trim();
   237	        if (!normalized) continue;
   238	        tagCounts.set(normalized, (tagCounts.get(normalized) ?? 0) + 1);
   239	      }
   240	    }
   241	    const topTags = Array.from(tagCounts.entries())
   242	      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
   243	      .slice(0, 3)
   244	      .map(([tag]) => tag);
   245	    const tagPhrase = topTags.length > 0 ? topTags.join(", ") : "no dominant specialist cluster";
   246	
   247	    const cotPayload = cftcRow?.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null;
   248	    const cotBias = (cotPayload?.bias as string) ?? "neutral";
   249	    const cotBiasNorm = cotBias.trim().toLowerCase();
   250	    const cotBiasLabel =
   251	      cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? "bullish bias" : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? "bearish bias" : "neutral bias";
   252	    const cotBiasScore = cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? 20 : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? -20 : 0;
   253	
   254	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   255	    const ovx = trustedMarket.ovx.value;
   256	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   257	    const cl5dText =
   258	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   259	    const macroTrustedMissing = vix === null && ovx === null && cl5d === null;
   260	    const volatilityPenalty =
   261	      (vix !== null && vix >= 25 ? -14 : vix !== null && vix < 18 ? 6 : 0) +
   262	      (ovx !== null && ovx >= 35 ? -10 : ovx !== null && ovx < 26 ? 4 : 0) +
   263	      (cl5d !== null && Math.abs(cl5d) >= 0.04 ? -8 : cl5d !== null && Math.abs(cl5d) <= 0.015 ? 4 : 0);
   264	    const flowPenalty = pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? -12 : pulseRatio < 0.8 ? 5 : 0;
   265	    const sentimentScore = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, cotBiasScore + volatilityPenalty + flowPenalty));
   266	
   267	    const dbOverview: SentimentOverview = {
   268	      headlineCount: headlineCount ?? 0,
   269	      sentimentScore,
   270	      cotBias,
   271	      updatedAt:
   272	        rows[0]?.published_at ??
   273	        (cftcRow?.observation_date ? `${cftcRow.observation_date}T00:00:00Z` : trustedMarket.fetchedAt),
   274	    };
   275	
   276	    const overview: SentimentOverview = {
   277	      headlineCount: aiSnapshot?.overview?.headlineCount ?? dbOverview.headlineCount,
   278	      sentimentScore: aiSnapshot?.overview?.sentimentScore ?? dbOverview.sentimentScore,
   279	      cotBias: aiSnapshot?.overview?.cotBias ?? dbOverview.cotBias,
   280	      updatedAt: aiSnapshot?.overview?.updatedAt ?? dbOverview.updatedAt,
   281	    };
   282	
   283	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   284	    const fallbackCards: SentimentCards = {
   285	      narratives: [
   286	        {
   287	          title: "Macro Narrative",
   288	          body: macroTrustedMissing
   289	            ? "Hard stop: trusted Yahoo/FRED market context is unavailable; macro narrative classification is blocked."
   290	            : `Macro pressure is ${sentimentScore <= -25 ? "defensive" : sentimentScore >= 25 ? "supportive" : "mixed"} with ${cotBiasLabel}. VIX ${vix?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, OVX ${ovx?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, and CL 5-day ${cl5dText} frame near-term narrative risk.`,
   291	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.macroNarrative,
   292	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "macroNarrative", trustedUrls),
   293	        },
   294	        {
   295	          title: "Flow Narrative",
   296	          body: headlineCount === 0
   297	            ? "Hard stop: no verified alt.news_events rows in the last 7 days; flow narrative is blocked."
   298	            : `Flow regime is ${flowState} with ${sourceSet.size} active sources and dominant specialist cluster: ${tagPhrase}. Velocity coherence is ${pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? "high-risk noisy" : pulseRatio >= 1 ? "tradable but mixed" : "low-intensity"} for buyer timing decisions.`,
   299	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.flowNarrative,
   300	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "flowNarrative", trustedUrls),
   301	        },
   302	        {
   303	          title: "Procurement Narrative",
   304	          body: macroTrustedMissing || !cftcRow
   305	            ? "Hard stop: missing verified CoT or trusted market context prevents buyer-facing procurement narrative."
   306	            : `Buyer pacing should remain ${sentimentScore <= -25 ? "defensive with tighter reassessment windows" : sentimentScore >= 25 ? "opportunistic staged accumulation" : "balanced with optionality preserved"}. CoT is ${cotBiasLabel} and volatility transmission remains ${vix !== null && vix >= 25 ? "elevated" : "contained"} at current read.`,
   307	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.procurementNarrative,
   308	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "procurementNarrative", trustedUrls),
   309	        },
   310	      ],
   311	      positioningFlow: {
   312	        title: "Managed Money Positioning",
   313	        body: !cftcRow
   314	          ? "Hard stop: no verified mkt.cftc_1w observation for ZL is available."
   315	          : `Latest CoT posture is ${cotBiasLabel} (observation ${cftcRow.observation_date}). Use this as directional conviction context, not a standalone execution trigger.`,
   316	        strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.positioningFlow,
   317	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "positioningFlow", trustedUrls),
   318	      },
   319	      headlineFlow: {
   320	        title: "Headline Flow",
   321	        body: headlineCount === 0
   322	          ? "Hard stop: headline-flow narrative is blocked because no verified alt.news_events rows were found in the current 7-day window."
   323	          : `Headline velocity is ${flowState}. Source breadth is ${sourceSet.size} and the dominant specialist cluster is ${tagPhrase}. Treat this as signal only when persistence remains coherent with volatility and CoT bias.`,
   324	        strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.headlineFlow,
   325	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "headlineFlow", trustedUrls),
   326	      },
   327	    };
   328	
   329	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   330	    const mergedNarratives = [0, 1, 2].map((idx) => {
   331	      const fallback = fallbackCards.narratives[idx];
   332	      const raw = rawCards.narratives?.[idx];
   333	      return {
   334	        ...fallback,
   335	        ...raw,
   336	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   337	          raw?.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? fallback.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   338	        provenance: raw?.provenance ?? fallback.provenance,
   339	      } as AiCardContent;
   340	    }) as [AiCardContent, AiCardContent, AiCardContent];
   341	
   342	    const cards: SentimentCards = {
   343	      narratives: mergedNarratives,
   344	      positioningFlow: {
   345	        ...fallbackCards.positioningFlow,
   346	        ...rawCards.positioningFlow,
   347	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   348	          rawCards.positioningFlow?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   349	          fallbackCards.positioningFlow.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   350	        provenance:
   351	          rawCards.positioningFlow?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.positioningFlow.provenance,
   352	      },
   353	      headlineFlow: {
   354	        ...fallbackCards.headlineFlow,
   355	        ...rawCards.headlineFlow,
   356	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   357	          rawCards.headlineFlow?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   358	          fallbackCards.headlineFlow.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   359	        provenance: rawCards.headlineFlow?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.headlineFlow.provenance,
   360	      },
   361	    };
   362	
   363	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<SentimentOverview | null> = {
   364	      ok: true,
   365	      data: overview,
   366	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   367	      source: ["alt.news_events", "mkt.cftc_1w", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   368	    };
   369	
   370	    return NextResponse.json({
   371	      ...envelope,
   372	      cards,
   373	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   374	    });
   375	  } catch (err) {
   376	    return NextResponse.json(
   377	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   378	      { status: 500 },
   379	    );
   380	  }
   381	}

    84	const AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS = new Set(["crush", "biofuel", "palm", "tariff", "china", "energy"]);
    85	
    86	function includesAnyTerm(text: string, terms: readonly string[]): boolean {
    87	  return terms.some((term) => {
    88	    const normalized = term.trim().toLowerCase();
    89	    if (!normalized) return false;
    90	    const escaped = normalized
    91	      .replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    92	      .replace(/\s+/g, "\\s+");
    93	    const pattern = new RegExp(`(^|[^a-z0-9])${escaped}([^a-z0-9]|$)`, "i");
    94	    return pattern.test(text);
    95	  });
    96	}
    97	
    98	function normalizeTags(raw: unknown): string[] {
    99	  if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return [];
   100	  return raw
   101	    .map((tag) => String(tag).trim())
   102	    .filter((tag) => tag.length > 0);
   103	}
   104	
   105	function isAgSoyPolicyRelevant(params: {
   106	  title: string;
   107	  summary?: string | null;
   108	  tags?: string[];
   109	}): boolean {
   110	  const textBlob = `${params.title} ${params.summary ?? ""}`.toLowerCase();
   111	  const primaryMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_PRIMARY_TERMS);
   112	  const contextMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_CONTEXT_TERMS);
   113	  const policyMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_POLICY_TERMS);
   114	  const tagSet = new Set((params.tags ?? []).map((tag) => tag.toLowerCase()));
   115	  const tagHint = Array.from(tagSet).some((tag) => AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS.has(tag));
   116	
   117	  if (primaryMatch) return true;
   118	  if (contextMatch && (policyMatch || tagHint)) return true;
   119	  if (tagHint && includesAnyTerm(textBlob, ["usda", "epa", "farm", "agricult", "renewable", "biofuel"])) {
   120	    return true;
   121	  }
   122	  return false;
   123	}
   124	
   125	function dedupeLegislationItems(items: LegislationItem[]): LegislationItem[] {
   126	  const seen = new Set<string>();
   127	  const deduped: LegislationItem[] = [];
   128	  for (const item of items) {
   129	    const key = `${item.source}::${item.title}`;
   130	    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
   131	    seen.add(key);
   132	    deduped.push(item);
   133	  }
   134	  return deduped;
   135	}

   209	function buildProvenance(
   210	  generatedAt: string,
   211	  asOf: string,
   212	  cardKey: keyof LegislationCards,
   213	  trustedUrls: string[],
   214	): AiCardProvenance {
   215	  return {
   216	    asOf,
   217	    generatedAt,
   218	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   219	    sourceFeeds: [
   220	      "alt.legislation_1d",
   221	      "alt.executive_actions",
   222	      "alt.congress_bills",
   223	      ...trustedUrls,
   224	    ],
   225	    sourceRecords: [
   226	      {
   227	        source: "alt.legislation_1d",
   228	        table: "alt.legislation_1d",
   229	        recordHint: "latest policy rows",
   230	        observedAt: asOf,
   231	      },
   232	      {
   233	        source: "alt.executive_actions",
   234	        table: "alt.executive_actions",
   235	        recordHint: "latest executive rows",
   236	        observedAt: asOf,
   237	      },
   238	      {
   239	        source: "alt.congress_bills",
   240	        table: "alt.congress_bills",
   241	        recordHint: "latest congressional rows",
   242	        observedAt: asOf,
   243	      },
   244	      {
   245	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   246	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   247	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   248	      },
   249	    ],
   250	  };
   251	}
   252	
   253	export async function GET() {
   254	  try {
   255	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   256	    if (unauthorized) {
   257	      return unauthorized;
   258	    }
   259	
   260	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   261	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<LegislationAiSnapshot>(
   262	      "app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json",
   263	    );
   264	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   265	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   266	
   267	    const [legRes, execRes, billsRes] = await Promise.all([
   268	      supabase
   269	        .schema("alt")
   270	        .from("legislation_1d")
   271	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   272	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   273	        .limit(20),
   274	      supabase
   275	        .schema("alt")
   276	        .from("executive_actions")
   277	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   278	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   279	        .limit(10),
   280	      supabase
   281	        .schema("alt")
   282	        .from("congress_bills")
   283	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   284	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   285	        .limit(10),
   286	    ]);
   287	
   288	    const allRows = [...(legRes.data ?? []), ...(execRes.data ?? []), ...(billsRes.data ?? [])];
   289	    allRows.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.published_at).getTime() - new Date(a.published_at).getTime());
   290	
   291	    const filteredRows = allRows.filter((row) => {
   292	      const payload = (row.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null) ?? null;
   293	      const tags = normalizeTags(payload?.tags);
   294	      return isAgSoyPolicyRelevant({
   295	        title: String(row.title ?? ""),
   296	        summary: row.summary as string | null | undefined,
   297	        tags,
   298	      });
   299	    });
   300	
   301	    const dbItems = dedupeLegislationItems(filteredRows.slice(0, 30).map((row) => {
   302	      const payload = (row.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null) ?? null;
   303	      return {
   304	        source: row.source,
   305	        title: row.title,
   306	        publishedAt: row.published_at,
   307	        tags: normalizeTags(payload?.tags),
   308	      };
   309	    }));
   310	
   311	    const snapshotItems = dedupeLegislationItems((aiSnapshot?.items ?? []).filter((item) =>
   312	      isAgSoyPolicyRelevant({
   313	        title: item.title,
   314	        summary: "",
   315	        tags: item.tags ?? [],
   316	      }),
   317	    ));
   318	    const items: LegislationItem[] = dbItems.length > 0 ? dbItems : snapshotItems;
   319	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   320	    const asOf = items[0]?.publishedAt ?? trustedMarket.fetchedAt;
   321	
   322	    const sourceCounts = new Map<string, number>();
   323	    const tagCounts = new Map<string, number>();
   324	    for (const item of dbItems) {
   325	      sourceCounts.set(item.source, (sourceCounts.get(item.source) ?? 0) + 1);
   326	      for (const tag of item.tags) {
   327	        const normalized = String(tag).trim();
   328	        if (!normalized) continue;
   329	        tagCounts.set(normalized, (tagCounts.get(normalized) ?? 0) + 1);
   330	      }
   331	    }
   332	    const sortedSources = Array.from(sourceCounts.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
   333	    const sortedTags = Array.from(tagCounts.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
   334	    const topSource = sortedSources[0];
   335	    const topTagSet = sortedTags.slice(0, 3).map(([tag]) => tag).join(", ");
   336	    const topSourceShare =
   337	      dbItems.length > 0 && topSource ? (topSource[1] / dbItems.length) * 100 : null;
   338	    const concentrationClass =
   339	      topSourceShare === null
   340	        ? "unknown"
   341	        : topSourceShare >= 60
   342	          ? "high concentration"
   343	          : topSourceShare >= 40
   344	            ? "moderate concentration"
   345	            : "broadly distributed";
   346	    const latestItem = dbItems[0] ?? null;
   347	
   348	    const fallbackCards: LegislationCards = {
   349	      feedSummary: {
   350	        title: "Live Policy Feed",
   351	        body: latestItem
   352	          ? `Most recent verified agriculture/soy policy item: "${latestItem.title}" from ${latestItem.source}. Primary watch themes are ${topTagSet || "not yet tagged"} with procurement impact evaluated on implementation timing and enforcement likelihood.`
   353	          : "Hard stop: no verified agriculture/soy policy rows are available across legislation, executive, or congressional feeds.",
   354	        strategicSpecialInstructions: LEGISLATION_INSTRUCTIONS.feedSummary,
   355	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "feedSummary", trustedUrls),
   356	      },
   357	      sourcePressure: {
   358	        title: "Source Activity",
   359	        body: topSource
   360	          ? `Source structure is ${concentrationClass}; ${topSource[0]} currently leads policy flow coverage at ${topSourceShare?.toFixed(1)}%. Confidence should be discounted when concentration remains high without corroboration breadth.`
   361	          : "Hard stop: source-activity interpretation is blocked because no verified feed records are available.",
   362	        strategicSpecialInstructions: LEGISLATION_INSTRUCTIONS.sourcePressure,
   363	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "sourcePressure", trustedUrls),
   364	      },
   365	      tagPressure: {
   366	        title: "Policy Tag Pressure",
   367	        body: sortedTags.length > 0
   368	          ? `Top verified policy pressure themes: ${topTagSet}. These tags should drive watchlist priority in that order until persistence weakens.`
   369	          : "Hard stop: no verified policy tags are present, so tag-pressure ranking is blocked.",
   370	        strategicSpecialInstructions: LEGISLATION_INSTRUCTIONS.tagPressure,
   371	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "tagPressure", trustedUrls),
   372	      },
   373	    };
   374	
   375	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   376	    const cards: LegislationCards = {
   377	      feedSummary: {
   378	        ...fallbackCards.feedSummary,
   379	        ...rawCards.feedSummary,
   380	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   381	          rawCards.feedSummary?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   382	          fallbackCards.feedSummary.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   383	        provenance: rawCards.feedSummary?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.feedSummary.provenance,
   384	      },
   385	      sourcePressure: {
   386	        ...fallbackCards.sourcePressure,
   387	        ...rawCards.sourcePressure,
   388	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   389	          rawCards.sourcePressure?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   390	          fallbackCards.sourcePressure.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   391	        provenance: rawCards.sourcePressure?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.sourcePressure.provenance,
   392	      },
   393	      tagPressure: {
   394	        ...fallbackCards.tagPressure,
   395	        ...rawCards.tagPressure,
   396	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   397	          rawCards.tagPressure?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   398	          fallbackCards.tagPressure.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   399	        provenance: rawCards.tagPressure?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.tagPressure.provenance,
   400	      },
   401	    };
   402	
   403	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<LegislationItem[]> = {
   404	      ok: true,
   405	      data: items,
   406	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   407	      source: ["alt.legislation_1d", "alt.executive_actions", "alt.congress_bills", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   408	    };
   409	
   410	    return NextResponse.json({
   411	      ...envelope,
   412	      cards,
   413	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   414	    });
   415	  } catch (err) {
   416	    return NextResponse.json(
   417	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   418	      { status: 500 },
   419	    );
   420	  }
   421	}

   121	function buildProvenance(
   122	  generatedAt: string,
   123	  asOf: string,
   124	  cardKey: keyof VegasIntelCards,
   125	  trustedUrls: string[],
   126	): AiCardProvenance {
   127	  return {
   128	    asOf,
   129	    generatedAt,
   130	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   131	    sourceFeeds: [
   132	      "vegas.events",
   133	      "vegas.restaurants",
   134	      "vegas.customer_scores",
   135	      "vegas.fryers",
   136	      "vegas.event_impact",
   137	      ...trustedUrls,
   138	    ],
   139	    sourceRecords: [
   140	      {
   141	        source: "vegas.events",
   142	        table: "vegas.events",
   143	        recordHint: "future event_date rows",
   144	        observedAt: asOf,
   145	      },
   146	      {
   147	        source: "vegas.restaurants",
   148	        table: "vegas.restaurants",
   149	        recordHint: "active account rows",
   150	        observedAt: asOf,
   151	      },
   152	      {
   153	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   154	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   155	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   156	      },
   157	    ],
   158	  };
   159	}
   160	
   161	export async function GET() {
   162	  try {
   163	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   164	    if (unauthorized) {
   165	      return unauthorized;
   166	    }
   167	
   168	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   169	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<VegasIntelAiSnapshot>(
   170	      "app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json",
   171	    );
   172	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   173	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   174	
   175	    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
   176	    const in14 = new Date();
   177	    in14.setDate(in14.getDate() + 14);
   178	    const in30 = new Date();
   179	    in30.setDate(in30.getDate() + 30);
   180	
   181	    const [
   182	      { data: eventRows, error: evtError },
   183	      { data: restaurantRows, error: restError },
   184	      { data: fryerRows },
   185	      { data: scoreRows },
   186	      { data: impactRows },
   187	    ] = await Promise.all([
   188	      supabase
   189	        .schema("vegas")
   190	        .from("events")
   191	        .select("id, event_name, event_date")
   192	        .gte("event_date", today)
   193	        .order("event_date", { ascending: true })
   194	        .limit(200),
   195	      supabase
   196	        .schema("vegas")
   197	        .from("restaurants")
   198	        .select("id, restaurant_name, account_status")
   199	        .eq("account_status", "active")
   200	        .limit(500),
   201	      supabase
   202	        .schema("vegas")
   203	        .from("fryers")
   204	        .select("restaurant_id, fryer_count")
   205	        .limit(500),
   206	      supabase
   207	        .schema("vegas")
   208	        .from("customer_scores")
   209	        .select("restaurant_id, score_date, score")
   210	        .order("score_date", { ascending: false })
   211	        .limit(500),
   212	      supabase
   213	        .schema("vegas")
   214	        .from("event_impact")
   215	        .select("event_id, restaurant_id, impact_score")
   216	        .order("impact_score", { ascending: false })
   217	        .limit(500),
   218	    ]);
   219	
   220	    if (evtError) {
   221	      return NextResponse.json(
   222	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: evtError.message },
   223	        { status: 500 },
   224	      );
   225	    }
   226	
   227	    if (restError) {
   228	      return NextResponse.json(
   229	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: restError.message },
   230	        { status: 500 },
   231	      );
   232	    }
   233	
   234	    const events = eventRows ?? [];
   235	    const activeRestaurants = restaurantRows ?? [];
   236	    const fryers = fryerRows ?? [];
   237	    const customerScores = scoreRows ?? [];
   238	    const eventImpacts = impactRows ?? [];
   239	
   240	    const activeEvents = events.length;
   241	    const highPriority = activeRestaurants.length;
   242	    const events14d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in14.getTime()).length;
   243	    const events30d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in30.getTime()).length;
   244	    const nextEvent = events[0] ?? null;
   245	
   246	    const knownFryerCounts = fryers
   247	      .map((row) => Number(row.fryer_count))
   248	      .filter((count) => Number.isFinite(count) && count >= 0);
   249	    const totalFryers = knownFryerCounts.reduce((acc, count) => acc + count, 0);
   250	    const lowRedundancySites = knownFryerCounts.filter((count) => count <= 1).length;
   251	    const unknownFryerSites = Math.max(0, fryers.length - knownFryerCounts.length);
   252	
   253	    const latestScoreDate = customerScores[0]?.score_date ?? null;
   254	    const latestScores = customerScores.filter((row) => row.score_date === latestScoreDate);
   255	    const scoredAccounts = latestScores
   256	      .map((row) => Number(row.score))
   257	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   258	    const avgScore =
   259	      scoredAccounts.length > 0
   260	        ? scoredAccounts.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / scoredAccounts.length
   261	        : null;
   262	
   263	    const impactValues = eventImpacts
   264	      .map((row) => Number(row.impact_score))
   265	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   266	    const avgImpact =
   267	      impactValues.length > 0
   268	        ? impactValues.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / impactValues.length
   269	        : null;
   270	
   271	    const dbSnapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   272	      activeEvents,
   273	      highPriorityAccounts: highPriority,
   274	      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   275	    };
   276	    const snapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   277	      activeEvents: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.activeEvents ?? dbSnapshot.activeEvents,
   278	      highPriorityAccounts:
   279	        aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.highPriorityAccounts ?? dbSnapshot.highPriorityAccounts,
   280	      updatedAt: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.updatedAt ?? dbSnapshot.updatedAt,
   281	    };
   282	
   283	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   284	    const asOf = snapshot.updatedAt;
   285	    const cl = trustedMarket.cl.value;
   286	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   287	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   288	    const cl5dText =
   289	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   290	    const fallbackCards: VegasIntelCards = {
   291	      upcomingEvents: {
   292	        title: "Upcoming Events",
   293	        body: nextEvent
   294	          ? `${events14d} events are scheduled over the next 14 days (${events30d} over 30 days). Next demand catalyst is ${nextEvent.event_name} on ${nextEvent.event_date}.`
   295	          : "Hard stop: no verified vegas.events rows are available for upcoming demand-window analysis.",
   296	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.upcomingEvents,
   297	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "upcomingEvents", trustedUrls),
   298	      },
   299	      aiSalesStrategy: {
   300	        title: "AI Sales Strategy",
   301	        body: activeRestaurants.length === 0 || events.length === 0
   302	          ? "Hard stop: account-targeted strategy is blocked because verified event or active-account rows are missing."
   303	          : `Prioritize high-volume active accounts ahead of the ${events14d > 0 ? "next two-week event cluster" : "next demand window"}. Average modeled event impact is ${avgImpact?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Current oil-cost backdrop is CL ${cl?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"} with 5-day ${cl5dText} and VIX ${vix?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, so cost-certainty messaging should be staged and urgency-tiered.`,
   304	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.aiSalesStrategy,
   305	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "aiSalesStrategy", trustedUrls),
   306	      },
   307	      restaurantAccounts: {
   308	        title: "Restaurant Accounts",
   309	        body: latestScores.length === 0
   310	          ? "Hard stop: no verified vegas.customer_scores rows are available for account-priority ranking."
   311	          : `Latest scoring window (${latestScoreDate}) covers ${latestScores.length} accounts with average opportunity score ${avgScore?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Sequence outreach from highest opportunity tier first, then roll down by event-window overlap.`,
   312	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.restaurantAccounts,
   313	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "restaurantAccounts", trustedUrls),
   314	      },
   315	      fryerTracking: {
   316	        title: "Fryer Equipment Tracking",
   317	        body: fryers.length === 0
   318	          ? "Hard stop: fryer lifecycle guidance is blocked because no verified vegas.fryers rows are available."
   319	          : knownFryerCounts.length === 0
   320	            ? `Verified fryer rows exist for ${fryers.length} tracked sites, but fryer-count telemetry is not yet populated. Service prioritization should use event impact and account urgency until count telemetry is promoted.`
   321	            : `Verified fryer inventory totals ${totalFryers} units across ${fryers.length} tracked sites; ${lowRedundancySites} sites run low redundancy (one fryer or fewer) and ${unknownFryerSites} sites still require fryer-count telemetry. Service prioritization should front-load low-redundancy sites before high-impact event windows.`,
   322	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.fryerTracking,
   323	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "fryerTracking", trustedUrls),
   324	      },
   325	    };
   326	
   327	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   328	    const cards: VegasIntelCards = {
   329	      upcomingEvents: {
   330	        ...fallbackCards.upcomingEvents,
   331	        ...rawCards.upcomingEvents,
   332	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   333	          rawCards.upcomingEvents?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   334	          fallbackCards.upcomingEvents.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   335	        provenance: rawCards.upcomingEvents?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.upcomingEvents.provenance,
   336	      },
   337	      aiSalesStrategy: {
   338	        ...fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy,
   339	        ...rawCards.aiSalesStrategy,
   340	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   341	          rawCards.aiSalesStrategy?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   342	          fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   343	        provenance: rawCards.aiSalesStrategy?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy.provenance,
   344	      },
   345	      restaurantAccounts: {
   346	        ...fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts,
   347	        ...rawCards.restaurantAccounts,
   348	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   349	          rawCards.restaurantAccounts?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   350	          fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   351	        provenance:
   352	          rawCards.restaurantAccounts?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts.provenance,
   353	      },
   354	      fryerTracking: {
   355	        ...fallbackCards.fryerTracking,
   356	        ...rawCards.fryerTracking,
   357	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   358	          rawCards.fryerTracking?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   359	          fallbackCards.fryerTracking.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   360	        provenance: rawCards.fryerTracking?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.fryerTracking.provenance,
   361	      },
   362	    };
   363	
   364	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<VegasIntelSnapshot | null> = {
   365	      ok: true,
   366	      data: snapshot,
   367	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   368	      source: ["vegas.events", "vegas.restaurants", "vegas.customer_scores", "vegas.fryers", "vegas.event_impact", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   369	    };
   370	
   371	    return NextResponse.json({
   372	      ...envelope,
   373	      cards,
   374	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   375	    });
   376	  } catch (err) {
   377	    return NextResponse.json(
   378	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   379	      { status: 500 },
   380	    );
   381	  }
   382	}

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba app/api/zl/price-1d/route.ts | sed -n '1,260p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, ZlPriceBar } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	type PriceRow = {
     8	  symbol: string;
     9	  bucket_ts: string;
    10	  open: number | string;
    11	  high: number | string;
    12	  low: number | string;
    13	  close: number | string;
    14	  volume: number | string | null;
    15	};
    16	
    17	function dayKey(tsIso: string): string {
    18	  return tsIso.slice(0, 10);
    19	}
    20	
    21	function buildLatestDatabentoDailyFromHourly(rows: PriceRow[]): ZlPriceBar | null {
    22	  if (rows.length === 0) return null;
    23	
    24	  const latestDay = dayKey(rows[0].bucket_ts);
    25	  const sameDayRows = rows.filter((row) => dayKey(row.bucket_ts) === latestDay);
    26	  if (sameDayRows.length === 0) return null;
    27	
    28	  sameDayRows.sort(
    29	    (a, b) => new Date(a.bucket_ts).getTime() - new Date(b.bucket_ts).getTime(),
    30	  );
    31	
    32	  const parsedRows = sameDayRows
    33	    .map((row) => ({
    34	      open: Number(row.open),
    35	      high: Number(row.high),
    36	      low: Number(row.low),
    37	      close: Number(row.close),
    38	      volume: Number(row.volume ?? 0),
    39	    }))
    40	    .filter(
    41	      (row) =>
    42	        Number.isFinite(row.open) &&
    43	        Number.isFinite(row.high) &&
    44	        Number.isFinite(row.low) &&
    45	        Number.isFinite(row.close),
    46	    );
    47	
    48	  if (parsedRows.length === 0) return null;
    49	
    50	  const open = parsedRows[0].open;
    51	  const close = parsedRows[parsedRows.length - 1].close;
    52	  let high = parsedRows[0].high;
    53	  let low = parsedRows[0].low;
    54	  let volume = 0;
    55	
    56	  for (const row of parsedRows) {
    57	    if (row.high > high) high = row.high;
    58	    if (row.low < low) low = row.low;
    59	    if (Number.isFinite(row.volume)) volume += row.volume;
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  return {
    63	    symbol: "ZL",
    64	    tradeDate: `${latestDay}T00:00:00+00:00`,
    65	    open,
    66	    high,
    67	    low,
    68	    close,
    69	    volume,
    70	  };
    71	}
    72	
    73	export async function GET() {
    74	  try {
    75	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    76	    if (unauthorized) {
    77	      return unauthorized;
    78	    }
    79	
    80	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    81	
    82	    // Supabase Data API commonly enforces a max-row cap (default 1000).
    83	    // Pull newest rows first so we always include the current chart window.
    84	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    85	      .schema("mkt")
    86	      .from("price_1d")
    87	      .select("symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume")
    88	      .eq("symbol", "ZL")
    89	      .order("bucket_ts", { ascending: false })
    90	      .limit(1000);
    91	
    92	    if (error) {
    93	      return NextResponse.json(
    94	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    95	        { status: 500 },
    96	      );
    97	    }
    98	
    99	    const bars: ZlPriceBar[] = (rows ?? [])
   100	      .map((row) => ({
   101	      symbol: row.symbol,
   102	      tradeDate: row.bucket_ts,
   103	      open: Number(row.open),
   104	      high: Number(row.high),
   105	      low: Number(row.low),
   106	      close: Number(row.close),
   107	      volume: Number(row.volume),
   108	      }))
   109	      .sort(
   110	        (a, b) => new Date(a.tradeDate).getTime() - new Date(b.tradeDate).getTime(),
   111	      );
   112	
   113	    const { data: hourlyRows } = await supabase
   114	      .schema("mkt")
   115	      .from("price_1h")
   116	      .select("symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume")
   117	      .eq("symbol", "ZL")
   118	      .order("bucket_ts", { ascending: false })
   119	      .limit(96);
   120	
   121	    const databentoLatest = buildLatestDatabentoDailyFromHourly(
   122	      (hourlyRows ?? []) as PriceRow[],
   123	    );
   124	
   125	    if (databentoLatest) {
   126	      const lastBar = bars[bars.length - 1] ?? null;
   127	      const lastDay = lastBar ? dayKey(lastBar.tradeDate) : null;
   128	      const databentoDay = dayKey(databentoLatest.tradeDate);
   129	
   130	      if (!lastDay || databentoDay > lastDay) {
   131	        bars.push(databentoLatest);
   132	      } else if (databentoDay === lastDay && lastBar) {
   133	        bars[bars.length - 1] = databentoLatest;
   134	      }
   135	    }
   136	
   137	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ZlPriceBar[]> = {
   138	      ok: true,
   139	      data: bars,
   140	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   141	      source: databentoLatest
   142	        ? "mkt.price_1d + Databento (mkt.price_1h latest daily bar)"
   143	        : "mkt.price_1d",
   144	    };
   145	
   146	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
   147	  } catch (err) {
   148	    return NextResponse.json(
   149	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   150	      { status: 500 },
   151	    );
   152	  }
   153	}

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba app/api/zl/forecast/route.ts | sed -n '1,260p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, ForecastSummary } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
     8	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
     9	  7: 30,
    10	  14: 90,
    11	  30: 180,
    12	};
    13	
    14	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    15	  horizon_days: number;
    16	  model_version: string | null;
    17	}): number | null {
    18	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    19	    return row.horizon_days;
    20	  }
    21	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    22	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    23	  }
    24	  return null;
    25	}
    26	
    27	export async function GET() {
    28	  try {
    29	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    30	    if (unauthorized) {
    31	      return unauthorized;
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    35	
    36	    // Get the latest forecast summaries (most recent forecast_date)
    37	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    38	      .schema("forecasts")
    39	      .from("forecast_summary_1d")
    40	      .select("horizon_days, predicted_price, hit_probability, model_version, forecast_date")
    41	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    42	      .limit(20);
    43	
    44	    if (error) {
    45	      return NextResponse.json(
    46	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    47	        { status: 500 },
    48	      );
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    52	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ForecastSummary[]> = {
    53	        ok: true,
    54	        data: [],
    55	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    56	        source: "forecasts.forecast_summary_1d",
    57	      };
    58	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    // Filter to the latest forecast_date only
    62	    const latestDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    63	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === latestDate);
    64	
    65	    const deduped = new Map<number, ForecastSummary>();
    66	    for (const row of latestRows) {
    67	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    68	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    69	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    70	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    71	        horizonDays,
    72	        predictedPrice: Number(row.predicted_price),
    73	        hitProbability: Number(row.hit_probability ?? 0),
    74	        modelVersion: row.model_version,
    75	      });
    76	    }
    77	    const forecasts = [...deduped.values()].sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays);
    78	
    79	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ForecastSummary[]> = {
    80	      ok: true,
    81	      data: forecasts,
    82	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    83	      source: "forecasts.forecast_summary_1d",
    84	    };
    85	
    86	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    87	  } catch (err) {
    88	    return NextResponse.json(
    89	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    90	      { status: 500 },
    91	    );
    92	  }
    93	}
