     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	
     6	type ForecastTarget = {
     7	  id: string;
     8	  horizonDays: number;
     9	  horizonLabel: string;
    10	  priceLow: number;
    11	  priceHigh: number;
    12	  oofPrice: number;
    13	  coveragePct: number | null;
    14	};
    15	
    16	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
    17	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
    18	  7: 30,
    19	  14: 90,
    20	  30: 180,
    21	};
    22	
    23	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    24	  horizon_days: number;
    25	  model_version: string | null;
    26	}): number | null {
    27	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    28	    return row.horizon_days;
    29	  }
    30	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    31	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    32	  }
    33	  return null;
    34	}
    35	
    36	function horizonLabel(days: number): string {
    37	  if (days === 30) return "1M";
    38	  if (days === 90) return "3M";
    39	  if (days === 180) return "6M";
    40	  return `${days}d`;
    41	}
    42	
    43	export async function GET() {
    44	  try {
    45	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    46	    if (unauthorized) {
    47	      return unauthorized;
    48	    }
    49	
    50	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    51	
    52	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    53	      .schema("forecasts")
    54	      .from("target_zones")
    55	      .select("forecast_date, horizon_days, p30, p50, p70, model_version")
    56	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    57	      .limit(60);
    58	
    59	    if (error) {
    60	      return NextResponse.json(
    61	        { error: error.message, asOfDate: null, targets: [] as ForecastTarget[] },
    62	        { status: 500 },
    63	      );
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    67	      return NextResponse.json({
    68	        asOfDate: null,
    69	        targets: [] as ForecastTarget[],
    70	      });
    71	    }
    72	
    73	    const asOfDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    74	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === asOfDate);
    75	    const deduped = new Map<number, ForecastTarget>();
    76	    for (const row of latestRows) {
    77	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    78	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    79	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    80	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    81	        id: `${row.forecast_date}-${horizonDays}`,
    82	        horizonDays,
    83	        horizonLabel: horizonLabel(horizonDays),
    84	        priceLow: Number(row.p30),
    85	        priceHigh: Number(row.p70),
    86	        oofPrice: Number(row.p50),
    87	        coveragePct: null,
    88	      });
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    const targets: ForecastTarget[] = [...deduped.values()]
    92	      .sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays)
    93	      .map((r) => ({
    94	        id: r.id,
    95	        horizonDays: r.horizonDays,
    96	        horizonLabel: r.horizonLabel,
    97	        priceLow: r.priceLow,
    98	        priceHigh: r.priceHigh,
    99	        oofPrice: r.oofPrice,
   100	        coveragePct: r.coveragePct,
   101	      }));
   102	
   103	    return NextResponse.json({
   104	      asOfDate,
   105	      targets,
   106	    });
   107	  } catch (err) {
   108	    return NextResponse.json(
   109	      { error: String(err), asOfDate: null, targets: [] as ForecastTarget[] },
   110	      { status: 500 },
   111	    );
   112	  }
   113	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, TargetZone } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
     8	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
     9	  7: 30,
    10	  14: 90,
    11	  30: 180,
    12	};
    13	
    14	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    15	  horizon_days: number;
    16	  model_version: string | null;
    17	}): number | null {
    18	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    19	    return row.horizon_days;
    20	  }
    21	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    22	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    23	  }
    24	  return null;
    25	}
    26	
    27	export async function GET() {
    28	  try {
    29	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    30	    if (unauthorized) {
    31	      return unauthorized;
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    35	
    36	    // Get the latest target zones (most recent forecast_date, all horizons)
    37	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    38	      .schema("forecasts")
    39	      .from("target_zones")
    40	      .select("horizon_days, p30, p50, p70, model_version, generated_at, forecast_date")
    41	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    42	      .limit(20);
    43	
    44	    if (error) {
    45	      return NextResponse.json(
    46	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    47	        { status: 500 },
    48	      );
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    52	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<TargetZone[]> = {
    53	        ok: true,
    54	        data: [],
    55	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    56	        source: "forecasts.target_zones",
    57	      };
    58	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    // Get the latest forecast_date and filter to only that date's zones
    62	    const latestDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    63	    const latestZones = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === latestDate);
    64	
    65	    const deduped = new Map<number, TargetZone>();
    66	    for (const row of latestZones) {
    67	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    68	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    69	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    70	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    71	        horizonDays,
    72	        p30: Number(row.p30),
    73	        p50: Number(row.p50),
    74	        p70: Number(row.p70),
    75	        generatedAt: row.generated_at,
    76	      });
    77	    }
    78	    const zones = [...deduped.values()].sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays);
    79	
    80	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<TargetZone[]> = {
    81	      ok: true,
    82	      data: zones,
    83	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    84	      source: "forecasts.target_zones",
    85	    };
    86	
    87	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    88	  } catch (err) {
    89	    return NextResponse.json(
    90	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    91	      { status: 500 },
    92	    );
    93	  }
    94	}

     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";

    10	  LineStyle,
    11	  type IChartApi,
    12	  type ISeriesApi,

    14	  type Time,
    15	} from "lightweight-charts";
    16	import type { ZlPriceBar, TargetZone } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
    17	import { calculateFibonacciMultiPeriod, type CandleData, type FibResult } from "@/lib/chart/autofib";
    18	import { PivotLinesPrimitive } from "@/lib/chart/PivotLinesPrimitive";

    21	const CANDLE_THEME = {
    22	  upColor: "#26C6DA",
    23	  downColor: "#FF0000",
    24	  borderUpColor: "transparent",
    25	  borderDownColor: "transparent",
    26	  wickUpColor: "#FFFFFF",

    28	};

    30	const GRID_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)";
    31	const CROSSHAIR_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)";
    32	const LABEL_BG = "rgba(20,10,40,0.9)";
    33	const TEXT_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)";
    34	
    35	const INITIAL_VISIBLE_BARS = 120;
    36	const RIGHT_PADDING_BARS = 16;
    37	const BAR_SPACING = 10;
    38	const MIN_BAR_SPACING = 8;
    39	const REFRESH_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000;
    40	const SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY = false;
    41	const SMA_PERIOD = 200;
    42	const SMA_COLOR = "#FFFFFF";

    44	
    45	function toChartDay(dateStr: string): Time {
    46	  return dateStr.slice(0, 10) as unknown as Time;
    47	}
    48	
    49	function computeVolatility(bars: ZlPriceBar[]): string {
    50	  const recent = bars.slice(-20);
    51	  if (recent.length < 2) return "--";
    52	  const returns: number[] = [];
    53	  for (let i = 1; i < recent.length; i++) {
    54	    returns.push(Math.log(recent[i].close / recent[i - 1].close));
    55	  }
    56	  const mean = returns.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / returns.length;
    57	  const variance =
    58	    returns.reduce((a, b) => a + (b - mean) ** 2, 0) / returns.length;
    59	  return (Math.sqrt(variance) * Math.sqrt(252) * 100).toFixed(1) + "%";
    60	}
    61	
    62	function computeSmaData(candles: CandlestickData<Time>[], period: number): { time: Time; value: number }[] {
    63	  if (candles.length < period) return [];
    64	
    65	  const result: { time: Time; value: number }[] = [];
    66	  let rollingSum = 0;
    67	
    68	  for (let i = 0; i < candles.length; i += 1) {
    69	    rollingSum += candles[i].close;
    70	    if (i >= period) {
    71	      rollingSum -= candles[i - period].close;
    72	    }
    73	    if (i >= period - 1) {
    74	      result.push({
    75	        time: candles[i].time,
    76	        value: rollingSum / period,
    77	      });
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  return result;
    82	}
    83	
    84	export function ZlCandlestickChart({
    85	  height = "70vh",
    86	  targetZones = [],
    87	}: {
    88	  height?: string | number;
    89	  targetZones?: TargetZone[];
    90	}) {
    91	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    92	  const chartRef = useRef<IChartApi | null>(null);
    93	  const seriesRef = useRef<ISeriesApi<"Candlestick"> | null>(null);
    94	  const fitCalledRef = useRef(false);
    95	  const fibLockedRef = useRef<FibResult | null>(null);
    96	
    97	  const [bars, setBars] = useState<ZlPriceBar[]>([]);
    98	  const [lastPrice, setLastPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
    99	  const [priceChange, setPriceChange] = useState(0);
   100	  const [highPrice, setHighPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   101	  const [lowPrice, setLowPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   102	  const [volatility, setVolatility] = useState("--");
   103	
   104	  // Fetch daily bars
   105	  useEffect(() => {
   106	    async function fetchBars() {
   107	      try {
   108	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/price-1d", { cache: "no-store" });
   109	        if (!res.ok) return;
   110	        const json = await res.json();
   111	        if (!json.data || json.data.length === 0) return;
   112	
   113	        const parsed: ZlPriceBar[] = json.data.map(
   114	          (d: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
   115	            symbol: String(d.symbol),
   116	            tradeDate: String(d.tradeDate),
   117	            open: Number(d.open),
   118	            high: Number(d.high),
   119	            low: Number(d.low),
   120	            close: Number(d.close),
   121	            volume: Number(d.volume),
   122	          }),
   123	        );
   124	
   125	        setBars(parsed);
   126	
   127	        const latest = parsed[parsed.length - 1];
   128	        const prev = parsed[parsed.length - 2];
   129	        setLastPrice(latest.close);
   130	        setHighPrice(latest.high);
   131	        setLowPrice(latest.low);
   132	        setVolatility(computeVolatility(parsed));
   133	
   134	        if (prev) {
   135	          setPriceChange(((latest.close - prev.close) / prev.close) * 100);
   136	        }
   137	      } catch {
   138	        /* fail silently — chart stays empty */
   139	      }
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    fetchBars();
   143	    const id = setInterval(fetchBars, REFRESH_MS);
   144	    return () => clearInterval(id);
   145	  }, []);
   146	
   147	  // Create and manage chart
   148	  useEffect(() => {
   149	    if (!containerRef.current || bars.length === 0) return;
   150	
   151	    // Clean up previous
   152	    if (chartRef.current) {
   153	      try {
   154	        chartRef.current.remove();
   155	      } catch {
   156	        /* already disposed */
   157	      }
   158	      chartRef.current = null;
   159	      seriesRef.current = null;
   160	      fitCalledRef.current = false;
   161	    }
   162	
   163	    const chart = createChart(containerRef.current, {
   164	      layout: {
   165	        background: { type: ColorType.Solid, color: "transparent" },
   166	        textColor: TEXT_COLOR,
   167	        fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",
   168	        fontSize: 11,
   169	        attributionLogo: false,
   170	      },
   171	      grid: {
   172	        vertLines: { color: GRID_COLOR },
   173	        horzLines: { color: GRID_COLOR },
   174	      },
   175	      crosshair: {
   176	        vertLine: {
   177	          color: CROSSHAIR_COLOR,
   178	          width: 1,
   179	          style: LineStyle.Solid,
   180	          labelBackgroundColor: LABEL_BG,
   181	        },
   182	        horzLine: {
   183	          color: CROSSHAIR_COLOR,
   184	          width: 1,
   185	          style: LineStyle.Solid,
   186	          labelBackgroundColor: LABEL_BG,
   187	        },
   188	      },
   189	      rightPriceScale: {
   190	        borderColor: "transparent",
   191	        autoScale: true,
   192	        scaleMargins: { top: 0.05, bottom: 0.05 },
   193	      },
   194	      timeScale: {
   195	        borderColor: "transparent",
   196	        timeVisible: false,
   197	        fixLeftEdge: false,
   198	        fixRightEdge: false,
   199	        rightOffset: RIGHT_PADDING_BARS,
   200	        barSpacing: BAR_SPACING,
   201	        minBarSpacing: MIN_BAR_SPACING,
   202	        lockVisibleTimeRangeOnResize: true,
   203	      },
   204	      handleScroll: {
   205	        mouseWheel: false,
   206	        pressedMouseMove: true,
   207	        horzTouchDrag: true,
   208	        vertTouchDrag: false,
   209	      },
   210	      handleScale: {
   211	        mouseWheel: false,
   212	        pinch: true,
   213	        axisPressedMouseMove: { time: true, price: true },
   214	        axisDoubleClickReset: { time: true, price: true },
   215	      },
   216	    });
   217	
   218	    chartRef.current = chart;
   219	
   220	    // Build candlestick data sorted chronologically
   221	    const candleData: CandlestickData<Time>[] = bars
   222	      .map((b) => ({
   223	        time: toChartDay(b.tradeDate),
   224	        open: b.open,
   225	        high: b.high,
   226	        low: b.low,
   227	        close: b.close,
   228	      }))
   229	      .sort((a, b) => String(a.time).localeCompare(String(b.time)));
   230	
   231	    const series = chart.addSeries(CandlestickSeries, {
   232	      upColor: CANDLE_THEME.upColor,
   233	      downColor: CANDLE_THEME.downColor,
   234	      borderUpColor: CANDLE_THEME.borderUpColor,
   235	      borderDownColor: CANDLE_THEME.borderDownColor,
   236	      wickUpColor: CANDLE_THEME.wickUpColor,
   237	      wickDownColor: CANDLE_THEME.wickDownColor,
   238	      priceLineVisible: true,
   239	    });
   240	
   241	    series.setData(candleData);
   242	    seriesRef.current = series;
   243	
   244	    const smaData = computeSmaData(candleData, SMA_PERIOD);
   245	    if (smaData.length > 0) {
   246	      const smaSeries = chart.addSeries(LineSeries, {
   247	        color: SMA_COLOR,
   248	        lineWidth: SMA_WIDTH,
   249	        lineStyle: LineStyle.Solid,
   250	        priceLineVisible: false,
   251	        lastValueVisible: false,
   252	        crosshairMarkerVisible: false,
   253	      });
   254	      smaSeries.setData(smaData);
   255	    }
   256	
   257	    const pivotPrimitive = new PivotLinesPrimitive();
   258	    const forecastTargetsPrimitive = new ForecastTargetsPrimitive();
   259	    series.attachPrimitive(pivotPrimitive);
   260	    if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   261	      series.attachPrimitive(forecastTargetsPrimitive);
   262	    }
   263	
   264	    // Forecast target zones should be projected near the most recent bars, not full-width.
   265	    if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   266	      const targetStartIndex = Math.max(0, candleData.length - 16);
   267	      const targetStartTime = candleData[targetStartIndex]?.time;
   268	      forecastTargetsPrimitive.setTargetZones(targetZones, targetStartTime);
   269	    }
   270	
   271	    // Fib rendering: anchored start, pivot zone fill, and structural-break lock.
   272	    const fibCandles: CandleData[] = bars.map((b, idx) => ({
   273	      time: idx,
   274	      open: b.open,
   275	      high: b.high,
   276	      low: b.low,
   277	      close: b.close,
   278	      volume: b.volume,
   279	    }));
   280	
   281	    const currentPrice = bars[bars.length - 1]?.close;
   282	    let fibResult = fibLockedRef.current;
   283	    if (
   284	      !fibResult ||
   285	      currentPrice == null ||
   286	      currentPrice > fibResult.anchorHigh ||
   287	      currentPrice < fibResult.anchorLow
   288	    ) {
   289	      fibResult = calculateFibonacciMultiPeriod(fibCandles);
   290	      fibLockedRef.current = fibResult;
   291	    }
   292	
   293	    if (fibResult) {
   294	      const anchorIdx = Math.min(
   295	        fibResult.anchorHighBarIndex,
   296	        fibResult.anchorLowBarIndex,
   297	      );
   298	      const anchorStartTime = candleData[anchorIdx]?.time;
   299	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(fibResult, anchorStartTime);
   300	    } else {
   301	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(null);
   302	    }
   303	
   304	    // Set initial visible range: last N bars + right padding
   305	    if (!fitCalledRef.current && candleData.length > 0) {
   306	      const total = candleData.length;
   307	      const visible = Math.min(INITIAL_VISIBLE_BARS, total);
   308	      chart.timeScale().setVisibleLogicalRange({
   309	        from: Math.max(0, total - visible),
   310	        to: total - 1 + RIGHT_PADDING_BARS,
   311	      });
   312	      fitCalledRef.current = true;
   313	    }
   314	
   315	    // Responsive resize
   316	    let disposed = false;
   317	    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
   318	      if (disposed || !entries[0]) return;
   319	      const { width, height: h } = entries[0].contentRect;
   320	      try {
   321	        chart.applyOptions({ width, height: h });
   322	      } catch {
   323	        /* disposed */
   324	      }
   325	    });
   326	    observer.observe(containerRef.current);
   327	
   328	    return () => {
   329	      disposed = true;
   330	      observer.disconnect();
   331	      try {
   332	        if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   333	          series.detachPrimitive(forecastTargetsPrimitive);
   334	        }
   335	        series.detachPrimitive(pivotPrimitive);
   336	        chart.remove();
   337	      } catch {
   338	        /* disposed */
   339	      }
   340	    };

     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
     4	import type { ZlLivePrice } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     5	
     6	const POLL_MS = 30_000; // 30s polling interval
     7	
     8	export function useZlLivePrice() {
     9	  const [live, setLive] = useState<ZlLivePrice | null>(null);
    10	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    11	  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
    12	
    13	  useEffect(() => {
    14	    mountedRef.current = true;
    15	
    16	    async function fetchLive() {
    17	      try {
    18	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/live", { cache: "no-store" });
    19	        if (!res.ok) {
    20	          setError(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
    21	          return;
    22	        }
    23	        const json = await res.json();
    24	        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
    25	        if (json.ok && json.data) {
    26	          setLive(json.data);
    27	          setError(null);
    28	        }
    29	      } catch {
    30	        if (mountedRef.current) setError("Network error");
    31	      }
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    fetchLive();
    35	    const id = setInterval(fetchLive, POLL_MS);
    36	
    37	    return () => {
    38	      mountedRef.current = false;
    39	      clearInterval(id);
    40	    };
    41	  }, []);
    42	
    43	  return { live, error };
    44	}

     1	import type {
     2	  AutoscaleInfo,
     3	  Coordinate,
     4	  IPrimitivePaneRenderer,
     5	  IPrimitivePaneView,
     6	  ISeriesPrimitive,
     7	  SeriesAttachedParameter,

    10	} from "lightweight-charts";
    11	import type { CanvasRenderingTarget2D } from "fancy-canvas";
    12	
    13	import type { TargetZone } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
    14	
    15	type TargetLine = {
    16	  price: number;
    17	  color: string;
    18	  lineWidth: number;
    19	  lineDash: number[];
    20	};
    21	
    22	type TargetBand = {
    23	  topPrice: number;
    24	  bottomPrice: number;
    25	  color: string;
    26	  opacity: number;
    27	};
    28	
    29	const TARGET_COLORS = {
    30	  p30: "#EF4444",
    31	  p50: "#EF7300",
    32	  p70: "#FFFFFF",
    33	  band: "#26C6DA",
    34	} as const;
    35	
    36	class ForecastTargetsRenderer implements IPrimitivePaneRenderer {
    37	  private _lines: TargetLine[] = [];
    38	  private _bands: TargetBand[] = [];
    39	  private _priceToY: ((price: number) => Coordinate | null) | null = null;
    40	  private _startX: number | null = null;
    41	
    42	  update(
    43	    lines: TargetLine[],
    44	    bands: TargetBand[],
    45	    priceToY: (price: number) => Coordinate | null,
    46	    startX: number | null,
    47	  ) {
    48	    this._lines = lines;
    49	    this._bands = bands;
    50	    this._priceToY = priceToY;
    51	    this._startX = startX;
    52	  }
    53	
    54	  draw(target: CanvasRenderingTarget2D): void {
    55	    target.useMediaCoordinateSpace(({ context: ctx, mediaSize }) => {
    56	      if (!this._priceToY) return;
    57	
    58	      const x0 = this._startX != null ? Math.max(0, this._startX) : 0;
    59	      if (x0 >= mediaSize.width) return;
    60	
    61	      for (const band of this._bands) {
    62	        const topY = this._priceToY(band.topPrice);
    63	        const bottomY = this._priceToY(band.bottomPrice);
    64	        if (topY == null || bottomY == null) continue;
    65	
    66	        const y0 = Math.min(topY, bottomY);
    67	        const h = Math.abs(bottomY - topY);
    68	        if (h <= 0) continue;
    69	
    70	        ctx.fillStyle = hexToRgba(band.color, band.opacity);
    71	        ctx.fillRect(x0, y0, mediaSize.width - x0, h);
    72	      }
    73	
    74	      for (const line of this._lines) {
    75	        const y = this._priceToY(line.price);
    76	        if (y == null) continue;
    77	        if (y < -30 || y > mediaSize.height + 30) continue;
    78	
    79	        ctx.strokeStyle = line.color;
    80	        ctx.lineWidth = line.lineWidth;
    81	        ctx.setLineDash(line.lineDash);
    82	        ctx.beginPath();
    83	        ctx.moveTo(x0, y);
    84	        ctx.lineTo(mediaSize.width, y);
    85	        ctx.stroke();
    86	      }
    87	    });
    88	  }
    89	}
    90	
    91	class ForecastTargetsPaneView implements IPrimitivePaneView {

    95	    lines: TargetLine[],
    96	    bands: TargetBand[],
    97	    priceToY: (price: number) => Coordinate | null,
    98	    startX: number | null,
    99	  ) {
   100	    this._renderer.update(lines, bands, priceToY, startX);
   101	  }
   102	
   103	  zOrder(): "bottom" {
   104	    return "bottom";
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  renderer(): IPrimitivePaneRenderer {
   108	    return this._renderer;
   109	  }

   112	export class ForecastTargetsPrimitive implements ISeriesPrimitive<Time> {
   113	  private _targetZones: TargetZone[] = [];
   114	  private _startTime: Time | null = null;
   115	  private _paneView = new ForecastTargetsPaneView();
   116	  private _attachedParams: SeriesAttachedParameter<Time, SeriesType> | null = null;
   117	
   118	  setTargetZones(targetZones: TargetZone[], startTime?: Time) {
   119	    this._targetZones = targetZones;
   120	    this._startTime = startTime ?? null;
   121	    if (this._attachedParams) {
   122	      this._attachedParams.requestUpdate();
   123	    }
   124	  }
   125	
   126	  attached(param: SeriesAttachedParameter<Time, SeriesType>) {
   127	    this._attachedParams = param;
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  detached() {
   131	    this._attachedParams = null;
   132	  }
   133	
   134	  updateAllViews() {
   135	    if (!this._attachedParams || this._targetZones.length === 0) {
   136	      this._paneView.update([], [], () => null, null);
   137	      return;
   138	    }
   139	
   140	    const { series, chart } = this._attachedParams;
   141	    const priceToY = (price: number) => series.priceToCoordinate(price);
   142	    const timeScale = chart.timeScale();
   143	
   144	    let startX: number | null = null;
   145	    if (this._startTime != null) {
   146	      const x = timeScale.timeToCoordinate(this._startTime);
   147	      startX = x != null ? x : 0;
   148	    }
   149	
   150	    const zones = this._targetZones
   151	      .slice()
   152	      .sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays);
   153	
   154	    const bands: TargetBand[] = zones.map((zone, idx) => ({
   155	      topPrice: Math.max(zone.p70, zone.p30),
   156	      bottomPrice: Math.min(zone.p70, zone.p30),
   157	      color: TARGET_COLORS.band,
   158	      opacity: Math.max(0.02, 0.05 - idx * 0.01),
   159	    }));
   160	
   161	    const lines: TargetLine[] = [];
   162	    for (const zone of zones) {
   163	      lines.push({
   164	        price: zone.p30,
   165	        color: TARGET_COLORS.p30,
   166	        lineWidth: 1,
   167	        lineDash: [4, 4],
   168	      });
   169	      lines.push({
   170	        price: zone.p50,
   171	        color: TARGET_COLORS.p50,
   172	        lineWidth: 1.5,
   173	        lineDash: [],
   174	      });
   175	      lines.push({
   176	        price: zone.p70,
   177	        color: TARGET_COLORS.p70,
   178	        lineWidth: 1,
   179	        lineDash: [],
   180	      });
   181	    }
   182	
   183	    this._paneView.update(lines, bands, priceToY, startX);
   184	  }
   185	
   186	  paneViews(): readonly IPrimitivePaneView[] {
   187	    return [this._paneView];
   188	  }
   189	
   190	  autoscaleInfo(): AutoscaleInfo | null {
   191	    return null;
   192	  }
   193	}
   194	
   195	function hexToRgba(hex: string, alpha: number): string {
   196	  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
   197	  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
   198	  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
   199	  return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
   200	}

     1	/**
     2	 * Lightweight Charts Series Primitive: Pivot/Fibonacci Structure
     3	 *
     4	 * Draw behavior:
     5	 * - 10 fib levels (0, .236, .382, .5, .618, .786, 1, 1.236, 1.618, 2.0)
     6	 * - lines start at anchor and extend right
     7	 * - pivot zone fill between .382 and .618
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type {
    11	  ISeriesPrimitive,
    12	  SeriesAttachedParameter,
    13	  Time,
    14	  SeriesType,
    15	  IPrimitivePaneView,
    16	  IPrimitivePaneRenderer,
    17	  ISeriesPrimitiveAxisView,
    18	  AutoscaleInfo,
    19	  Coordinate,
    20	} from "lightweight-charts";
    21	import type { CanvasRenderingTarget2D } from "fancy-canvas";
    22	import type { FibResult } from "@/lib/chart/autofib";
    23	
    24	const COLORS = {
    25	  anchor: "#F3F4F6",
    26	  retracement: "#E5E7EB",
    27	  pivot: "#E5E7EB",
    28	  target: "#22D3EE",
    29	  zone: "#9CA3AF",
    30	} as const;
    31	
    32	const ALL_LEVELS: { ratio: number; label: string; color: string; width: number; lineDash?: number[] }[] = [
    33	  { ratio: 0, label: "ZERO", color: COLORS.anchor, width: 1.5 },
    34	  { ratio: 0.236, label: ".236", color: COLORS.retracement, width: 1 },
    35	  { ratio: 0.382, label: ".382", color: COLORS.retracement, width: 1 },
    36	  { ratio: 0.5, label: "Pivot", color: COLORS.pivot, width: 1, lineDash: [5, 5] },
    37	  { ratio: 0.618, label: ".618", color: COLORS.retracement, width: 1 },
    38	  { ratio: 0.786, label: ".786", color: COLORS.target, width: 1.25 },
    39	  { ratio: 1.0, label: "1", color: COLORS.target, width: 1.5 },
    40	  { ratio: 1.236, label: "TARGET 1", color: COLORS.target, width: 1.25 },
    41	  { ratio: 1.618, label: "TARGET 2", color: COLORS.target, width: 1.25 },
    42	  { ratio: 2.0, label: "TARGET 3", color: COLORS.target, width: 1.25 },
    43	];
    44	
    45	const PIVOT_FILL_OPACITY = 0.22;
    46	
    47	interface FibElement {
    48	  price: number;
    49	  label: string;
    50	  color: string;
    51	  lineWidth: number;
    52	  lineDash: number[];
    53	}
    54	
    55	interface ZoneBand {
    56	  topPrice: number;
    57	  botPrice: number;
    58	  color: string;
    59	}
    60	
    61	class PivotRenderer implements IPrimitivePaneRenderer {
    62	  private _elements: FibElement[] = [];
    63	  private _zone: ZoneBand | null = null;
    64	  private _priceToY: ((price: number) => Coordinate | null) | null = null;
    65	  private _anchorStartX: number | null = null;
    66	
    67	  update(
    68	    elements: FibElement[],
    69	    zone: ZoneBand | null,
    70	    priceToY: (price: number) => Coordinate | null,
    71	    anchorStartX: number | null,
    72	  ) {
    73	    this._elements = elements;
    74	    this._zone = zone;
    75	    this._priceToY = priceToY;
    76	    this._anchorStartX = anchorStartX;
    77	  }
    78	
    79	  draw(target: CanvasRenderingTarget2D): void {
    80	    target.useMediaCoordinateSpace(({ context: ctx, mediaSize }) => {
    81	      if (!this._priceToY) return;
    82	
    83	      const x0 = this._anchorStartX != null ? Math.max(0, this._anchorStartX) : 0;
    84	      if (x0 >= mediaSize.width) return;
    85	
    86	      if (this._zone) {
    87	        const topY = this._priceToY(this._zone.topPrice);
    88	        const botY = this._priceToY(this._zone.botPrice);
    89	        if (topY != null && botY != null) {
    90	          const y0 = Math.min(topY, botY);
    91	          const h = Math.abs(botY - topY);
    92	          ctx.fillStyle = hexToRgba(this._zone.color, PIVOT_FILL_OPACITY);
    93	          ctx.fillRect(x0, y0, mediaSize.width - x0, h);
    94	        }
    95	      }
    96	
    97	      for (const el of this._elements) {
    98	        const y = this._priceToY(el.price);
    99	        if (y == null) continue;
   100	        if (y < -30 || y > mediaSize.height + 30) continue;
   101	
   102	        ctx.strokeStyle = hexToRgba(el.color, 0.9);
   103	        ctx.lineWidth = el.lineWidth;
   104	        ctx.setLineDash(el.lineDash);
   105	        ctx.beginPath();
   106	        ctx.moveTo(x0, y);
   107	        ctx.lineTo(mediaSize.width, y);
   108	        ctx.stroke();
   109	      }
   110	    });
   111	  }
   112	}

   114	class PivotPaneView implements IPrimitivePaneView {

   135	class PivotAxisView implements ISeriesPrimitiveAxisView {
   136	  private _label: string;
   137	  private _coord: number;
   138	  private _color: string;

   140	  constructor(label: string, coord: number, color: string) {

   171	export class PivotLinesPrimitive implements ISeriesPrimitive<Time> {
   172	  private _fibResult: FibResult | null = null;
   173	  private _anchorStartTime: Time | null = null;
   174	  private _paneView = new PivotPaneView();
   175	  private _axisViews: PivotAxisView[] = [];
   176	  private _attachedParams: SeriesAttachedParameter<Time, SeriesType> | null = null;
   177	
   178	  setFibResult(result: FibResult | null, anchorStartTime?: Time) {
   179	    this._fibResult = result;
   180	    this._anchorStartTime = anchorStartTime ?? null;
   181	    if (this._attachedParams) {
   182	      this._attachedParams.requestUpdate();
   183	    }
   184	  }
   185	
   186	  attached(param: SeriesAttachedParameter<Time, SeriesType>) {
   187	    this._attachedParams = param;
   188	  }
   189	
   190	  detached() {
   191	    this._attachedParams = null;
   192	  }
   193	
   194	  updateAllViews() {
   195	    if (!this._attachedParams || !this._fibResult) {
   196	      this._paneView.update([], null, () => null, null);
   197	      this._axisViews = [];
   198	      return;
   199	    }
   200	
   201	    const { series, chart } = this._attachedParams;
   202	    const priceToY = (price: number) => series.priceToCoordinate(price);
   203	    const timeScale = chart.timeScale();
   204	
   205	    let anchorStartX: number | null = null;
   206	    if (this._anchorStartTime != null) {
   207	      const x = timeScale.timeToCoordinate(this._anchorStartTime);
   208	      anchorStartX = x != null ? x : 0;
   209	    }
   210	
   211	    const fib = this._fibResult;
   212	    const range = fib.anchorHigh - fib.anchorLow;
   213	    if (range <= 0) {
   214	      this._paneView.update([], null, priceToY, anchorStartX);
   215	      this._axisViews = [];
   216	      return;
   217	    }
   218	
   219	    const base = fib.isBullish ? fib.anchorLow : fib.anchorHigh;
   220	    const dir = fib.isBullish ? 1 : -1;
   221	    const priceAt = (ratio: number) => base + dir * range * ratio;
   222	
   223	    const elements: FibElement[] = [];
   224	    for (const level of ALL_LEVELS) {
   225	      const price = priceAt(level.ratio);
   226	      elements.push({
   227	        price,
   228	        label: level.label,
   229	        color: level.color,
   230	        lineWidth: level.width,
   231	        lineDash: level.lineDash ?? [],
   232	      });
   233	    }
   234	
   235	    const zoneBand: ZoneBand = {
   236	      topPrice: Math.max(priceAt(0.382), priceAt(0.618)),
   237	      botPrice: Math.min(priceAt(0.382), priceAt(0.618)),
   238	      color: COLORS.zone,
   239	    };
   240	
   241	    this._paneView.update(elements, zoneBand, priceToY, anchorStartX);
   242	    this._axisViews = [];
   243	  }
   244	
   245	  paneViews(): readonly IPrimitivePaneView[] {
   246	    return [this._paneView];
   247	  }
   248	
   249	  priceAxisViews(): readonly ISeriesPrimitiveAxisView[] {
   250	    return this._axisViews;
   251	  }
   252	
   253	  autoscaleInfo(): AutoscaleInfo | null {
   254	    return null;
   255	  }
   256	}
   257	
   258	function hexToRgba(hex: string, alpha: number): string {
   259	  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
   260	  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
   261	  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
   262	  return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
   263	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	import { Activity, Brain, Clock3, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react"
     5	
     6	import { BackendShell } from "@/components/backend-shell"
     7	import type { AiCardContent } from "@/lib/contracts/ai-card"
     8	import type { ApiEnvelope, SentimentOverview, ZlLivePrice } from "@/lib/contracts/api"
     9	
    10	type BiasTone = "bullish" | "bearish" | "neutral"
    11	
    12	type SentimentCardContent = Pick<AiCardContent, "title" | "body"> & Partial<AiCardContent>
    13	
    14	type SentimentCards = {
    15	  narratives: SentimentCardContent[]
    16	  positioningFlow: SentimentCardContent
    17	  headlineFlow: SentimentCardContent
    18	}
    19	
    20	function normalizeBias(raw: string): BiasTone {
    21	  const value = raw.trim().toLowerCase()
    22	  if (value.includes("bull")) return "bullish"
    23	  if (value.includes("bear")) return "bearish"
    24	  return "neutral"
    25	}
    26	
    27	function biasStyle(tone: BiasTone): { label: string; chip: string; text: string } {
    28	  if (tone === "bullish") {
    29	    return {
    30	      label: "Bullish",
    31	      chip: "bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/20",
    32	      text: "text-emerald-400",
    33	    }
    34	  }
    35	  if (tone === "bearish") {
    36	    return {
    37	      label: "Bearish",
    38	      chip: "bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20",
    39	      text: "text-red-400",
    40	    }
    41	  }
    42	  return {
    43	    label: "Neutral",
    44	    chip: "bg-slate-500/10 border-slate-500/20",
    45	    text: "text-slate-300",
    46	  }
    47	}
    48	
    49	function scoreLabel(score: number): string {
    50	  if (score >= 25) return "Positive Momentum"
    51	  if (score <= -25) return "Defensive Momentum"
    52	  return "Balanced Momentum"
    53	}
    54	
    55	function scoreTextColor(score: number): string {
    56	  if (score >= 25) return "text-emerald-400"
    57	  if (score <= -25) return "text-red-400"
    58	  return "text-amber-400"
    59	}
    60	
    61	function formatTimestamp(value: string): string {
    62	  const parsed = new Date(value)
    63	  if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return value
    64	  return parsed.toLocaleString()
    65	}
    66	
    67	function MetricCard({
    68	  title,
    69	  value,
    70	  subtext,
    71	  icon: Icon,
    72	}: {
    73	  title: string
    74	  value: string | number
    75	  subtext: string
    76	  icon: typeof Activity
    77	}) {
    78	  return (
    79	    <div className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300">
    80	      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
    81	        <div className="text-xs text-white uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">{title}</div>
    82	        <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" />
    83	      </div>
    84	      <div className="text-3xl font-bold font-mono text-white mb-1">{value}</div>
    85	      <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">{subtext}</div>
    86	    </div>
    87	  )
    88	}
    89	
    90	export default function SentimentPage() {
    91	  const [overview, setOverview] = useState<SentimentOverview | null>(null)
    92	  const [live, setLive] = useState<ZlLivePrice | null>(null)
    93	  const [cards, setCards] = useState<SentimentCards | null>(null)
    94	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    95	
    96	  useEffect(() => {
    97	    let active = true
    98	
    99	    async function load() {
   100	      try {
   101	        const [overviewRes, liveRes] = await Promise.all([
   102	          fetch("/api/sentiment/overview", { cache: "no-store" }),
   103	          fetch("/api/zl/live", { cache: "no-store" }),
   104	        ])
   105	
   106	        const overviewBody = (await overviewRes.json()) as ApiEnvelope<SentimentOverview | null> & {
   107	          cards?: SentimentCards
   108	          error?: string
   109	        }
   110	        const liveBody = (await liveRes.json()) as ApiEnvelope<ZlLivePrice | null> & {
   111	          error?: string
   112	        }
   113	
   114	        if (!active) return
   115	
   116	        if (overviewRes.ok && overviewBody.ok && overviewBody.data) {
   117	          setOverview(overviewBody.data)
   118	          setCards(overviewBody.cards ?? null)
   119	        } else {
   120	          setOverview(null)
   121	          setCards(null)
   122	        }
   123	
   124	        if (liveRes.ok && liveBody.ok && liveBody.data) {
   125	          setLive(liveBody.data)
   126	        } else {
   127	          setLive(null)
   128	        }
   129	      } catch {
   130	        if (active) {
   131	          setOverview(null)
   132	          setLive(null)
   133	          setCards(null)
   134	        }
   135	      } finally {
   136	        if (active) setLoading(false)
   137	      }
   138	    }
   139	
   140	    void load()
   141	    return () => {
   142	      active = false
   143	    }
   144	  }, [])
   145	
   146	  const sentimentScore = overview?.sentimentScore ?? 0
   147	  const clampedScore = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, sentimentScore))
   148	  const meterPercent = ((clampedScore + 100) / 200) * 100
   149	  const cotTone = normalizeBias(overview?.cotBias ?? "neutral")
   150	  const cot = biasStyle(cotTone)
   151	  const scoreLabelText = scoreLabel(clampedScore)
   152	
   153	  const narrativeItems = useMemo(() => {
   154	    if (cards?.narratives?.length) return cards.narratives
   155	    return [
   156	      {
   157	        title: "Macro Narrative",
   158	        body: "Hard stop: macro narrative unavailable because verified sentiment inputs were not returned.",
   159	      },
   160	      {
   161	        title: "Flow Narrative",
   162	        body: "Hard stop: flow narrative unavailable because verified sentiment inputs were not returned.",
   163	      },
   164	      {
   165	        title: "Procurement Narrative",
   166	        body: "Hard stop: procurement narrative unavailable because verified sentiment inputs were not returned.",
   167	      },
   168	    ]
   169	  }, [cards])
   170	
   171	  return (
   172	    <BackendShell>
   173	      <div className="w-full space-y-8">
   174	        <header className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4 pb-4 border-b border-white/5">
   175	          <div>
   176	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
   177	              <Brain className="w-8 h-8" />
   178	              <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white">
   179	                Market Psychology
   180	              </h1>
   181	            </div>
   182	            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm font-mono">
   183	              Quantitative sentiment, narrative clustering, and positioning context
   184	            </p>
   185	          </div>
   186	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   187	            <span className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border ${cot.chip} ${cot.text}`}>
   188	              CoT Bias {cot.label}
   189	            </span>
   190	            {!loading && overview?.updatedAt && (
   191	              <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 font-mono">
   192	                Updated {formatTimestamp(overview.updatedAt)}
   193	              </span>
   194	            )}
   195	          </div>
   196	        </header>
   197	
   198	        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
   199	          <MetricCard
   200	            title="AI Refresh"
   201	            value={overview?.updatedAt ? formatTimestamp(overview.updatedAt) : "—"}
   202	            subtext="Daily 07:00 ET target refresh cadence"
   203	            icon={Clock3}
   204	          />
   205	          <MetricCard
   206	            title="Sentiment Score"
   207	            value={overview ? `${clampedScore > 0 ? "+" : ""}${clampedScore}` : "—"}
   208	            subtext="Pipeline-backed aggregate score"
   209	            icon={TrendingUp}
   210	          />
   211	          <MetricCard
   212	            title="CoT Bias"
   213	            value={overview?.cotBias ?? "—"}
   214	            subtext="Latest managed-money positioning bias"
   215	            icon={Activity}
   216	          />
   217	          <MetricCard
   218	            title="ZL Live"
   219	            value={live?.price != null ? live.price.toFixed(2) : "—"}
   220	            subtext={live?.observedAt ? `Observed ${formatTimestamp(live.observedAt)}` : "Awaiting live price feed"}
   221	            icon={Brain}
   222	          />
   223	        </div>
   224	
   225	        <section className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300">
   226	          <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-widest border-l-2 border-cyan-500 pl-3 mb-8">
   227	            Sentiment Composite
   228	          </div>
   229	
   230	          {loading ? (
   231	            <div className="space-y-4">
   232	              <div className="h-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 animate-pulse" />
   233	              <div className="h-12 rounded-lg bg-white/5 animate-pulse" />
   234	            </div>
   235	          ) : (
   236	            <>
   237	              <div className="w-full mb-4">
   238	                <div className="h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   239	                  <div
   240	                    className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700"
   241	                    style={{
   242	                      width: `${meterPercent}%`,
   243	                      background:
   244	                        clampedScore >= 25
   245	                          ? "#22c55e"
   246	                          : clampedScore <= -25
   247	                            ? "#ef4444"
   248	                            : "#eab308",
   249	                    }}
   250	                  />
   251	                </div>
   252	              </div>
   253	              <div className={`text-2xl font-bold ${scoreTextColor(clampedScore)}`}>
   254	                {overview ? `${clampedScore > 0 ? "+" : ""}${clampedScore}` : "No current signal"}
   255	              </div>
   256	              <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1">{scoreLabelText}</div>
   257	            </>
   258	          )}
   259	        </section>
   260	
   261	        <section className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300">
   262	          <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-widest border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3 mb-8">
   263	            Narrative Matrix

     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"

     6	import { BackendShell } from "@/components/backend-shell"

     8	import type { ApiEnvelope, LegislationItem } from "@/lib/contracts/api"
     9	
    10	type LegislationCards = {
    11	  feedSummary: AiCardContent
    12	  sourcePressure: AiCardContent
    13	  tagPressure: AiCardContent
    14	}
    15	
    16	function safeDate(value: string): Date | null {
    17	  const parsed = new Date(value)
    18	  return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed
    19	}
    20	
    21	function formatDisplayDate(value: string): string {
    22	  const parsed = safeDate(value)
    23	  return parsed ? parsed.toLocaleDateString() : value
    24	}
    25	
    26	function hoursAgo(value: string, nowMs: number | null): string {
    27	  const parsed = safeDate(value)
    28	  if (!parsed || nowMs === null) return "Unknown"
    29	  const deltaMs = nowMs - parsed.getTime()
    30	  if (deltaMs < 0) return "Now"
    31	  if (deltaMs < 3_600_000) return "Now"
    32	  const hours = Math.floor(deltaMs / 3_600_000)
    33	  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`
    34	  return `${Math.floor(hours / 24)}d ago`
    35	}
    36	
    37	function MetricCard({
    38	  title,
    39	  value,
    40	  subtext,
    41	  icon: Icon,
    42	}: {
    43	  title: string
    44	  value: string | number
    45	  subtext: string
    46	  icon: typeof Activity
    47	}) {
    48	  return (
    49	    <div className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300">
    50	      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
    51	        <div className="text-xs text-white uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">
    52	          {title}
    53	        </div>
    54	        <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" />
    55	      </div>
    56	      <div className="text-3xl font-bold font-mono text-white mb-1">{value}</div>
    57	      <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">{subtext}</div>
    58	    </div>
    59	  )
    60	}

    62	export default function LegislationPage() {
    63	  const [items, setItems] = useState<LegislationItem[]>([])
    64	  const [cards, setCards] = useState<LegislationCards | null>(null)
    65	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    66	  const [clientNow, setClientNow] = useState<number | null>(null)
    67	
    68	  useEffect(() => {
    69	    let active = true
    70	
    71	    async function load() {
    72	      try {
    73	        const res = await fetch("/api/legislation/feed", { cache: "no-store" })
    74	        const body = (await res.json()) as ApiEnvelope<LegislationItem[]> & {
    75	          cards?: LegislationCards
    76	          error?: string
    77	        }
    78	        if (!active) return
    79	        if (res.ok && body.ok && Array.isArray(body.data)) {
    80	          setItems(body.data)
    81	          setCards(body.cards ?? null)
    82	        } else {
    83	          setItems([])
    84	          setCards(null)
    85	        }
    86	      } catch {
    87	        if (active) {
    88	          setItems([])
    89	          setCards(null)
    90	        }
    91	      } finally {
    92	        if (active) setLoading(false)
    93	      }
    94	    }
    95	
    96	    void load()
    97	    return () => {
    98	      active = false
    99	    }
   100	  }, [])
   101	
   102	  useEffect(() => {
   103	    setClientNow(Date.now())
   104	  }, [])
   105	
   106	  const analytics = useMemo(() => {
   107	    const timestamps = items
   108	      .map((item) => safeDate(item.publishedAt)?.getTime() ?? null)
   109	      .filter((ts): ts is number => ts !== null)
   110	
   111	    const last24h =
   112	      clientNow === null ? 0 : timestamps.filter((ts) => clientNow - ts <= 86_400_000).length
   113	    const last7d =
   114	      clientNow === null ? 0 : timestamps.filter((ts) => clientNow - ts <= 604_800_000).length
   115	    const dailyBaseline = last7d > 0 ? last7d / 7 : 0
   116	    const pulseRatio = dailyBaseline > 0 ? last24h / dailyBaseline : 0
   117	
   118	    const sourceMap = new Map<string, number>()
   119	    const tagMap = new Map<string, number>()
   120	
   121	    for (const item of items) {
   122	      sourceMap.set(item.source, (sourceMap.get(item.source) ?? 0) + 1)
   123	      for (const tag of item.tags ?? []) {
   124	        tagMap.set(tag, (tagMap.get(tag) ?? 0) + 1)
   125	      }
   126	    }
   127	
   128	    const sources = Array.from(sourceMap.entries())
   129	      .map(([source, count]) => ({ source, count }))
   130	      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
   131	    const tags = Array.from(tagMap.entries())
   132	      .map(([tag, count]) => ({ tag, count }))
   133	      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
   134	
   135	    return {
   136	      last24h,
   137	      pulseRatio,
   138	      uniqueSources: sourceMap.size,
   139	      uniqueTags: tagMap.size,
   140	      sources,
   141	      tags,
   142	      topSourceCount: sources[0]?.count ?? 0,
   143	      topTagCount: tags[0]?.count ?? 0,
   144	    }
   145	  }, [items, clientNow])
   146	
   147	  return (
   148	    <BackendShell>
   149	      <div className="w-full space-y-8">
   150	        <header className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
   151	          <div>
   152	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
   153	              <Gavel className="w-8 h-8" />
   154	              <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white">
   155	                Policy Intelligence
   156	              </h1>
   157	            </div>

   159	              Federal regulations, executive actions, and congressional activity affecting soybean oil procurement
   160	            </p>
   161	          </div>
   162	        </header>
   163

   165	          <div className="p-3 rounded-xl border bg-amber-500/5 border-amber-500/20 flex items-center gap-3">
   166	            <div className="relative flex h-2.5 w-2.5 text-amber-400">
   167	              <span className="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-current opacity-75" />

exec
/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba components/viz/NeuralSphere.tsx | sed -n '1,420p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     4	import * as THREE from 'three';
     5	
     6	interface NeuralSphereProps {
     7	  size?: number;
     8	  color?: string;
     9	  particleColor?: string;
    10	  wireframeOpacity?: number;
    11	  particleCount?: number;
    12	  rotationSpeed?: number;
    13	}
    14	
    15	/**
    16	 * NeuralSphere - A rotating neural network sphere visualization
    17	 * Based on AlgoSensei template design
    18	 */
    19	export function NeuralSphere({ 
    20	  size = 400,
    21	  color = '#2962ff',
    22	  particleColor = '#00d4ff',
    23	  wireframeOpacity = 0.3,
    24	  particleCount = 200,
    25	  rotationSpeed = 0.002,
    26	}: NeuralSphereProps) {
    27	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    28	  const rendererRef = useRef<THREE.WebGLRenderer | null>(null);
    29	
    30	  useEffect(() => {
    31	    const container = containerRef.current;
    32	    if (!container) return;
    33	
    34	    // Scene setup
    35	    const scene = new THREE.Scene();
    36	    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(75, 1, 0.1, 1000);
    37	    camera.position.z = 2.5;
    38	
    39	    // Renderer
    40	    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({
    41	      antialias: true,
    42	      alpha: true
    43	    });
    44	    renderer.setSize(size, size);
    45	    renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
    46	    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement);
    47	    rendererRef.current = renderer;
    48	
    49	    // Convert hex to THREE color
    50	    const mainColor = new THREE.Color(color);
    51	    const pColor = new THREE.Color(particleColor);
    52	
    53	    // Wireframe sphere
    54	    const sphereGeometry = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(1, 2);
    55	    const wireframeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    56	      color: mainColor,
    57	      wireframe: true,
    58	      transparent: true,
    59	      opacity: wireframeOpacity,
    60	    });
    61	    const sphere = new THREE.Mesh(sphereGeometry, wireframeMaterial);
    62	    scene.add(sphere);
    63	
    64	    // Inner glow sphere
    65	    const innerGeometry = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.95, 2);
    66	    const innerMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    67	      color: pColor,
    68	      wireframe: true,
    69	      transparent: true,
    70	      opacity: wireframeOpacity * 0.5,
    71	    });
    72	    const innerSphere = new THREE.Mesh(innerGeometry, innerMaterial);
    73	    scene.add(innerSphere);
    74	
    75	    // Floating particles
    76	    const particlesGeometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    77	    const positions = new Float32Array(particleCount * 3);
    78	    
    79	    for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
    80	      const theta = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    81	      const phi = Math.acos(2 * Math.random() - 1);
    82	      const r = 1.2 + Math.random() * 0.5;
    83	      
    84	      positions[i * 3] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta);
    85	      positions[i * 3 + 1] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta);
    86	      positions[i * 3 + 2] = r * Math.cos(phi);
    87	    }
    88	    
    89	    particlesGeometry.setAttribute('position', new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions, 3));
    90	    
    91	    const particlesMaterial = new THREE.PointsMaterial({
    92	      color: pColor,
    93	      size: 0.02,
    94	      transparent: true,
    95	      opacity: 0.6,
    96	    });
    97	    
    98	    const particles = new THREE.Points(particlesGeometry, particlesMaterial);
    99	    scene.add(particles);
   100	
   101	    // Animation
   102	    let animationId: number;
   103	    const animate = () => {
   104	      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
   105	      
   106	      sphere.rotation.x += rotationSpeed;
   107	      sphere.rotation.y += rotationSpeed * 1.5;
   108	      
   109	      innerSphere.rotation.x -= rotationSpeed * 0.5;
   110	      innerSphere.rotation.y -= rotationSpeed;
   111	      
   112	      particles.rotation.y += rotationSpeed * 0.5;
   113	      
   114	      renderer.render(scene, camera);
   115	    };
   116	    animate();
   117	
   118	    // Cleanup
   119	    return () => {
   120	      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
   121	      renderer.dispose();
   122	      sphereGeometry.dispose();
   123	      wireframeMaterial.dispose();
   124	      innerGeometry.dispose();
   125	      innerMaterial.dispose();
   126	      particlesGeometry.dispose();
   127	      particlesMaterial.dispose();
   128	      if (container && renderer.domElement) {
   129	        container.removeChild(renderer.domElement);
   130	      }
   131	    };
   132	  }, [size, color, particleColor, wireframeOpacity, particleCount, rotationSpeed]);
   133	
   134	  return (
   135	    <div 
   136	      ref={containerRef} 
   137	      style={{ 
   138	        width: size, 
   139	        height: size,
   140	        display: 'flex',
   141	        alignItems: 'center',
   142	        justifyContent: 'center',
   143	      }} 
   144	    />
   145	  );
   146	}

    17	function TopHeader() {
    18	  const pathname = usePathname()
    19	  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false)
    20	
    21	  return (
    22	    <header
    23	      className="fixed top-0 w-full z-[1000] border-b border-white/10"
    24	      style={{
    25	        background: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95)",
    26	        backdropFilter: "blur(10px)",
    27	      }}
    28	    >
    29	      <nav
    30	        className="flex w-full items-center justify-between"
    31	        style={{ padding: "20px 40px" }}
    32	      >
    33	        {/* Logo */}
    34	        <Link href="/">
    35	          <Image
    36	            src="/logo-dashboard.svg"
    37	            alt="ZINC Fusion"
    38	            width={400}
    39	            height={80}
    40	            priority
    41	            className="h-auto"
    42	            style={{ maxWidth: 280 }}
    43	          />
    44	        </Link>
    45	
    46	        {/* Desktop Nav Links */}
    47	        <ul className="hidden md:flex items-center" style={{ gap: 40, listStyle: "none" }}>
    48	          {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
    49	            const isActive = pathname === item.href || pathname.startsWith(`${item.href}/`)
    50	            return (
    51	              <li key={item.href}>
    52	                <Link
    53	                  href={item.href}
    54	                  className="text-white font-semibold transition-opacity duration-300"
    55	                  style={{
    56	                    fontSize: 13,
    57	                    letterSpacing: 0.5,
    58	                    opacity: isActive ? 1 : 0.85,
    59	                    borderBottom: isActive ? "2px solid #ffffff" : "2px solid transparent",
    60	                    paddingBottom: 4,
    61	                  }}
    62	                >
    63	                  {item.label}
    64	                </Link>
    65	              </li>
    66	            )
    67	          })}
    68	        </ul>
    69	
    70	        {/* Mobile Hamburger */}
    71	        <button
    72	          className="md:hidden text-white text-2xl"
    73	          onClick={() => setMobileOpen(!mobileOpen)}
    74	          aria-label="Toggle menu"
    75	        >
    76	          {mobileOpen ? "\u2715" : "\u2630"}
    77	        </button>
    78	      </nav>
    79	
    80	      {/* Mobile Nav Dropdown */}
    81	      {mobileOpen && (
    82	        <ul
    83	          className="md:hidden flex flex-col border-b border-white/10"
    84	          style={{
    85	            background: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95)",
    86	            backdropFilter: "blur(10px)",
    87	            padding: "16px 40px",
    88	            gap: 16,
    89	            listStyle: "none",
    90	          }}
    91	        >
    92	          {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
    93	            const isActive = pathname === item.href
    94	            return (
    95	              <li key={item.href}>
    96	                <Link
    97	                  href={item.href}
    98	                  className="text-white font-semibold"
    99	                  style={{
   100	                    fontSize: 13,
   101	                    letterSpacing: 0.5,
   102	                    opacity: isActive ? 1 : 0.85,
   103	                  }}
   104	                  onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
   105	                >
   106	                  {item.label}
   107	                </Link>
   108	              </li>
   109	            )
   110	          })}
   111	        </ul>
   112	      )}
   113	    </header>
   114	  )
   115	}

    42	  as_of_date_min?: string
    43	  as_of_date_max?: string
    44	  mixed_vintage?: boolean
    45	  drivers: {
    46	    vix_stress: DriverData
    47	    crush_pressure: DriverData
    48	    china_tension: DriverData
    49	    tariff_threat: DriverData
    50	    energy_stress?: DriverData

    60	function formatFreshnessLabel(
    61	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    62	): string | null {
    63	  if (!payload) return null
    64	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    65	    return `Mixed vintage ${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    66	  }
    67	  return payload.as_of_date ? `Data as of ${payload.as_of_date}` : null
    68	}
    69	
    70	function formatFreshnessSummary(
    71	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    72	): string {
    73	  if (!payload) return "–"
    74	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    75	    return `${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    76	  }
    77	  return payload.as_of_date ?? "–"
    78	}

   114	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115	// Score → color
   116	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117	
   118	function getScoreColor(score: number): { stroke: string; glow: string } {
   119	  const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score))
   120	  if (s <= 25) return { stroke: "#22C55E", glow: "rgba(34,197,94,0.5)" }
   121	  if (s <= 40) {
   122	    const t = (s - 25) / 15
   123	    return {
   124	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)})`,
   125	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   126	    }
   127	  }
   128	  if (s <= 55) return { stroke: "#EAB308", glow: "rgba(234,179,8,0.5)" }
   129	  if (s <= 70) {
   130	    const t = (s - 55) / 15
   131	    return {
   132	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)})`,
   133	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   134	    }
   135	  }
   136	  if (s <= 85) return { stroke: "#EF7300", glow: "rgba(239,115,0,0.5)" }
   137	  return { stroke: "#EF4444", glow: "rgba(239,68,68,0.6)" }
   138	}
   139	
   140	function getScoreTextColor(score: number | null): string {
   141	  if (score === null) return "text-slate-500"
   142	  if (score >= 70) return "text-red-400"
   143	  if (score >= 55) return "text-orange-400"
   144	  if (score >= 40) return "text-amber-400"
   145	  return "text-green-400"
   146	}
   147	
   148	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149	// Horizontal Meter
   150	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   151	
   152	function HorizontalMeter({ score }: { score: number | null }) {
   153	  if (score === null) {
   154	    return (
   155	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   156	        <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden" />
   157	        <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right text-slate-500">
   158	          --
   159	        </span>
   160	      </div>
   161	    )
   162	  }
   163	
   164	  const pct = Math.min(Math.max(score, 0), 100)
   165	  const colors = getScoreColor(score)
   166	  return (
   167	    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   168	      <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   169	        <div
   170	          className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ease-out"
   171	          style={{ width: `${pct}%`, backgroundColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${colors.glow}` }}
   172	        />
   173	      </div>
   174	      <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right" style={{ color: colors.stroke }}>
   175	        {Math.round(score)}
   176	      </span>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}
   180	
   181	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182	// Driver Card
   183	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   184	
   185	interface MetricDef {
   186	  key: string
   187	  label: string
   188	  format: (v: number | null) => string
   189	}
   190	
   191	function DriverCard({
   192	  label,
   193	  data,
   194	  metrics,
   195	  loading,
   196	}: {
   197	  label: string
   198	  data: DriverData | null
   199	  metrics: MetricDef[]
   200	  loading: boolean
   201	}) {
   202	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false)
   203	  const score = data?.score ?? null
   204	  const level = data?.level ? (LEVEL_LABELS[data.level] ?? data.level) : "--"
   205	  const colors = getScoreColor(score ?? 0)
   206	  const wh = data?.whatsHappening
   207	
   208	  const border =
   209	    score !== null && score >= 65
   210	      ? { borderColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${colors.glow}` }
   211	      : { borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }
   212	
   213	  return (
   214	    <div
   215	      className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300"
   216	      style={border}
   217	    >
   218	      <div className="text-base font-bold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   219	        {DRIVER_NAMES[label] ?? label}
   220	        {data?.aiPowered && (
   221	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">AI</span>
   222	        )}
   223	      </div>
   224	
   225	      <div className="w-full mb-2">
   226	        {loading ? (
   227	          <div className="h-3 bg-slate-700/50 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
   228	        ) : (
   229	          <HorizontalMeter score={score} />
   230	        )}
   231	      </div>
   232	
   233	      <div className={`text-lg font-medium mt-1 mb-4 ${loading ? "text-slate-600" : getScoreTextColor(score)}`}>
   234	        {loading ? "..." : level}
   235	      </div>
   236	
   237	      <div className="w-full space-y-2 border-t border-white/5 pt-4">
   238	        {metrics.map((m) => {
   239	          const val = data?.components?.[m.key] ?? null
   240	          return (
   241	            <div key={m.key} className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
   242	              <span className="text-slate-400">{m.label}</span>
   243	              <span className="text-slate-200 font-mono">{loading ? "--" : m.format(val)}</span>
   244	            </div>
   245	          )
   246	        })}
   247	      </div>
   248	
   249	      <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed min-h-[40px]">
   250	        {loading ? "..." : (data?.headline ?? "--")}
   251	      </div>
   252	
   253	      {!loading && data?.dataDate && (
   254	        <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-mono">Data as of: {data.dataDate}</div>
   255	      )}
   256	
   257	      {wh && !loading && (
   258	        <button
   259	          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
   260	          className="mt-4 w-full px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-slate-800/80 hover:bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-slate-700/50"
   261	        >
   262	          <span>{expanded ? "\u25BC" : "\u25B6"}</span> What&apos;s Happening?
   263	        </button>
   264	      )}
   265	
   266	      {expanded && wh && (
   267	        <div className="mt-4 w-full text-left space-y-3 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-200">
   268	          <div className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed border-l-2 pl-3" style={{ borderColor: colors.stroke }}>
   269	            {wh.whatsHappening}
   270	          </div>
   271	          <div className="space-y-2 pt-1">
   272	            {[
   273	              { t: "Macro Context", c: wh.macroContext },
   274	              { t: "Supply & Demand", c: wh.supplyDemand },
   275	              { t: "Geopolitical", c: wh.geopolitical },
   276	              { t: "Market Sentiment", c: wh.investorSentiment },
   277	              { t: "Near-Term Outlook", c: wh.nearTermOutlook },
   278	            ].map((s) => (
   279	              <div key={s.t}>
   280	                <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">{s.t}</div>
   281	                <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 leading-snug">{s.c}</div>
   282	              </div>
   283	            ))}
   284	          </div>
   285	          <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   286	            <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">What This Means For You</div>
   287	            <div className="text-sm text-slate-200">{wh.zlImplication}</div>
   288	          </div>
   289	        </div>
   290	      )}
   291	    </div>
   292	  )
   293	}
   294	
   295	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   296	// Main Export
   297	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   298	
   299	export function MarketRiskFactors() {
   300	  const [data, setData] = useState<MarketDriversResponse | null>(null)
   301	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
   302	
   303	  useEffect(() => {
   304	    fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
   305	      .then((r) => {
   306	        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`)
   307	        return r.json()
   308	      })
   309	      .then((json) => {
   310	        if (!json.error) setData(json as MarketDriversResponse)
   311	      })
   312	      .catch(() => {})
   313	      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
   314	  }, [])
   315	
   316	  const d = data?.drivers
   317	
   318	  return (
   319	    <div className="w-full">
   320	      {/* Section Header */}
   321	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   322	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 border-l-4 border-cyan-500">
   323	          <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Market Risk Factors</h3>

    19	export function MarketIntelligenceRow() {
