     4	import { readAiSnapshot, type AiSnapshotMeta } from "@/lib/server/ai-snapshot";
     5	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     6	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     7	
     8	type DriverKey =
     9	  | "vix_stress"
    10	  | "crush_pressure"
    11	  | "china_tension"
    12	  | "tariff_threat"
    13	  | "energy_stress";
    14	
    15	type AiDriverContent = {
    16	  score?: number | null;
    17	  headline?: string;
    18	  level?: string;
    19	  components?: Record<string, number | null>;
    20	  whatsHappening?: WhatsHappening;
    21	  strategicSpecialInstructions?: StrategicSpecialInstructions;
    22	  provenance?: AiCardProvenance;
    23	};
    24	
    25	type AiIntelligenceContent = {
    26	  headline?: string;
    27	  summary?: string;
    28	  drivers?: { label: string; outlook: string; detail: string }[];
    29	  zlOutlook?: "BULLISH" | "NEUTRAL" | "CAUTIOUS" | "BEARISH";
    30	  zlColor?: string;
    31	  tradingImplication?: string;
    32	  strategicSpecialInstructions?: StrategicSpecialInstructions;
    33	  provenance?: AiCardProvenance;
    34	};
    35	
    36	type AiRiskFactorsSnapshot = {
    37	  drivers: Partial<Record<DriverKey, AiDriverContent>>;
    38	  intelligence: AiIntelligenceContent;
    39	} & AiSnapshotMeta;
    40	
    41	type WhatsHappening = {
    42	  whatsHappening: string;
    43	  macroContext: string;
    44	  supplyDemand: string;
    45	  geopolitical: string;
    46	  investorSentiment: string;
    47	  nearTermOutlook: string;
    48	  zlImplication: string;
    49	};
    50	
    51	type DriverData = {
    52	  name: string;
    53	  score: number | null;
    54	  level: string;
    55	  regime: string;
    56	  headline: string;
    57	  components: Record<string, number | null>;
    58	  whatsHappening?: WhatsHappening;
    59	  strategicSpecialInstructions?: StrategicSpecialInstructions;
    60	  provenance?: AiCardProvenance;
    61	  aiPowered: boolean;
    62	  dataDate: string | null;
    63	};
    64	
    65	type MarketDriversResponse = {
    66	  as_of_date: string | null;
    67	  as_of_date_min?: string | null;
    68	  as_of_date_max?: string | null;
    69	  mixed_vintage?: boolean;
    70	  drivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData>;
    71	  summary: {
    72	    average_pressure: number;
    73	    highest_pressure: { name: string; score: number };
    74	    alert_count: number;
    75	  };
    76	  intelligence: {
    77	    headline: string;
    78	    summary: string;
    79	    drivers: { label: string; outlook: string; detail: string }[];
    80	    zlOutlook: "BULLISH" | "NEUTRAL" | "CAUTIOUS" | "BEARISH";
    81	    zlColor: string;
    82	    tradingImplication?: string;
    83	    aiPowered?: boolean;
    84	    strategicSpecialInstructions?: StrategicSpecialInstructions;
    85	    provenance?: AiCardProvenance;
    86	  };
    87	  ai: {
    88	    enabled: boolean;
    89	    source: string;
    90	    model: string | null;
    91	    reasoningEffort: string | null;
    92	    generatedAt: string | null;
    93	    refreshScheduleEt: string | null;
    94	  };
    95	};
    96	
    97	function toNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
    98	  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
    99	  const n = Number(value);
   100	  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
   101	}
   102	
   103	function normalizeMetricKey(key: string): string {
   104	  return key.trim().toLowerCase();
   105	}
   106	
   107	function coerceScore(value: number | null): number | null {
   108	  if (value === null) return null;
   109	  const abs = Math.abs(value);
   110	  if (abs <= 1) return Math.round(abs * 1000) / 10;
   111	  if (abs <= 100) return Math.round(abs * 10) / 10;
   112	  return 100;
   113	}
   114	
   115	function mapFactorToDriver(factor: string): DriverKey | null {
   116	  const f = factor.toLowerCase();
   117	  if (f.includes("vix") || f.includes("volatility")) return "vix_stress";
   118	  if (f.includes("crush")) return "crush_pressure";
   119	  if (f.includes("china") || f.includes("cny")) return "china_tension";
   120	  if (f.includes("tariff") || f.includes("policy") || f.includes("tpu") || f.includes("emv")) return "tariff_threat";
   121	  if (f.includes("energy") || f.includes("crude") || f.includes("oil") || f.includes("cl")) return "energy_stress";
   122	  return null;
   123	}
   124	
   125	function levelFor(driver: DriverKey, score: number | null): string {
   126	  if (score === null) return "No Data";
   127	
   128	  if (driver === "vix_stress") {
   129	    if (score >= 85) return "Gap Risk";
   130	    if (score >= 65) return "Fund Exit";
   131	    if (score >= 45) return "Elevated";
   132	    return "Calm";
   133	  }
   134	  if (driver === "crush_pressure") {
   135	    if (score >= 85) return "Plant Idling";
   136	    if (score >= 65) return "Margin Squeeze";
   137	    if (score >= 45) return "Breakeven Risk";
   138	    return "Strong";
   139	  }
   140	  if (driver === "china_tension") {
   141	    if (score >= 80) return "Active Conflict";
   142	    if (score >= 60) return "Trade Diversion";
   143	    if (score >= 40) return "Monitor Flows";
   144	    return "Brazil Favored";
   145	  }
   146	  if (driver === "tariff_threat") {
   147	    if (score >= 85) return "Systemic Shock";
   148	    if (score >= 65) return "Elevated Risk";
   149	    if (score >= 45) return "Watch";
   150	    return "Contained";
   151	  }
   152	  if (score >= 85) return "Crisis";
   153	  if (score >= 65) return "Supply Shock";
   154	  if (score >= 45) return "Elevated";
   155	  return "Low Risk";
   156	}
   157	
   158	function regimeFor(score: number | null): string {
   159	  if (score === null) return "NO_DATA";
   160	  if (score >= 70) return "PRESSURE";
   161	  if (score >= 45) return "WATCH";
   162	  return "CALM";
   163	}
   164	
   165	function outlookFromScore(score: number): "BULLISH" | "NEUTRAL" | "CAUTIOUS" | "BEARISH" {
   166	  if (score >= 70) return "BEARISH";
   167	  if (score >= 55) return "CAUTIOUS";
   168	  if (score >= 35) return "NEUTRAL";
   169	  return "BULLISH";
   170	}
   171	
   172	function colorFromScore(score: number): string {
   173	  if (score >= 70) return "#EF4444";
   174	  if (score >= 55) return "#EF7300";
   175	  if (score >= 35) return "#EAB308";
   176	  return "#22C55E";
   177	}
   178	
   179	function headlineFor(driverName: string, score: number | null): string {
   180	  if (score === null) return `Hard stop: ${driverName} lacks verified promoted data`;
   181	  if (score >= 70) return `${driverName}: elevated pressure`;
   182	  if (score >= 45) return `${driverName}: moderate risk`;
   183	  return `${driverName}: stable`;
   184	}
   185	
   186	function getMetric(metrics: Map<string, number | null>, keys: string[]): number | null {
   187	  for (const key of keys) {
   188	    const value = metrics.get(normalizeMetricKey(key));
   189	    if (value !== undefined) return value;
   190	  }
   191	  return null;
   192	}

   335	
   336	function formatMetric(value: number | null, mode: "fixed1" | "fixed2" | "int" | "pct" | "usd2"): string {
   337	  if (value === null) return "unavailable";
   338	  if (mode === "fixed1") return value.toFixed(1);
   339	  if (mode === "fixed2") return value.toFixed(2);
   340	  if (mode === "int") return value.toFixed(0);
   341	  if (mode === "pct") return `${value >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(value * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
   342	  return `$${value.toFixed(2)}`;
   343	}
   344	
   345	function scoreState(score: number | null): string {
   346	  if (score === null) return "data pending";
   347	  if (score >= 70) return "elevated pressure";
   348	  if (score >= 45) return "watch zone";
   349	  return "calm zone";
   350	}
   351	
   352	function mergeDriverComponents(
   353	  base: Record<string, number | null>,
   354	  ai?: Record<string, number | null>,
   355	): Record<string, number | null> {
   356	  if (!ai) return base;
   357	  const merged: Record<string, number | null> = { ...base };
   358	  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(ai)) {
   359	    if (value === null || value === undefined) continue;
   360	    const n = Number(value);
   361	    if (!Number.isFinite(n)) continue;
   362	    merged[key] = n;
   363	  }
   364	  return merged;
   365	}
   366	
   367	function summarizeDrivers(drivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData>): {
   368	  average: number;
   369	  topName: string;
   370	  topScore: number;
   371	  alertCount: number;
   372	} {
   373	  const scoredEntries = (Object.values(drivers) as DriverData[]).filter(
   374	    (d) => d.score !== null,
   375	  ) as Array<DriverData & { score: number }>;
   376	
   377	  const average =
   378	    scoredEntries.length > 0
   379	      ? Math.round(
   380	          (scoredEntries.reduce((acc, d) => acc + d.score, 0) / scoredEntries.length) * 10,
   381	        ) / 10
   382	      : 0;
   383	
   384	  const highest =
   385	    scoredEntries.length > 0
   386	      ? scoredEntries.slice().sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)[0]
   387	      : null;
   388	
   389	  const topScore = highest?.score ?? 0;
   390	  const topName = highest?.name ?? "No Data";
   391	  const alertCount = scoredEntries.filter((d) => d.score >= 65).length;
   392	
   393	  return { average, topName, topScore, alertCount };
   394	}
   395	
   396	async function readAiRiskFactorsSnapshot(): Promise<AiRiskFactorsSnapshot | null> {
   397	  const snapshot = await readAiSnapshot<AiRiskFactorsSnapshot>("app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json");
   398	  if (!snapshot) return null;
   399	  if (!snapshot.drivers || !snapshot.intelligence) return null;
   400	  return snapshot;
   401	}
   402	
   403	function driverFocus(driver: DriverKey): string {
   404	  if (driver === "vix_stress") return "volatility transmission into procurement timing";
   405	  if (driver === "crush_pressure") return "processor margin pressure and oil-share economics";
   406	  if (driver === "china_tension") return "China demand and trade-flow displacement";
   407	  if (driver === "tariff_threat") return "policy shocks and geopolitical tariff channels";
   408	  return "energy complex pass-through into ZL";
   409	}
   410	
   411	function buildDriverProvenance(
   412	  key: DriverKey,
   413	  dataDate: string | null,
   414	  generatedAt: string | null,
   415	): AiCardProvenance {
   416	  const asOf = dataDate ?? generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   417	  return {
   418	    asOf,
   419	    generatedAt: generatedAt ?? asOf,
   420	    method: "verified-db-weekly-ingest-plus-ai-snapshot",
   421	    sourceFeeds: [
   422	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   423	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   424	    ],
   425	    sourceRecords: [
   426	      {
   427	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   428	        table: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   429	        recordHint: `driver=${key}`,
   430	        observedAt: dataDate ?? undefined,
   431	      },
   432	      {
   433	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   434	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   435	        recordHint: `mapped_driver=${key}`,
   436	        observedAt: dataDate ?? undefined,
   437	      },
   438	    ],
   439	  };
   440	}
   441	
   442	function buildIntelligenceProvenance(
   443	  asOf: string | null,
   444	  generatedAt: string | null,
   445	): AiCardProvenance {
   446	  const resolvedAsOf = asOf ?? generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   447	  return {
   448	    asOf: resolvedAsOf,
   449	    generatedAt: generatedAt ?? resolvedAsOf,
   450	    method: "verified-db-weekly-ingest-plus-ai-snapshot",
   451	    sourceFeeds: [
   452	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   453	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   454	    ],
   455	    sourceRecords: [
   456	      {
   457	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   458	        table: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   459	        recordHint: "latest driver metric set",
   460	        observedAt: resolvedAsOf,
   461	      },
   462	      {
   463	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   464	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   465	        recordHint: "latest factor attribution set",
   466	        observedAt: resolvedAsOf,
   467	      },
   468	    ],
   469	  };
   470	}
   471	
   472	function buildDriverWhatsHappening(
   473	  driver: DriverKey,
   474	  payload: DriverData,
   475	  aggregateSummary: string,
   476	  topDriverName: string,
   477	  averagePressure: number,
   478	  instructions: StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   479	): WhatsHappening {
   480	  const scoreText = payload.score === null ? "No scored signal yet" : `Score ${Math.round(payload.score)}`;
   481	  const commonState = scoreState(payload.score);
   482	  const focus = driverFocus(driver);
   483	
   484	  const c = payload.components;
   485	  let supplyDemand = "Underlying supply/demand metrics are waiting on the next promoted dataset."
   486	  let geopolitical = "No explicit geopolitical pulse is dominating this driver in the current snapshot."
   487	  let sentiment = `Market posture is ${commonState}; regime tag is ${payload.regime}.`
   488	
   489	  if (driver === "vix_stress") {
   490	    supplyDemand = `VIX ${formatMetric(c.vix_value ?? null, "fixed1")} and OVX ${formatMetric(c.ovx_value ?? null, "fixed1")} define the current volatility envelope.`
   491	    geopolitical = "Cross-asset stress is being monitored as an early warning for procurement-cost spikes."
   492	    sentiment = `Volatility regime is ${commonState}; defensive hedging usually increases as this score rises.`
   493	  } else if (driver === "crush_pressure") {
   494	    supplyDemand = `Crush margin ${formatMetric(c.board_crush_value ?? null, "usd2")} and oil share ${formatMetric(c.oil_share_value ?? null, "fixed1")} describe processing economics.`
   495	    geopolitical = "Crush behavior is primarily a microstructure signal unless macro shocks force abrupt repricing."
   496	    sentiment = `Crush pressure is ${commonState}; buyers should watch processing spreads for timing risk.`
   497	  } else if (driver === "china_tension") {
   498	    supplyDemand = `CNY ${formatMetric(c.cny_rate ?? null, "fixed2")} with ${formatMetric(c.soy_china_news_count ?? null, "int")} China/soy headlines tracks demand-flow tension.`
   499	    geopolitical = "Trade-friction headlines and import-flow shifts remain the key geopolitical amplifier here."
   500	    sentiment = `China-linked risk is ${commonState}; abrupt headline shifts can reprice demand assumptions quickly.`
   501	  } else if (driver === "tariff_threat") {
   502	    supplyDemand = `Uncertainty index ${formatMetric(c.uncertainty_value ?? null, "int")} and crude 5D ${formatMetric(c.oil_change_5d ?? null, "pct")} frame policy-to-price transmission.`
   503	    geopolitical = `${formatMetric(c.iran_war_news_count ?? null, "int")} Iran/war headlines and ${formatMetric(c.macro_news_count ?? null, "int")} macro headlines are feeding this channel.`
   504	    sentiment = `Policy risk is ${commonState}; this is the macro/geopolitical lane most likely to force schedule adjustments.`
   505	  } else {
   506	    supplyDemand = `CL ${formatMetric(c.cl_price ?? null, "usd2")}, 5D change ${formatMetric(c.cl_change_5d ?? null, "pct")}, and OVX ${formatMetric(c.ovx_value ?? null, "fixed1")} define energy stress.`
   507	    geopolitical = `Energy headline count is ${formatMetric(c.energy_news_count ?? null, "int")}; supply-shock sensitivity remains active.`
   508	    sentiment = `Energy pass-through is ${commonState}; sustained pressure can lift procurement urgency.`
   509	  }
   510	
   511	  const zlImplication =
   512	    payload.score === null
   513	      ? "Keep standard buying cadence while waiting for fresh promoted metrics."
   514	      : payload.score >= 70
   515	        ? "Increase execution vigilance, shorten decision windows, and preserve optionality on contract timing."
   516	        : payload.score >= 45
   517	          ? "Maintain normal execution with tighter monitoring around upcoming refresh windows."
   518	          : "Pressure is contained; continue schedule-based procurement unless another driver escalates."
   519	
   520	  return {
   521	    whatsHappening: `${payload.name} is currently ${commonState}. ${scoreText} with level ${payload.level} keeps focus on ${focus}. Strategic frame: ${instructions.cardTopic}.`,
   522	    macroContext: `${aggregateSummary} Top pressure is ${topDriverName} and average pressure is ${averagePressure.toFixed(1)}.`,
   523	    supplyDemand,
   524	    geopolitical,
   525	    investorSentiment: sentiment,
   526	    nearTermOutlook: payload.score === null ? "Hard stop: near-term outlook blocked until verified signal fields are populated." : payload.score >= 70 ? "High-risk posture likely to persist near term." : payload.score >= 45 ? "Mixed posture with event-driven volatility risk." : "Low-pressure posture unless headline regime changes.",
   527	    zlImplication,
   528	  };
   529	}

   569	    const metricMap = new Map<string, number | null>();
   570	    for (const row of latestMetrics) {
   571	      metricMap.set(normalizeMetricKey(row.metric_key), toNumber(row.metric_value));
   572	    }

   578	      const driverKey = mapFactorToDriver(String(row.factor));
   579	      if (!driverKey) continue;
   580	      const contribution = toNumber(row.contribution);
   581	      const existing = attributionByDriver.get(driverKey);
   582	      const existingAbs = existing?.contribution === null || existing?.contribution === undefined ? -1 : Math.abs(existing.contribution);
   583	      const currentAbs = contribution === null ? -1 : Math.abs(contribution);
   584	      if (!existing || currentAbs > existingAbs) {
   585	        attributionByDriver.set(driverKey, {
   586	          trade_date: String(row.trade_date),

   608	      Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((value - floor) / (ceil - floor)) * 100));

   612	      const ovx = getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]);

   615	        const ovxScore = ovx === null ? 0 : normalized(ovx, 20, 60);

   737	      const mergedComponents = mergeDriverComponents(base.components, ai?.components);

   747	          ai?.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? defaultInstructions,
   748	        provenance:
   749	          ai?.provenance ??
   750	          buildDriverProvenance(
   751	            key,
   752	            base.dataDate,
   753	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   754	          ),
   755	        aiPowered: Boolean(ai),
   756	        dataDate: base.dataDate,
   757	      };
   758	
   759	      return {
   760	        ...mergedPayload,
   761	        whatsHappening: ai?.whatsHappening,
   762	      };
   763	    };
   764	
   765	    const mergedDrivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData> = {
   766	      vix_stress: mergeDriver(

   804	    for (const key of Object.keys(mergedDrivers) as DriverKey[]) {

   808	        driver.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS[key];

   810	        key,

   812	        mergedTopScore === 0 && mergedTopName === "No Data"
   813	          ? "Hard stop: promoted analytics rows are missing."
   814	          : `Top concern is ${mergedTopName} at ${Math.round(mergedTopScore)}.`,
   815	        mergedTopName,
   816	        mergedAverage,
   817	        instructions,
   818	      );
   819	    }
   820	
   821	    const response: MarketDriversResponse = {
   822	      as_of_date: asOfDate,
   823	      as_of_date_min: asOfDateMin,
   824	      as_of_date_max: asOfDateMax,
   825	      mixed_vintage: mixedVintage,
   826	      drivers: mergedDrivers,
   827	      summary: {
   828	        average_pressure: mergedAverage,
   829	        highest_pressure: { name: mergedTopName, score: mergedTopScore },
   830	        alert_count: mergedAlertCount,
   831	      },
   832	      intelligence: {
   833	        headline:
   834	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.headline ??
   835	          (mergedTopScore >= 65 ? "ELEVATED MARKET - Watch Procurement Risk" : "NORMAL MARKET - Buy On Schedule"),

   841	        drivers: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.drivers ?? (Object.values(mergedDrivers) as DriverData[])
   842	          .filter((d) => d.score !== null)
   843	          .map((d) => ({
   844	            label: d.name,
   845	            outlook: d.score !== null && d.score >= 65 ? "PRESSURE" : d.score !== null && d.score <= 35 ? "SUPPORTIVE" : "MIXED",
   846	            detail: d.headline,
   847	          })),
   848	        zlOutlook: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlOutlook ?? outlookFromScore(mergedAverage),
   849	        zlColor: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlColor ?? colorFromScore(mergedAverage),
   850	        tradingImplication:
   851	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.tradingImplication ??
   852	          (mergedTopScore >= 65
   853	            ? "Risk elevated. Keep procurement flexible and monitor next refresh."
   854	            : "No major pressure signal yet. Continue normal buying schedule."),
   855	        aiPowered: Boolean(aiSnapshot?.intelligence),
   856	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   857	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   858	          MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS,
   859	        provenance:
   860	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.provenance ??
   861	          buildIntelligenceProvenance(
   862	            asOfDateMax ?? asOfDateMin,
   863	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   864	          ),
   865	      },
   866	      ai: {
   867	        enabled: Boolean(aiSnapshot),
   868	        source: aiSnapshot?.source ?? "weekly-db-plus-ai-snapshot",
   869	        model: aiSnapshot?.model ?? null,
   870	        reasoningEffort: aiSnapshot?.reasoningEffort ?? null,
   871	        generatedAt: aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   872	        refreshScheduleEt: aiSnapshot?.refreshScheduleEt ?? null,
   873	      },
   874	    };
   875	
   876	    return NextResponse.json(response, {
   877	      headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" },
   878	    });
   879	  } catch (err) {
   880	    return NextResponse.json(
   881	      { error: String(err) },
   882	      { status: 500, headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" } },
   883	    );
   884	  }

    33	      "Estimate scenario-weighted cost outcomes across staggered execution windows.",

    35	      "Include downside tail amplification under volatility and macro co-escalation states.",
    36	      "Frame recommendation as buyer-side cost-control, not directional speculation.",
    37	    ],
    38	    inferenceConstraints: [
    39	      "Do not recommend one-shot execution when volatility and macro channels remain elevated.",
    40	      "Do not present strategy guidance without explicit downside-tail treatment.",
    41	      "Do not use generic timing language without quantified window tradeoffs.",
    42	    ],
    43	    outputRequirements: [
    44	      "State preferred execution structure and why.",
    45	      "Report cost-control logic in buyer terms.",
    46	      "Include trigger conditions that would invalidate the recommendation.",
    47	    ],
    48	  },

    59	      "Preserve directional uncertainty labels when channels diverge.",

    65	    ],

    67	      "Provide ordered driver stack with concise rationale.",

    69	      "Translate ranking into procurement monitoring priorities.",

    74	    strategicObjective:

    76	    neuralConnectionThesis:

    78	    quantResearchProtocol: [

    91	      "Explain latency risk versus hedge risk comparison.",
    92	      "Provide specific cadence/monitoring recommendation.",
    93	    ],
    94	  },

    97	function buildProvenance(
    98	  generatedAt: string,
    99	  tradeDate: string | null,
   100	  cardKey: keyof StrategyCards,
   101	  trustedUrls: string[],
   102	): AiCardProvenance {
   103	  return {
   104	    asOf: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   105	    generatedAt,
   106	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   107	    sourceFeeds: [
   108	      "analytics.market_posture",
   109	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   110	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   111	      ...trustedUrls,
   112	    ],
   113	    sourceRecords: [
   114	      {
   115	        source: "analytics.market_posture",
   116	        table: "analytics.market_posture",
   117	        recordHint: tradeDate ? `trade_date=${tradeDate}` : "latest row",
   118	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? undefined,
   119	      },
   120	      {
   121	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   122	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   123	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   124	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   125	      },
   126	    ],
   127	    notes: [
   128	      "Buyer posture is interpreted from verified table and market-source pulls.",
   129	      "Hard stop is applied when required driver or market evidence is missing.",
   130	    ],
   131	  };
   132	}
   133	
   134	export async function GET() {
   135	  try {
   136	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   137	    if (unauthorized) {
   138	      return unauthorized;
   139	    }
   140	
   141	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   142	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<StrategyAiSnapshot>(
   143	      "app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json",
   144	    );
   145	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   146	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   147	
   148	    const [{ data: row, error }, { data: attributionRows }, { data: metricRows }] = await Promise.all([
   149	      supabase
   150	        .schema("analytics")
   151	        .from("market_posture")
   152	        .select("posture, rationale, trade_date")
   153	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   154	        .limit(1)
   155	        .maybeSingle(),
   156	      supabase
   157	        .schema("analytics")
   158	        .from("driver_attribution_1d")
   159	        .select("trade_date, rank, factor, contribution")
   160	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   161	        .order("rank", { ascending: true })
   162	        .limit(40),
   163	      supabase
   164	        .schema("analytics")
   165	        .from("dashboard_metrics")
   166	        .select("trade_date, metric_key, metric_value")
   167	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   168	        .limit(300),
   169	    ]);
   170	
   171	    if (error) {
   172	      return NextResponse.json(
   173	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
   174	        { status: 500 },
   175	      );
   176	    }
   177	
   178	    const latestAttrDate = attributionRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   179	    const latestAttr = (attributionRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestAttrDate);
   180	    const topFactors = latestAttr
   181	      .slice(0, 4)
   182	      .map((r) => `${String(r.factor)} (${Number(r.contribution).toFixed(2)})`);
   183	
   184	    const latestMetricDate = metricRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   185	    const latestMetrics = (metricRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestMetricDate);
   186	    const metricMap = new Map<string, number>();
   187	    for (const rowMetric of latestMetrics) {
   188	      const n = Number(rowMetric.metric_value);
   189	      if (Number.isFinite(n)) {
   190	        metricMap.set(String(rowMetric.metric_key).toLowerCase(), n);
   191	      }
   192	    }
   193	
   194	    const dbVix = metricMap.get("vix_value") ?? null;
   195	    const dbOvx = metricMap.get("ovx_value") ?? null;
   196	    const dbCl5d = metricMap.get("cl_change_5d") ?? metricMap.get("crude_oil_change_5d") ?? null;
   197	    const liveVix = trustedMarket.vix.value ?? dbVix;
   198	    const liveOvx = trustedMarket.ovx.value ?? dbOvx;
   199	    const liveCl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d ?? dbCl5d;
   200	
   201	    const dbPosture: StrategyPosture | null = row
   202	      ? {
   203	          posture: row.posture as StrategyPosture["posture"],
   204	          rationale: row.rationale ?? "",
   205	          updatedAt: row.trade_date ?? new Date().toISOString(),
   206	        }
   207	      : null;
   208	
   209	    const posture: StrategyPosture | null = aiSnapshot?.posture ?? dbPosture;
   210	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   211	    const tradeDate = row?.trade_date ?? posture?.updatedAt ?? null;
   212	    const stagedExecutionBias =
   213	      posture?.posture === "ACCUMULATE"
   214	        ? "Staged accumulation remains favored."
   215	        : posture?.posture === "WAIT"
   216	          ? "Hold execution optionality and avoid urgency."
   217	          : "Defer new exposure until risk compression is visible.";
   218	    const volatilityLine =
   219	      liveVix !== null && liveOvx !== null
   220	        ? `VIX ${liveVix.toFixed(2)} and OVX ${liveOvx.toFixed(2)} remain active volatility constraints.`
   221	        : "Hard stop: verified VIX/OVX volatility reads are unavailable.";
   222	    const crudeLine =
   223	      liveCl5d !== null
   224	        ? `CL 5-day change is ${(liveCl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%, informing near-term pass-through risk.`
   225	        : "Hard stop: verified CL 5-day change is unavailable.";
   226	    const topFactorLine =
   227	      topFactors.length > 0
   228	        ? `Latest verified attribution stack: ${topFactors.join(", ")}.`
   229	        : "Hard stop: no verified attribution rows available in analytics.driver_attribution_1d.";
   230	    const noTrustedFeeds =
   231	      liveVix === null && liveOvx === null && liveCl5d === null;
   232	
   233	    const fallbackCards: StrategyCards = {
   234	      contractImpactCalculator: {
   235	        title: "Contract Impact Calculator",
   236	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   237	          ? "Hard stop: trusted market evidence from Yahoo/FRED is unavailable, so contract-impact guidance is blocked."
   238	          : `${stagedExecutionBias} ${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine}`,
   239	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.contractImpactCalculator,
   240	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "contractImpactCalculator", trustedUrls),
   241	      },
   242	      factorWaterfall: {
   243	        title: "Factor Waterfall",
   244	        body: topFactorLine,
   245	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.factorWaterfall,
   246	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "factorWaterfall", trustedUrls),
   247	      },
   248	      riskMetrics: {
   249	        title: "Risk Metrics",
   250	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   251	          ? "Hard stop: trusted volatility and crude metrics are unavailable; buyer risk-math output is blocked until verified feeds recover."
   252	          : `${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine} Decision-latency risk should be prioritized over single-window execution risk when these channels remain elevated.`,
   253	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.riskMetrics,
   254	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "riskMetrics", trustedUrls),
   255	      },
   256	    };
   257	
   258	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   259	    const cards: StrategyCards = {
   260	      contractImpactCalculator: {

exec

   143	function buildProvenance(
   144	  generatedAt: string,
   145	  updatedAt: string,
   146	  cardKey: string,
   147	  trustedUrls: string[],
   148	): AiCardProvenance {
   149	  return {
   150	    asOf: updatedAt,
   151	    generatedAt,
   152	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   153	    sourceFeeds: ["alt.news_events", "mkt.cftc_1w", ...trustedUrls],
   154	    sourceRecords: [
   155	      {
   156	        source: "alt.news_events",
   157	        table: "alt.news_events",
   158	        recordHint: "latest 7-day sentiment rows",
   159	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   160	      },
   161	      {
   162	        source: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   163	        table: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   164	        recordHint: "symbol=ZL latest observation",
   165	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   166	      },
   167	      {
   168	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   169	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   170	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   171	      },
   172	    ],
   173	    notes: [
   174	      "Narrative output is buyer-facing procurement interpretation from verified rows.",
   175	      "Hard stop language is required when market or flow evidence is missing.",
   176	    ],
   177	  };
   178	}

   180	export async function GET() {
   181	  try {
   182	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   183	    if (unauthorized) {
   184	      return unauthorized;
   185	    }
   186	
   187	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   188	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<SentimentAiSnapshot>(
   189	      "app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json",
   190	    );
   191	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   192	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   193	
   194	    const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
   195	    sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
   196	    const oneDayAgo = new Date();
   197	    oneDayAgo.setDate(oneDayAgo.getDate() - 1);
   198	
   199	    const [{ data: newsRows, error: newsError }, { data: cftcRow }] = await Promise.all([
   200	      supabase
   201	        .schema("alt")
   202	        .from("news_events")
   203	        .select("source, published_at, specialist_tags")
   204	        .gte("published_at", sevenDaysAgo.toISOString())
   205	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   206	        .limit(300),
   207	      supabase
   208	        .schema("mkt")
   209	        .from("cftc_1w")
   210	        .select("observation_date, payload")
   211	        .eq("symbol", "ZL")
   212	        .order("observation_date", { ascending: false })
   213	        .limit(1)
   214	        .maybeSingle(),
   215	    ]);
   216	
   217	    if (newsError) {
   218	      return NextResponse.json(
   219	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: newsError.message },
   220	        { status: 500 },
   221	      );
   222	    }
   223	
   224	    const rows = newsRows ?? [];
   225	    const headlineCount = rows.length;
   226	    const last24h = rows.filter((row) => new Date(row.published_at).getTime() >= oneDayAgo.getTime()).length;
   227	    const pulseRatio = headlineCount > 0 ? last24h / Math.max(1, headlineCount / 7) : 0;
   228	    const flowState = pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? "elevated" : pulseRatio >= 1 ? "balanced" : "subdued";
   229	
   230	    const sourceSet = new Set<string>();
   231	    const tagCounts = new Map<string, number>();
   232	    for (const row of rows) {
   233	      if (row.source) sourceSet.add(row.source);
   234	      const tags = Array.isArray(row.specialist_tags) ? row.specialist_tags : [];
   235	      for (const tag of tags) {
   236	        const normalized = String(tag).trim();
   237	        if (!normalized) continue;
   238	        tagCounts.set(normalized, (tagCounts.get(normalized) ?? 0) + 1);
   239	      }
   240	    }
   241	    const topTags = Array.from(tagCounts.entries())
   242	      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
   243	      .slice(0, 3)
   244	      .map(([tag]) => tag);
   245	    const tagPhrase = topTags.length > 0 ? topTags.join(", ") : "no dominant specialist cluster";
   246	
   247	    const cotPayload = cftcRow?.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null;
   248	    const cotBias = (cotPayload?.bias as string) ?? "neutral";
   249	    const cotBiasNorm = cotBias.trim().toLowerCase();
   250	    const cotBiasLabel =
   251	      cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? "bullish bias" : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? "bearish bias" : "neutral bias";
   252	    const cotBiasScore = cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? 20 : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? -20 : 0;
   253	
   254	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   255	    const ovx = trustedMarket.ovx.value;
   256	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   257	    const cl5dText =
   258	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   259	    const macroTrustedMissing = vix === null && ovx === null && cl5d === null;
   260	    const volatilityPenalty =

    37	  "vegetable oil",
    38	  "vegetable oils",
    39	  "biofuel",
    40	  "biodiesel",
    41	  "renewable diesel",
    42	  "renewable fuel standard",
    43	  "rfs",
    44	  "biomass-based diesel",
    45	  "feedstock",
    46	  "crush margin",
    47	];
    48	
    49	const AG_SOY_CONTEXT_TERMS = [
    50	  "agriculture",
    51	  "agricultural",
    52	  "farm bill",
    53	  "farm",
    54	  "usda",
    55	  "epa",
    56	  "fats and oils",
    57	  "oilseed",
    58	  "commodity crop",
    59	  "clean fuel",
    60	  "lcfs",
    61	  "blender tax credit",
    62	  "carbon intensity",
    63	];
    64	
    65	const AG_SOY_POLICY_TERMS = [
    66	  "tariff",
    67	  "trade",
    68	  "import",
    69	  "export",
    70	  "duty",
    71	  "duties",
    72	  "quota",
    73	  "sanction",
    74	  "subsid",
    75	  "mandate",
    76	  "countervailing",
    77	  "antidumping",
    78	  "rule",
    79	  "program",
    80	  "appropriation",
    81	  "act",
    82	];
    83	
    84	const AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS = new Set(["crush", "biofuel", "palm", "tariff", "china", "energy"]);
    85	
    86	function includesAnyTerm(text: string, terms: readonly string[]): boolean {
    87	  return terms.some((term) => {
    88	    const normalized = term.trim().toLowerCase();
    89	    if (!normalized) return false;
    90	    const escaped = normalized
    91	      .replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    92	      .replace(/\s+/g, "\\s+");
    93	    const pattern = new RegExp(`(^|[^a-z0-9])${escaped}([^a-z0-9]|$)`, "i");
    94	    return pattern.test(text);
    95	  });
    96	}
    97	
    98	function normalizeTags(raw: unknown): string[] {
    99	  if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return [];
   100	  return raw
   101	    .map((tag) => String(tag).trim())
   102	    .filter((tag) => tag.length > 0);
   103	}
   104	
   105	function isAgSoyPolicyRelevant(params: {
   106	  title: string;
   107	  summary?: string | null;
   108	  tags?: string[];
   109	}): boolean {
   110	  const textBlob = `${params.title} ${params.summary ?? ""}`.toLowerCase();
   111	  const primaryMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_PRIMARY_TERMS);
   112	  const contextMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_CONTEXT_TERMS);
   113	  const policyMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_POLICY_TERMS);
   114	  const tagSet = new Set((params.tags ?? []).map((tag) => tag.toLowerCase()));
   115	  const tagHint = Array.from(tagSet).some((tag) => AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS.has(tag));
   116	
   117	  if (primaryMatch) return true;
   118	  if (contextMatch && (policyMatch || tagHint)) return true;
   119	  if (tagHint && includesAnyTerm(textBlob, ["usda", "epa", "farm", "agricult", "renewable", "biofuel"])) {
   120	    return true;
   121	  }
   122	  return false;
   123	}
   124	
   125	function dedupeLegislationItems(items: LegislationItem[]): LegislationItem[] {
   126	  const seen = new Set<string>();
   127	  const deduped: LegislationItem[] = [];
   128	  for (const item of items) {
   129	    const key = `${item.source}::${item.title}`;
   130	    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
   131	    seen.add(key);
   132	    deduped.push(item);
   133	  }
   134	  return deduped;
   135	}

   161	export async function GET() {
   162	  try {
   163	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
   164	    if (unauthorized) {
   165	      return unauthorized;
   166	    }
   167	
   168	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   169	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<VegasIntelAiSnapshot>(
   170	      "app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json",
   171	    );
   172	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   173	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   174	
   175	    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
   176	    const in14 = new Date();
   177	    in14.setDate(in14.getDate() + 14);
   178	    const in30 = new Date();
   179	    in30.setDate(in30.getDate() + 30);
   180	
   181	    const [
   182	      { data: eventRows, error: evtError },
   183	      { data: restaurantRows, error: restError },
   184	      { data: fryerRows },
   185	      { data: scoreRows },
   186	      { data: impactRows },
   187	    ] = await Promise.all([
   188	      supabase
   189	        .schema("vegas")
   190	        .from("events")
   191	        .select("id, event_name, event_date")
   192	        .gte("event_date", today)
   193	        .order("event_date", { ascending: true })
   194	        .limit(200),
   195	      supabase
   196	        .schema("vegas")
   197	        .from("restaurants")
   198	        .select("id, restaurant_name, account_status")
   199	        .eq("account_status", "active")
   200	        .limit(500),
   201	      supabase
   202	        .schema("vegas")
   203	        .from("fryers")
   204	        .select("restaurant_id, fryer_count")
   205	        .limit(500),
   206	      supabase
   207	        .schema("vegas")
   208	        .from("customer_scores")
   209	        .select("restaurant_id, score_date, score")
   210	        .order("score_date", { ascending: false })
   211	        .limit(500),
   212	      supabase
   213	        .schema("vegas")
   214	        .from("event_impact")
   215	        .select("event_id, restaurant_id, impact_score")
   216	        .order("impact_score", { ascending: false })
   217	        .limit(500),
   218	    ]);
   219	
   220	    if (evtError) {
   221	      return NextResponse.json(
   222	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: evtError.message },
   223	        { status: 500 },
   224	      );
   225	    }
   226	
   227	    if (restError) {
   228	      return NextResponse.json(
   229	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: restError.message },
   230	        { status: 500 },
   231	      );
   232	    }
   233	
   234	    const events = eventRows ?? [];
   235	    const activeRestaurants = restaurantRows ?? [];
   236	    const fryers = fryerRows ?? [];
   237	    const customerScores = scoreRows ?? [];
   238	    const eventImpacts = impactRows ?? [];
   239	
   240	    const activeEvents = events.length;
   241	    const highPriority = activeRestaurants.length;
   242	    const events14d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in14.getTime()).length;
   243	    const events30d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in30.getTime()).length;
   244	    const nextEvent = events[0] ?? null;
   245	
   246	    const knownFryerCounts = fryers
   247	      .map((row) => Number(row.fryer_count))
   248	      .filter((count) => Number.isFinite(count) && count >= 0);
   249	    const totalFryers = knownFryerCounts.reduce((acc, count) => acc + count, 0);
   250	    const lowRedundancySites = knownFryerCounts.filter((count) => count <= 1).length;
   251	    const unknownFryerSites = Math.max(0, fryers.length - knownFryerCounts.length);
   252	
   253	    const latestScoreDate = customerScores[0]?.score_date ?? null;
   254	    const latestScores = customerScores.filter((row) => row.score_date === latestScoreDate);
   255	    const scoredAccounts = latestScores
   256	      .map((row) => Number(row.score))
   257	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   258	    const avgScore =
   259	      scoredAccounts.length > 0
   260	        ? scoredAccounts.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / scoredAccounts.length
   261	        : null;
   262	
   263	    const impactValues = eventImpacts
   264	      .map((row) => Number(row.impact_score))
   265	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   266	    const avgImpact =
   267	      impactValues.length > 0
   268	        ? impactValues.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / impactValues.length
   269	        : null;
   270	
   271	    const dbSnapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   272	      activeEvents,
   273	      highPriorityAccounts: highPriority,
   274	      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   275	    };
   276	    const snapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   277	      activeEvents: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.activeEvents ?? dbSnapshot.activeEvents,
   278	      highPriorityAccounts:
   279	        aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.highPriorityAccounts ?? dbSnapshot.highPriorityAccounts,
   280	      updatedAt: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.updatedAt ?? dbSnapshot.updatedAt,
   281	    };
   282	
   283	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   284	    const asOf = snapshot.updatedAt;
   285	    const cl = trustedMarket.cl.value;
   286	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   287	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   288	    const cl5dText =
   289	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   290	    const fallbackCards: VegasIntelCards = {
   291	      upcomingEvents: {
   292	        title: "Upcoming Events",
   293	        body: nextEvent
   294	          ? `${events14d} events are scheduled over the next 14 days (${events30d} over 30 days). Next demand catalyst is ${nextEvent.event_name} on ${nextEvent.event_date}.`
   295	          : "Hard stop: no verified vegas.events rows are available for upcoming demand-window analysis.",
   296	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.upcomingEvents,
   297	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "upcomingEvents", trustedUrls),
   298	      },
   299	      aiSalesStrategy: {
   300	        title: "AI Sales Strategy",
   301	        body: activeRestaurants.length === 0 || events.length === 0
   302	          ? "Hard stop: account-targeted strategy is blocked because verified event or active-account rows are missing."
   303	          : `Prioritize high-volume active accounts ahead of the ${events14d > 0 ? "next two-week event cluster" : "next demand window"}. Average modeled event impact is ${avgImpact?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Current oil-cost backdrop is CL ${cl?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"} with 5-day ${cl5dText} and VIX ${vix?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, so cost-certainty messaging should be staged and urgency-tiered.`,
   304	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.aiSalesStrategy,
   305	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "aiSalesStrategy", trustedUrls),
   306	      },
   307	      restaurantAccounts: {
   308	        title: "Restaurant Accounts",
   309	        body: latestScores.length === 0
   310	          ? "Hard stop: no verified vegas.customer_scores rows are available for account-priority ranking."
   311	          : `Latest scoring window (${latestScoreDate}) covers ${latestScores.length} accounts with average opportunity score ${avgScore?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Sequence outreach from highest opportunity tier first, then roll down by event-window overlap.`,
   312	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.restaurantAccounts,
   313	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "restaurantAccounts", trustedUrls),
   314	      },
   315	      fryerTracking: {
   316	        title: "Fryer Equipment Tracking",
   317	        body: fryers.length === 0
   318	          ? "Hard stop: fryer lifecycle guidance is blocked because no verified vegas.fryers rows are available."

   373	      cards,
   374	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   375	    });
   376	  } catch (err) {
   377	    return NextResponse.json(
   378	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   379	      { status: 500 },
   380	    );
   381	  }
   382	}

    45	function toChartDay(dateStr: string): Time {
    46	  return dateStr.slice(0, 10) as unknown as Time;
    47	}
    48	
    49	function computeVolatility(bars: ZlPriceBar[]): string {
    50	  const recent = bars.slice(-20);
    51	  if (recent.length < 2) return "--";
    52	  const returns: number[] = [];
    53	  for (let i = 1; i < recent.length; i++) {
    54	    returns.push(Math.log(recent[i].close / recent[i - 1].close));
    55	  }
    56	  const mean = returns.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / returns.length;
    57	  const variance =
    58	    returns.reduce((a, b) => a + (b - mean) ** 2, 0) / returns.length;
    59	  return (Math.sqrt(variance) * Math.sqrt(252) * 100).toFixed(1) + "%";
    60	}
    61	
    62	function computeSmaData(candles: CandlestickData<Time>[], period: number): { time: Time; value: number }[] {
    63	  if (candles.length < period) return [];
    64	
    65	  const result: { time: Time; value: number }[] = [];
    66	  let rollingSum = 0;
    67	
    68	  for (let i = 0; i < candles.length; i += 1) {
    69	    rollingSum += candles[i].close;
    70	    if (i >= period) {
    71	      rollingSum -= candles[i - period].close;
    72	    }
    73	    if (i >= period - 1) {
    74	      result.push({
    75	        time: candles[i].time,
    76	        value: rollingSum / period,
    77	      });
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  return result;
    82	}

    84	export function ZlCandlestickChart({
    85	  height = "70vh",
    86	  targetZones = [],
    87	}: {
    88	  height?: string | number;
    89	  targetZones?: TargetZone[];

    96

    98	  const [lastPrice, setLastPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
    99	  const [priceChange, setPriceChange] = useState(0);
   100	  const [highPrice, setHighPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   101	  const [lowPrice, setLowPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   102	  const [volatility, setVolatility] = useState("--");
   103	
   104	  // Fetch daily bars

   108	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/price-1d", { cache: "no-store" });

   112

   116	            tradeDate: String(d.tradeDate),
   117	            open: Number(d.open),

   122	          }),

   126

   128	        const prev = parsed[parsed.length - 2];

   130	        setHighPrice(latest.high);
   131	        setLowPrice(latest.low);
   132	        setVolatility(computeVolatility(parsed));
   133	
   134	        if (prev) {
   135	          setPriceChange(((latest.close - prev.close) / prev.close) * 100);
   136	        }
   137	      } catch {
   138	        /* fail silently — chart stays empty */
   139	      }
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    fetchBars();
   143	    const id = setInterval(fetchBars, REFRESH_MS);
   144	    return () => clearInterval(id);
   145	  }, []);
   146

   149	    if (!containerRef.current || bars.length === 0) return;

   151	    // Clean up previous
   152	    if (chartRef.current) {
   153	      try {
   154	        chartRef.current.remove();
   155	      } catch {

   157	      }

   167	        fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",

   170	      },

   228	      }))
   229	      .sort((a, b) => String(a.time).localeCompare(String(b.time)));
   230

   240

   243

   262	    }
   263	
   264	    // Forecast target zones should be projected near the most recent bars, not full-width.
   265	    if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   266	      const targetStartIndex = Math.max(0, candleData.length - 16);
   267	      const targetStartTime = candleData[targetStartIndex]?.time;
   268	      forecastTargetsPrimitive.setTargetZones(targetZones, targetStartTime);
   269	    }
   270

   273	      time: idx,
   274	      open: b.open,
   275	      high: b.high,
   276	      low: b.low,

   279	    }));
   280	
   281	    const currentPrice = bars[bars.length - 1]?.close;
   282	    let fibResult = fibLockedRef.current;
   283	    if (
   284	      !fibResult ||
   285	      currentPrice == null ||
   286	      currentPrice > fibResult.anchorHigh ||
   287	      currentPrice < fibResult.anchorLow
   288	    ) {
   289	      fibResult = calculateFibonacciMultiPeriod(fibCandles);
   290	      fibLockedRef.current = fibResult;
   291	    }
   292	
   293	    if (fibResult) {
   294	      const anchorIdx = Math.min(
   295	        fibResult.anchorHighBarIndex,
   296	        fibResult.anchorLowBarIndex,
   297	      );
   298	      const anchorStartTime = candleData[anchorIdx]?.time;
   299	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(fibResult, anchorStartTime);
   300	    } else {
   301	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(null);
   302	    }
   303	
   304	    // Set initial visible range: last N bars + right padding
   305	    if (!fitCalledRef.current && candleData.length > 0) {
   306	      const total = candleData.length;
   307	      const visible = Math.min(INITIAL_VISIBLE_BARS, total);
   308	      chart.timeScale().setVisibleLogicalRange({
   309	        from: Math.max(0, total - visible),
   310	        to: total - 1 + RIGHT_PADDING_BARS,
   311	      });
   312	      fitCalledRef.current = true;
   313	    }

   318	      if (disposed || !entries[0]) return;
   319	      const { width, height: h } = entries[0].contentRect;
   320	      try {

     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
     4	import type { ZlLivePrice } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     5	
     6	const POLL_MS = 30_000; // 30s polling interval
     7	
     8	export function useZlLivePrice() {
     9	  const [live, setLive] = useState<ZlLivePrice | null>(null);
    10	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    11	  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
    12	
    13	  useEffect(() => {
    14	    mountedRef.current = true;
    15	
    16	    async function fetchLive() {
    17	      try {
    18	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/live", { cache: "no-store" });
    19	        if (!res.ok) {
    20	          setError(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
    21	          return;
    22	        }
    23	        const json = await res.json();
    24	        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
    25	        if (json.ok && json.data) {
    26	          setLive(json.data);
    27	          setError(null);
    28	        }
    29	      } catch {
    30	        if (mountedRef.current) setError("Network error");
    31	      }
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    fetchLive();
    35	    const id = setInterval(fetchLive, POLL_MS);
    36	
    37	    return () => {
    38	      mountedRef.current = false;
    39	      clearInterval(id);
    40	    };
    41	  }, []);
    42	
    43	  return { live, error };
    44	}

===== app/api/zl/live/route.ts
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, ZlLivePrice } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	export async function GET() {
     8	  try {
     9	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    10	    if (unauthorized) {
    11	      return unauthorized;
    12	    }
    13	
    14	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    15	
    16	    const { data: row, error } = await supabase
    17	      .schema("mkt")
    18	      .from("latest_price")
    19	      .select("symbol, price, observed_at")
    20	      .eq("symbol", "ZL")
    21	      .maybeSingle();
    22	
    23	    if (error) {
    24	      return NextResponse.json(
    25	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    26	        { status: 500 },
    27	      );
    28	    }
    29	
    30	    const live: ZlLivePrice | null = row
    31	      ? { symbol: row.symbol, price: Number(row.price), observedAt: row.observed_at }
    32	      : null;
    33	
    34	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ZlLivePrice | null> = {
    35	      ok: true,
    36	      data: live,
    37	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    38	      source: "mkt.latest_price",
    39	    };
    40	
    41	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    42	  } catch (err) {
    43	    return NextResponse.json(
    44	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    45	      { status: 500 },
    46	    );
    47	  }
    48	}
===== app/api/zl/price-1d/route.ts
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, ZlPriceBar } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	type PriceRow = {
     8	  symbol: string;
     9	  bucket_ts: string;
    10	  open: number | string;
    11	  high: number | string;
    12	  low: number | string;
    13	  close: number | string;
    14	  volume: number | string | null;
    15	};
    16	
    17	function dayKey(tsIso: string): string {
    18	  return tsIso.slice(0, 10);
    19	}
    20	
    21	function buildLatestDatabentoDailyFromHourly(rows: PriceRow[]): ZlPriceBar | null {
    22	  if (rows.length === 0) return null;
    23	
    24	  const latestDay = dayKey(rows[0].bucket_ts);
    25	  const sameDayRows = rows.filter((row) => dayKey(row.bucket_ts) === latestDay);
    26	  if (sameDayRows.length === 0) return null;
    27	
    28	  sameDayRows.sort(
    29	    (a, b) => new Date(a.bucket_ts).getTime() - new Date(b.bucket_ts).getTime(),
    30	  );
    31	
    32	  const parsedRows = sameDayRows
    33	    .map((row) => ({
    34	      open: Number(row.open),
    35	      high: Number(row.high),
    36	      low: Number(row.low),
    37	      close: Number(row.close),
    38	      volume: Number(row.volume ?? 0),
    39	    }))
    40	    .filter(
    41	      (row) =>
    42	        Number.isFinite(row.open) &&
    43	        Number.isFinite(row.high) &&
    44	        Number.isFinite(row.low) &&
    45	        Number.isFinite(row.close),
    46	    );
    47	
    48	  if (parsedRows.length === 0) return null;
    49	
    50	  const open = parsedRows[0].open;
    51	  const close = parsedRows[parsedRows.length - 1].close;
    52	  let high = parsedRows[0].high;
    53	  let low = parsedRows[0].low;
    54	  let volume = 0;
    55	
    56	  for (const row of parsedRows) {
    57	    if (row.high > high) high = row.high;
    58	    if (row.low < low) low = row.low;
    59	    if (Number.isFinite(row.volume)) volume += row.volume;
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  return {
    63	    symbol: "ZL",
    64	    tradeDate: `${latestDay}T00:00:00+00:00`,
    65	    open,
    66	    high,
    67	    low,
    68	    close,
    69	    volume,
    70	  };
    71	}
    72	
    73	export async function GET() {
    74	  try {
    75	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    76	    if (unauthorized) {
    77	      return unauthorized;
    78	    }
    79	
    80	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    81	
    82	    // Supabase Data API commonly enforces a max-row cap (default 1000).
    83	    // Pull newest rows first so we always include the current chart window.
    84	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    85	      .schema("mkt")
    86	      .from("price_1d")
    87	      .select("symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume")
    88	      .eq("symbol", "ZL")
    89	      .order("bucket_ts", { ascending: false })
    90	      .limit(1000);
    91	
    92	    if (error) {
    93	      return NextResponse.json(
    94	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    95	        { status: 500 },
    96	      );
    97	    }
    98	
    99	    const bars: ZlPriceBar[] = (rows ?? [])
   100	      .map((row) => ({
   101	      symbol: row.symbol,
   102	      tradeDate: row.bucket_ts,
   103	      open: Number(row.open),
   104	      high: Number(row.high),
   105	      low: Number(row.low),
   106	      close: Number(row.close),
   107	      volume: Number(row.volume),
   108	      }))
   109	      .sort(
   110	        (a, b) => new Date(a.tradeDate).getTime() - new Date(b.tradeDate).getTime(),
   111	      );
   112	
   113	    const { data: hourlyRows } = await supabase
   114	      .schema("mkt")
   115	      .from("price_1h")
   116	      .select("symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume")
   117	      .eq("symbol", "ZL")
   118	      .order("bucket_ts", { ascending: false })
   119	      .limit(96);
   120	
   121	    const databentoLatest = buildLatestDatabentoDailyFromHourly(
   122	      (hourlyRows ?? []) as PriceRow[],
   123	    );
   124	
   125	    if (databentoLatest) {
   126	      const lastBar = bars[bars.length - 1] ?? null;
   127	      const lastDay = lastBar ? dayKey(lastBar.tradeDate) : null;
   128	      const databentoDay = dayKey(databentoLatest.tradeDate);
   129	
   130	      if (!lastDay || databentoDay > lastDay) {
   131	        bars.push(databentoLatest);
   132	      } else if (databentoDay === lastDay && lastBar) {
   133	        bars[bars.length - 1] = databentoLatest;
   134	      }
   135	    }
   136	
   137	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ZlPriceBar[]> = {
   138	      ok: true,
   139	      data: bars,
   140	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   141	      source: databentoLatest
   142	        ? "mkt.price_1d + Databento (mkt.price_1h latest daily bar)"
   143	        : "mkt.price_1d",
   144	    };
   145	
   146	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
   147	  } catch (err) {
   148	    return NextResponse.json(
   149	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   150	      { status: 500 },
   151	    );
   152	  }
   153	}

===== app/api/zl/intraday/route.ts

    18	      .schema("mkt")

    31	    const bars: ZlPriceBar[] = (rows ?? []).map((row) => ({
    32	      symbol: row.symbol,
    33	      tradeDate: row.bucket_ts,

    35	      high: Number(row.high),

    43	      data: bars,
    44	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    45	      source: "mkt.price_15m",

    53	    );

===== app/api/zl/forecast/route.ts
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, ForecastSummary } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
     8	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
     9	  7: 30,
    10	  14: 90,
    11	  30: 180,
    12	};
    13	
    14	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    15	  horizon_days: number;
    16	  model_version: string | null;
    17	}): number | null {
    18	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    19	    return row.horizon_days;
    20	  }
    21	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    22	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    23	  }
    24	  return null;
    25	}
    26	
    27	export async function GET() {
    28	  try {
    29	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    30	    if (unauthorized) {
    31	      return unauthorized;
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    35	
    36	    // Get the latest forecast summaries (most recent forecast_date)
    37	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    38	      .schema("forecasts")
    39	      .from("forecast_summary_1d")
    40	      .select("horizon_days, predicted_price, hit_probability, model_version, forecast_date")
    41	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    42	      .limit(20);
    43	
    44	    if (error) {
    45	      return NextResponse.json(
    46	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    47	        { status: 500 },
    48	      );
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    52	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ForecastSummary[]> = {
    53	        ok: true,
    54	        data: [],
    55	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    56	        source: "forecasts.forecast_summary_1d",
    57	      };
    58	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    // Filter to the latest forecast_date only
    62	    const latestDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    63	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === latestDate);
    64	
    65	    const deduped = new Map<number, ForecastSummary>();
    66	    for (const row of latestRows) {
    67	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    68	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    69	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    70	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    71	        horizonDays,
    72	        predictedPrice: Number(row.predicted_price),
    73	        hitProbability: Number(row.hit_probability ?? 0),
    74	        modelVersion: row.model_version,
    75	      });
    76	    }
    77	    const forecasts = [...deduped.values()].sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays);
    78	
    79	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<ForecastSummary[]> = {
    80	      ok: true,
    81	      data: forecasts,
    82	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    83	      source: "forecasts.forecast_summary_1d",
    84	    };
    85	
    86	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    87	  } catch (err) {
    88	    return NextResponse.json(
    89	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    90	      { status: 500 },
    91	    );
    92	  }
    93	}
===== app/api/zl/forecast-targets/route.ts
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	
     6	type ForecastTarget = {
     7	  id: string;
     8	  horizonDays: number;
     9	  horizonLabel: string;
    10	  priceLow: number;
    11	  priceHigh: number;
    12	  oofPrice: number;
    13	  coveragePct: number | null;
    14	};
    15	
    16	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
    17	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
    18	  7: 30,
    19	  14: 90,
    20	  30: 180,
    21	};
    22	
    23	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    24	  horizon_days: number;
    25	  model_version: string | null;
    26	}): number | null {
    27	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    28	    return row.horizon_days;
    29	  }
    30	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    31	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    32	  }
    33	  return null;
    34	}
    35	
    36	function horizonLabel(days: number): string {
    37	  if (days === 30) return "1M";
    38	  if (days === 90) return "3M";
    39	  if (days === 180) return "6M";
    40	  return `${days}d`;
    41	}
    42	
    43	export async function GET() {
    44	  try {
    45	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    46	    if (unauthorized) {
    47	      return unauthorized;
    48	    }
    49	
    50	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    51	
    52	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    53	      .schema("forecasts")
    54	      .from("target_zones")
    55	      .select("forecast_date, horizon_days, p30, p50, p70, model_version")
    56	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    57	      .limit(60);
    58	
    59	    if (error) {
    60	      return NextResponse.json(
    61	        { error: error.message, asOfDate: null, targets: [] as ForecastTarget[] },
    62	        { status: 500 },
    63	      );
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    67	      return NextResponse.json({
    68	        asOfDate: null,
    69	        targets: [] as ForecastTarget[],
    70	      });
    71	    }
    72	
    73	    const asOfDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    74	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === asOfDate);
    75	    const deduped = new Map<number, ForecastTarget>();
    76	    for (const row of latestRows) {
    77	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    78	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    79	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    80	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    81	        id: `${row.forecast_date}-${horizonDays}`,
    82	        horizonDays,
    83	        horizonLabel: horizonLabel(horizonDays),
    84	        priceLow: Number(row.p30),
    85	        priceHigh: Number(row.p70),
    86	        oofPrice: Number(row.p50),
    87	        coveragePct: null,
    88	      });
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    const targets: ForecastTarget[] = [...deduped.values()]
    92	      .sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays)
    93	      .map((r) => ({
    94	        id: r.id,
    95	        horizonDays: r.horizonDays,
    96	        horizonLabel: r.horizonLabel,
    97	        priceLow: r.priceLow,
    98	        priceHigh: r.priceHigh,
    99	        oofPrice: r.oofPrice,
   100	        coveragePct: r.coveragePct,
   101	      }));
   102	
   103	    return NextResponse.json({
   104	      asOfDate,
   105	      targets,
   106	    });
   107	  } catch (err) {
   108	    return NextResponse.json(
   109	      { error: String(err), asOfDate: null, targets: [] as ForecastTarget[] },
   110	      { status: 500 },
   111	    );
   112	  }
   113	}
===== app/api/zl/target-zones/route.ts
     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     4	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope, TargetZone } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const;
     8	const LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP: Record<number, (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]> = {
     9	  7: 30,
    10	  14: 90,
    11	  30: 180,
    12	};
    13	
    14	function normalizeHorizon(row: {
    15	  horizon_days: number;
    16	  model_version: string | null;
    17	}): number | null {
    18	  if (AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(row.horizon_days as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number])) {
    19	    return row.horizon_days;
    20	  }
    21	  if (row.model_version?.startsWith("trusted-fill-v1")) {
    22	    return LEGACY_HORIZON_MAP[row.horizon_days] ?? null;
    23	  }
    24	  return null;
    25	}
    26	
    27	export async function GET() {
    28	  try {
    29	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    30	    if (unauthorized) {
    31	      return unauthorized;
    32	    }
    33	
    34	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    35	
    36	    // Get the latest target zones (most recent forecast_date, all horizons)
    37	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    38	      .schema("forecasts")
    39	      .from("target_zones")
    40	      .select("horizon_days, p30, p50, p70, model_version, generated_at, forecast_date")
    41	      .order("forecast_date", { ascending: false })
    42	      .limit(20);
    43	
    44	    if (error) {
    45	      return NextResponse.json(
    46	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    47	        { status: 500 },
    48	      );
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    52	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<TargetZone[]> = {
    53	        ok: true,
    54	        data: [],
    55	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    56	        source: "forecasts.target_zones",
    57	      };
    58	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    // Get the latest forecast_date and filter to only that date's zones
    62	    const latestDate = rows[0].forecast_date;
    63	    const latestZones = rows.filter((r) => r.forecast_date === latestDate);
    64	
    65	    const deduped = new Map<number, TargetZone>();
    66	    for (const row of latestZones) {
    67	      const horizonDays = normalizeHorizon(row);
    68	      if (!horizonDays) continue;
    69	      if (deduped.has(horizonDays)) continue;
    70	      deduped.set(horizonDays, {
    71	        horizonDays,
    72	        p30: Number(row.p30),
    73	        p50: Number(row.p50),
    74	        p70: Number(row.p70),
    75	        generatedAt: row.generated_at,
    76	      });
    77	    }
    78	    const zones = [...deduped.values()].sort((a, b) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays);
    79	
    80	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<TargetZone[]> = {
    81	      ok: true,
    82	      data: zones,
    83	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    84	      source: "forecasts.target_zones",
    85	    };
    86	
    87	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    88	  } catch (err) {
    89	    return NextResponse.json(
    90	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    91	      { status: 500 },
    92	    );
    93	  }
    94	}

    10	type BiasTone = "bullish" | "bearish" | "neutral"
    11	
    12	type SentimentCardContent = Pick<AiCardContent, "title" | "body"> & Partial<AiCardContent>

    14	type SentimentCards = {

    20	function normalizeBias(raw: string): BiasTone {
    21	  const value = raw.trim().toLowerCase()
    22	  if (value.includes("bull")) return "bullish"
    23	  if (value.includes("bear")) return "bearish"
    24	  return "neutral"
    25	}
    26	
    27	function biasStyle(tone: BiasTone): { label: string; chip: string; text: string } {
    28	  if (tone === "bullish") {
    29	    return {
    30	      label: "Bullish",
    31	      chip: "bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/20",
    32	      text: "text-emerald-400",
    33	    }
    34	  }
    35	  if (tone === "bearish") {
    36	    return {
    37	      label: "Bearish",
    38	      chip: "bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20",
    39	      text: "text-red-400",
    40	    }
    41	  }
    42	  return {
    43	    label: "Neutral",
    44	    chip: "bg-slate-500/10 border-slate-500/20",
    45	    text: "text-slate-300",
    46	  }
    47	}
    48	
    49	function scoreLabel(score: number): string {
    50	  if (score >= 25) return "Positive Momentum"
    51	  if (score <= -25) return "Defensive Momentum"
    52	  return "Balanced Momentum"
    53	}
    54	
    55	function scoreTextColor(score: number): string {
    56	  if (score >= 25) return "text-emerald-400"
    57	  if (score <= -25) return "text-red-400"
    58	  return "text-amber-400"
    59	}
    60	
    61	function formatTimestamp(value: string): string {
    62	  const parsed = new Date(value)
    63	  if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return value
    64	  return parsed.toLocaleString()
    65	}

    95

    97	    let active = true
    98	
    99	    async function load() {
   100	      try {
   101	        const [overviewRes, liveRes] = await Promise.all([
   102	          fetch("/api/sentiment/overview", { cache: "no-store" }),
   103	          fetch("/api/zl/live", { cache: "no-store" }),
   104	        ])
   105

   107	          cards?: SentimentCards

   109	        }
   110	        const liveBody = (await liveRes.json()) as ApiEnvelope<ZlLivePrice | null> & {
   111	          error?: string
   112	        }

   120	          setOverview(null)
   121	          setCards(null)
   122	        }
   123

   125	          setLive(liveBody.data)

   128	        }

   130	        if (active) {

   136	        if (active) setLoading(false)

   168	    ]

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"

    10	type LegislationCards = {
    11	  feedSummary: AiCardContent
    12	  sourcePressure: AiCardContent
    13	  tagPressure: AiCardContent
    14	}
    15	
    16	function safeDate(value: string): Date | null {
    17	  const parsed = new Date(value)
    18	  return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed
    19	}
    20	
    21	function formatDisplayDate(value: string): string {
    22	  const parsed = safeDate(value)
    23	  return parsed ? parsed.toLocaleDateString() : value
    24	}
    25	
    26	function hoursAgo(value: string, nowMs: number | null): string {
    27	  const parsed = safeDate(value)
    28	  if (!parsed || nowMs === null) return "Unknown"
    29	  const deltaMs = nowMs - parsed.getTime()
    30	  if (deltaMs < 0) return "Now"
    31	  if (deltaMs < 3_600_000) return "Now"
    32	  const hours = Math.floor(deltaMs / 3_600_000)
    33	  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`
    34	  return `${Math.floor(hours / 24)}d ago`
    35	}
    36	
    37	function MetricCard({
    38	  title,
    39	  value,
    40	  subtext,
    41	  icon: Icon,

    45	  subtext: string
    46	  icon: typeof Activity
    47	}) {

    50	      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
    51	        <div className="text-xs text-white uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">
    52	          {title}
    53	        </div>
    54	        <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" />
    55	      </div>
    56	      <div className="text-3xl font-bold font-mono text-white mb-1">{value}</div>
    57	      <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">{subtext}</div>
    58	    </div>
    59	  )
    60	}
