    73	        const res = await fetch("/api/legislation/feed", { cache: "no-store" })
    74	        const body = (await res.json()) as ApiEnvelope<LegislationItem[]> & {
    75	          cards?: LegislationCards
    76	          error?: string
    77	        }
    78	        if (!active) return
    79	        if (res.ok && body.ok && Array.isArray(body.data)) {
    80	          setItems(body.data)
    81	          setCards(body.cards ?? null)
    82	        } else {
    83	          setItems([])
    84	          setCards(null)
    85	        }
    86	      } catch {
    87	        if (active) {
    88	          setItems([])
    89	          setCards(null)
    90	        }
    91	      } finally {
    92	        if (active) setLoading(false)
    93	      }
    94	    }
    95	
    96	    void load()
    97	    return () => {
    98	      active = false
    99	    }
   100	  }, [])
   101	
   102	  useEffect(() => {
   103	    setClientNow(Date.now())
   104	  }, [])
   105	
   106	  const analytics = useMemo(() => {
   107	    const timestamps = items
   108	      .map((item) => safeDate(item.publishedAt)?.getTime() ?? null)
   109	      .filter((ts): ts is number => ts !== null)
   110	
   111	    const last24h =
   112	      clientNow === null ? 0 : timestamps.filter((ts) => clientNow - ts <= 86_400_000).length
   113	    const last7d =
   114	      clientNow === null ? 0 : timestamps.filter((ts) => clientNow - ts <= 604_800_000).length
   115	    const dailyBaseline = last7d > 0 ? last7d / 7 : 0
   116	    const pulseRatio = dailyBaseline > 0 ? last24h / dailyBaseline : 0
   117	
   118	    const sourceMap = new Map<string, number>()
   119	    const tagMap = new Map<string, number>()
   120	
   121	    for (const item of items) {
   122	      sourceMap.set(item.source, (sourceMap.get(item.source) ?? 0) + 1)
   123	      for (const tag of item.tags ?? []) {
   124	        tagMap.set(tag, (tagMap.get(tag) ?? 0) + 1)
   125	      }
   126	    }
   127	
   128	    const sources = Array.from(sourceMap.entries())
   129	      .map(([source, count]) => ({ source, count }))
   130	      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
   131	    const tags = Array.from(tagMap.entries())
   132	      .map(([tag, count]) => ({ tag, count }))
   133	      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
   134	
   135	    return {
   136	      last24h,
   137	      pulseRatio,
   138	      uniqueSources: sourceMap.size,
   139	      uniqueTags: tagMap.size,
   140	      sources,
   141	      tags,
   142	      topSourceCount: sources[0]?.count ?? 0,
   143	      topTagCount: tags[0]?.count ?? 0,
   144	    }
   145	  }, [items, clientNow])
   146	
   147	  return (
   148	    <BackendShell>
   149	      <div className="w-full space-y-8">
   150	        <header className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
   151	          <div>
   152	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
   153	              <Gavel className="w-8 h-8" />
   154	              <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white">
   155	                Policy Intelligence
   156	              </h1>
   157	            </div>
   158	            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm font-mono">
   159	              Federal regulations, executive actions, and congressional activity affecting soybean oil procurement
   160	            </p>
   161	          </div>
   162	        </header>
   163	
   164	        {analytics.pulseRatio >= 1.5 && (
   165	          <div className="p-3 rounded-xl border bg-amber-500/5 border-amber-500/20 flex items-center gap-3">
   166	            <div className="relative flex h-2.5 w-2.5 text-amber-400">
   167	              <span className="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-current opacity-75" />
   168	              <span className="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2.5 w-2.5 bg-current" />
   169	            </div>
   170	            <Radio size={12} className="text-amber-400" />
   171	            <span className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-amber-400">
   172	              News Pulse {analytics.pulseRatio.toFixed(1)}x
   173	            </span>
   174	            <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   175	              {analytics.last24h} items in 24h
   176	            </span>
   177	          </div>
   178	        )}
   179	
   180	        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
   181	          <MetricCard
   182	            title="Policy Items"
   183	            value={items.length}
   184	            subtext="Latest merged federal and congressional feed"
   185	            icon={Newspaper}
   186	          />
   187	          <MetricCard
   188	            title="Active Sources"
   189	            value={analytics.uniqueSources}
   190	            subtext="Distinct source systems in current feed"
   191	            icon={Building2}
   192	          />
   193	          <MetricCard
   194	            title="24h Activity"
   195	            value={analytics.last24h}
   196	            subtext="Items published in the last 24 hours"
   197	            icon={Activity}
   198	          />
   199	          <MetricCard
   200	            title="Tagged Signals"
   201	            value={analytics.uniqueTags}
   202	            subtext="Unique policy tags attached to records"
   203	            icon={Tag}
   204	          />
   205	          <MetricCard

   208	            subtext="24h publication rate vs 7-day baseline"
   209	            icon={Radio}
   210	          />
   211	        </div>
   212

   214	          <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-widest border-l-2 border-cyan-500 pl-3 mb-8">

     5	export function createSupabaseAdminClient() {

     7	  const serviceRoleKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;

     1	import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
     2	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     3	
     4	import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
     5	import { hasEnvVars } from "@/lib/utils";
     6	
     7	export async function requireAuthenticatedApiRequest() {
     8	  if (!hasEnvVars) {
     9	    return NextResponse.json(
    10	      { ok: false, error: "Supabase auth env vars are not configured" },
    11	      { status: 503 },
    12	    );
    13	  }
    14	
    15	  const supabase = await createClient();
    16	  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getClaims();
    17	
    18	  if (error || !data?.claims) {
    19	    return NextResponse.json(
    20	      { ok: false, error: "Authentication required" },
    21	      { status: 401 },
    22	    );
    23	  }
    24	
    25	  return null;
    26	}
    27	
    28	export async function requireAuthenticatedPageSession() {
    29	  if (!hasEnvVars) {
    30	    redirect("/auth/login");
    31	  }
    32	
    33	  const supabase = await createClient();
    34	  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getClaims();
    35	
    36	  if (error || !data?.claims) {
    37	    redirect("/auth/login");
    38	  }
    39	}

    45	function toDateIso(ts: number | null | undefined): string | null {
    46	  if (typeof ts !== "number" || !Number.isFinite(ts)) return null;
    47	  return new Date(ts * 1000).toISOString();
    48	}
    49	
    50	async function fetchJson<T>(url: string): Promise<T | null> {
    51	  try {
    52	    const res = await fetch(url, {
    53	      headers: {
    54	        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Codex Trusted Source Pull)",
    55	      },
    56	      cache: "no-store",
    57	    });
    58	    if (!res.ok) return null;
    59	    return (await res.json()) as T;
    60	  } catch {
    61	    return null;
    62	  }
    63	}
    64	
    65	async function fetchYahooSeries(symbol: string): Promise<TrustedSeriesPoint & { change5d: number | null }> {
    66	  const url = `https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/${encodeURIComponent(
    67	    symbol,
    68	  )}?interval=1d&range=1mo`;
    69	  const payload = await fetchJson<YahooChartResponse>(url);
    70	  const result = payload?.chart?.result?.[0];
    71	  const timestamps = result?.timestamp ?? [];
    72	  const closes = result?.indicators?.quote?.[0]?.close ?? [];
    73	
    74	  let latestClose: number | null = null;
    75	  let latestTs: number | null = null;
    76	  for (let i = closes.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
    77	    const close = closes[i];
    78	    if (typeof close === "number" && Number.isFinite(close)) {
    79	      latestClose = close;
    80	      latestTs = timestamps[i] ?? null;
    81	      break;
    82	    }
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  let anchorClose: number | null = null;
    86	  let validSeen = 0;
    87	  for (let i = closes.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
    88	    const close = closes[i];
    89	    if (typeof close !== "number" || !Number.isFinite(close)) continue;
    90	    validSeen += 1;
    91	    if (validSeen >= 6) {
    92	      anchorClose = close;
    93	      break;
    94	    }
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  const change5d =
    98	    latestClose !== null && anchorClose !== null && anchorClose !== 0
    99	      ? (latestClose - anchorClose) / anchorClose
   100	      : null;
   101	
   102	  return {
   103	    value: latestClose,
   104	    asOf: toDateIso(latestTs ?? result?.meta?.regularMarketTime ?? null),
   105	    source: "Yahoo Finance",
   106	    url,
   107	    change5d,
   108	  };
   109	}
   110	
   111	async function fetchFredLatest(seriesId: string): Promise<TrustedSeriesPoint> {
   112	  const url = `https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=${encodeURIComponent(seriesId)}`;
   113	  try {
   114	    const res = await fetch(url, { cache: "no-store" });
   115	    if (!res.ok) {
   116	      return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   117	    }
   118	    const csv = await res.text();
   119	    const lines = csv.trim().split("\n");
   120	    for (let i = lines.length - 1; i >= 1; i -= 1) {
   121	      const row = lines[i];
   122	      const [date, value] = row.split(",", 2);
   123	      if (!date || !value || value === ".") continue;
   124	      const n = Number(value);
   125	      if (!Number.isFinite(n)) continue;
   126	      return {
   127	        value: n,
   128	        asOf: new Date(`${date}T00:00:00Z`).toISOString(),
   129	        source: "FRED",
   130	        url,
   131	      };
   132	    }
   133	  } catch {
   134	    return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   135	  }
   136	  return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   137	}
   138	
   139	export async function fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot(): Promise<TrustedMarketSnapshot> {
   140	  const [zl, cl, cny, vix, ovx] = await Promise.all([
   141	    fetchYahooSeries("ZL=F"),
   142	    fetchYahooSeries("CL=F"),
   143	    fetchYahooSeries("CNY=X"),
   144	    fetchFredLatest("VIXCLS"),
   145	    fetchFredLatest("OVXCLS"),
   146	  ]);
   147	
   148	  return {
   149	    fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   150	    zl,
   151	    cl,
   152	    cny,
   153	    vix,
   154	    ovx,
   155	  };
   156	}
   157	
   158	export function uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(snapshot: TrustedMarketSnapshot): string[] {
   159	  return [snapshot.zl.url, snapshot.cl.url, snapshot.cny.url, snapshot.vix.url, snapshot.ovx.url]
   160	    .filter((u, idx, arr) => typeof u === "string" && arr.indexOf(u) === idx);
   161	}

     3	
     4	export type AiSnapshotMeta = {
     5	  generatedAt: string;
     6	  model: string;
     7	  reasoningEffort: string;
     8	  source?: string;
     9	  refreshScheduleEt?: string;
    10	};
    11	
    12	export type AiEnvelopeMeta = {
    13	  enabled: boolean;
    14	  source: string;
    15	  model: string | null;
    16	  reasoningEffort: string | null;
    17	  generatedAt: string | null;
    18	  refreshScheduleEt: string | null;
    19	};
    20	
    21	const TRUSTED_SNAPSHOT_SOURCES = new Set([
    22	  "trusted-live-pull",
    23	  "trusted-authority-pull",
    24	  "ai-daily-refresh",
    25	  "chatgpt-pro-subscription-refresh",
    26	]);
    27	
    28	const SNAPSHOT_LOADERS: Record<string, () => Promise<unknown>> = {
    29	  "app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json": async () =>
    30	    (await import("@/app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json")).default,
    31	  "app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json": async () =>
    32	    (await import("@/app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json")).default,
    33	  "app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json": async () =>
    34	    (await import("@/app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json")).default,
    35	  "app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json": async () =>
    36	    (await import("@/app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json")).default,
    37	  "app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json": async () =>
    38	    (await import("@/app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json")).default,
    39	};
    40	
    41	function coerceSnapshot<T extends object>(parsed: unknown): (T & AiSnapshotMeta) | null {
    42	  if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") return null;
    43	  const candidate = parsed as T & Partial<AiSnapshotMeta>;
    44	  if (typeof candidate.generatedAt !== "string" || candidate.generatedAt.trim().length === 0) return null;
    45	  if (typeof candidate.model !== "string" || candidate.model.trim().length === 0) return null;
    46	  if (typeof candidate.reasoningEffort !== "string" || candidate.reasoningEffort.trim().length === 0) return null;
    47	  const snapshotSource =
    48	    typeof candidate.source === "string" ? candidate.source.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    49	  if (!TRUSTED_SNAPSHOT_SOURCES.has(snapshotSource)) return null;
    50	  return candidate as T & AiSnapshotMeta;
    51	}
    52	
    53	export async function readAiSnapshot<T extends object>(
    54	  relativePathFromRepoRoot: string,
    55	): Promise<(T & AiSnapshotMeta) | null> {
    56	  try {
    57	    const loader = SNAPSHOT_LOADERS[relativePathFromRepoRoot];
    58	    if (loader) {
    59	      const imported = await loader();
    60	      const validated = coerceSnapshot<T>(imported);
    61	      if (validated) return validated;
    62	    }
    63	
    64	    const fullPath = path.join(
    65	      /* turbopackIgnore: true */ process.cwd(),
    66	      relativePathFromRepoRoot,
    67	    );
    68	    const raw = await readFile(fullPath, "utf8");
    69	    return coerceSnapshot<T>(JSON.parse(raw));
    70	  } catch {
    71	    return null;
    72	  }
    73	}
    74	
    75	export function toAiEnvelopeMeta(snapshot: AiSnapshotMeta | null): AiEnvelopeMeta {
    76	  return {
    77	    enabled: Boolean(snapshot),
    78	    source: snapshot?.source ?? "none",
    79	    model: snapshot?.model ?? null,
    80	    reasoningEffort: snapshot?.reasoningEffort ?? null,
    81	    generatedAt: snapshot?.generatedAt ?? null,
    82	    refreshScheduleEt: snapshot?.refreshScheduleEt ?? null,
    83	  };
    84	}

    43	  as_of_date_max?: string
    44	  mixed_vintage?: boolean
    45	  drivers: {

    59	
    60	function formatFreshnessLabel(
    61	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    62	): string | null {
    63	  if (!payload) return null
    64	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    65	    return `Mixed vintage ${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    66	  }
    67	  return payload.as_of_date ? `Data as of ${payload.as_of_date}` : null
    68	}
    69	
    70	function formatFreshnessSummary(
    71	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    72	): string {
    73	  if (!payload) return "–"
    74	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    75	    return `${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    76	  }
    77	  return payload.as_of_date ?? "–"
    78	}

    86	  "Crush Pressure": "Crush Margins",
    87	  "China Tension": "China / Trade Risk",
    88	  "Tariff Threat": "Macro / Geopolitical",
    89	  "Macro Threat": "Macro / Geopolitical",
    90	  "Energy Stress": "Energy / Oil",
    91	}
    92	
    93	const LEVEL_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
    94	  "Gap Risk": "Extreme Risk", "Fund Exit": "High Risk",
    95	  "Spread Widening": "Elevated", Compressing: "Very Calm",
    96	  "Risk Off": "Risk Off", "High Alert": "High Alert",
    97	  Elevated: "Elevated", Normal: "Normal", Calm: "Calm",
    98	  "Plant Idling": "Margins Collapsing", "Margin Squeeze": "Margins Squeezed",
    99	  "Max Utilization": "Strong Margins", "Breakeven Risk": "Breakeven Risk",
   100	  Comfortable: "Comfortable", Strong: "Strong Margins",
   101	  "Monitor Flows": "Watch Closely", "Brazil Favored": "Low Risk",
   102	  "Brazil Dominates": "Stable", "Trade Diversion": "Trade Diversion",
   103	  "Active Conflict": "Active Conflict",
   104	  "Systemic Shock": "Systemic Shock",
   105	  "Elevated Risk": "Elevated",
   106	  Watch: "Watch",
   107	  Contained: "Contained",
   108	  "Active War": "Active Trade War", "Retaliation Risk": "High Risk",
   109	  "Elevated Noise": "Elevated", "Background Noise": "Background",
   110	  "Minimal Threat": "Quiet",
   111	  Crisis: "Energy Crisis", "Supply Shock": "Supply Shock", "Low Risk": "Low Risk",
   112	}
   113	
   114	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115	// Score → color
   116	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117	
   118	function getScoreColor(score: number): { stroke: string; glow: string } {
   119	  const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score))
   120	  if (s <= 25) return { stroke: "#22C55E", glow: "rgba(34,197,94,0.5)" }
   121	  if (s <= 40) {
   122	    const t = (s - 25) / 15
   123	    return {
   124	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)})`,
   125	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   126	    }
   127	  }
   128	  if (s <= 55) return { stroke: "#EAB308", glow: "rgba(234,179,8,0.5)" }
   129	  if (s <= 70) {
   130	    const t = (s - 55) / 15
   131	    return {
   132	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)})`,
   133	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   134	    }
   135	  }
   136	  if (s <= 85) return { stroke: "#EF7300", glow: "rgba(239,115,0,0.5)" }
   137	  return { stroke: "#EF4444", glow: "rgba(239,68,68,0.6)" }
   138	}
   139	
   140	function getScoreTextColor(score: number | null): string {
   141	  if (score === null) return "text-slate-500"
   142	  if (score >= 70) return "text-red-400"
   143	  if (score >= 55) return "text-orange-400"
   144	  if (score >= 40) return "text-amber-400"
   145	  return "text-green-400"
   146	}
   147	
   148	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149	// Horizontal Meter
   150	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   151	
   152	function HorizontalMeter({ score }: { score: number | null }) {
   153	  if (score === null) {
   154	    return (
   155	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   156	        <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden" />
   157	        <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right text-slate-500">
   158	          --
   159	        </span>
   160	      </div>
   161	    )
   162	  }
   163	
   164	  const pct = Math.min(Math.max(score, 0), 100)
   165	  const colors = getScoreColor(score)
   166	  return (
   167	    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   168	      <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   169	        <div
   170	          className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ease-out"
   171	          style={{ width: `${pct}%`, backgroundColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${colors.glow}` }}
   172	        />
   173	      </div>
   174	      <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right" style={{ color: colors.stroke }}>
   175	        {Math.round(score)}
   176	      </span>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}
   180	
   181	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182	// Driver Card
   183	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   184	
   185	interface MetricDef {
   186	  key: string
   187	  label: string
   188	  format: (v: number | null) => string
   189	}
   190	
   191	function DriverCard({
   192	  label,
   193	  data,
   194	  metrics,
   195	  loading,
   196	}: {
   197	  label: string
   198	  data: DriverData | null
   199	  metrics: MetricDef[]
   200	  loading: boolean
   201	}) {
   202	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false)
   203	  const score = data?.score ?? null
   204	  const level = data?.level ? (LEVEL_LABELS[data.level] ?? data.level) : "--"
   205	  const colors = getScoreColor(score ?? 0)
   206	  const wh = data?.whatsHappening
   207	
   208	  const border =
   209	    score !== null && score >= 65
   210	      ? { borderColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${colors.glow}` }
   211	      : { borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }
   212	
   213	  return (
   214	    <div
   215	      className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300"
   216	      style={border}
   217	    >
   218	      <div className="text-base font-bold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   219	        {DRIVER_NAMES[label] ?? label}
   220	        {data?.aiPowered && (
   221	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">AI</span>
   222	        )}
   223	      </div>
   224	
   225	      <div className="w-full mb-2">
   226	        {loading ? (
   227	          <div className="h-3 bg-slate-700/50 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
   228	        ) : (
   229	          <HorizontalMeter score={score} />
   230	        )}
   231	      </div>
   232	
   233	      <div className={`text-lg font-medium mt-1 mb-4 ${loading ? "text-slate-600" : getScoreTextColor(score)}`}>
   234	        {loading ? "..." : level}
   235	      </div>
   236	
   237	      <div className="w-full space-y-2 border-t border-white/5 pt-4">
   238	        {metrics.map((m) => {
   239	          const val = data?.components?.[m.key] ?? null
   240	          return (
   241	            <div key={m.key} className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
   242	              <span className="text-slate-400">{m.label}</span>
   243	              <span className="text-slate-200 font-mono">{loading ? "--" : m.format(val)}</span>
   244	            </div>
   245	          )
   246	        })}
   247	      </div>
   248	
   249	      <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed min-h-[40px]">
   250	        {loading ? "..." : (data?.headline ?? "--")}
   251	      </div>
   252	
   253	      {!loading && data?.dataDate && (
   254	        <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-mono">Data as of: {data.dataDate}</div>
   255	      )}
   256	
   257	      {wh && !loading && (
   258	        <button
   259	          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
   260	          className="mt-4 w-full px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-slate-800/80 hover:bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-slate-700/50"
   261	        >
   262	          <span>{expanded ? "\u25BC" : "\u25B6"}</span> What&apos;s Happening?
   263	        </button>
   264	      )}
   265	
   266	      {expanded && wh && (
   267	        <div className="mt-4 w-full text-left space-y-3 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-200">
   268	          <div className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed border-l-2 pl-3" style={{ borderColor: colors.stroke }}>
   269	            {wh.whatsHappening}
   270	          </div>
   271	          <div className="space-y-2 pt-1">
   272	            {[
   273	              { t: "Macro Context", c: wh.macroContext },
   274	              { t: "Supply & Demand", c: wh.supplyDemand },
   275	              { t: "Geopolitical", c: wh.geopolitical },
   276	              { t: "Market Sentiment", c: wh.investorSentiment },
   277	              { t: "Near-Term Outlook", c: wh.nearTermOutlook },
   278	            ].map((s) => (
   279	              <div key={s.t}>
   280	                <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">{s.t}</div>
   281	                <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 leading-snug">{s.c}</div>
   282	              </div>
   283	            ))}
   284	          </div>
   285	          <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   286	            <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">What This Means For You</div>
   287	            <div className="text-sm text-slate-200">{wh.zlImplication}</div>
   288	          </div>
   289	        </div>
   290	      )}
   291	    </div>
   292	  )
   293	}
   294	
   295	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   296	// Main Export
   297	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   298	
   299	export function MarketRiskFactors() {
   300	  const [data, setData] = useState<MarketDriversResponse | null>(null)
   301	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
   302	
   303	  useEffect(() => {
   304	    fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
   305	      .then((r) => {
   306	        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`)
   307	        return r.json()
   308	      })
   309	      .then((json) => {
   310	        if (!json.error) setData(json as MarketDriversResponse)
   311	      })
   312	      .catch(() => {})
   313	      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
   314	  }, [])
   315	
   316	  const d = data?.drivers
   317	
   318	  return (
   319	    <div className="w-full">
   320	      {/* Section Header */}
   321	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   322	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 border-l-4 border-cyan-500">
   323	          <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Market Risk Factors</h3>
   324	          <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/20">
   325	            KEY DRIVERS
   326	          </span>
   327	          {data?.summary?.alert_count != null && data.summary.alert_count > 0 && (
   328	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30">
   329	              {data.summary.alert_count} ALERT{data.summary.alert_count > 1 ? "S" : ""}
   330	            </span>
   331	          )}
   332	        </div>
   333	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   334	          {formatFreshnessLabel(data) && <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">{formatFreshnessLabel(data)}</span>}
   335	        </div>
   336	      </div>
   337	
   338	      {/* Summary Bar */}
   339	      {data?.summary && (
   340	        <div className="mb-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 text-sm">
   341	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   342	            Average Risk:{" "}
   343	            <span className="font-mono" style={{ color: getScoreColor(data.summary.average_pressure ?? 0).stroke }}>
   344	              {data.summary.average_pressure}
   345	            </span>
   346	          </div>
   347	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   348	            Top Concern:{" "}
   349	            <span className="text-slate-200">
   350	              {DRIVER_NAMES[data.summary.highest_pressure?.name ?? ""] ?? data.summary.highest_pressure?.name}
   351	            </span>{" "}
   352	            (<span className="font-mono" style={{ color: getScoreColor(data.summary.highest_pressure?.score ?? 0).stroke }}>
   353	              {data.summary.highest_pressure?.score}
   354	            </span>)
   355	          </div>
   356	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   357	            Freshness: <span className="text-slate-300">{formatFreshnessSummary(data)}</span>
   358	          </div>
   359	        </div>
   360	      )}

     4

    18	
    19	export function MarketIntelligenceRow() {
    20	  const [intelligence, setIntelligence] = useState<IntelligenceData | null>(null)
    21	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    22	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    23	
    24	  useEffect(() => {
    25	    let active = true
    26	
    27	    async function load() {
    28	      try {
    29	        const res = await fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
    30	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    31	        const json = (await res.json()) as RiskFactorsEnvelope
    32	        if (!active) return
    33	        if (json.intelligence) {
    34	          setIntelligence(json.intelligence)
    35	        } else {
    36	          setError("Unable to load market intelligence")
    37	        }
    38	      } catch (e) {
    39	        if (!active) return
    40	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Unable to load market intelligence")
    41	      } finally {
    42	        if (active) setLoading(false)
    43	      }
    44	    }
    45	
    46	    void load()
    47	    return () => {
    48	      active = false
    49	    }
    50	  }, [])

    65	        {error}
    66	      </div>

    68	  }

    74	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
    75	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    76	          <div
    77	            className="w-1 h-6 rounded-full"
    78	            style={{ backgroundColor: intelligence.zlColor }}
    79	          />

    82	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">
    83	              AI
    84	            </span>

   123	                    : driver.outlook === "BULLISH" ||
   124	                        driver.outlook === "SUPPORTIVE" ||

   127	                      : driver.outlook === "MIXED" ||

   134	              </span>
   135	              <span className="text-slate-500">{driver.detail}</span>
   136	            </div>
   137	          ))}
   138	        </div>
   139	      )}
   140	    </div>
   141	  )

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	interface ForecastTarget {
     6	  id: string
     7	  horizonDays: number
     8	  horizonLabel: string
     9	  priceLow: number | null
    10	  priceHigh: number | null
    11	  oofPrice: number | null
    12	  coveragePct: number | null
    13	  isMissing?: boolean
    14	}
    15	
    16	const BIN_COUNT = 11
    17	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const
    18	
    19	function horizonLabel(days: number): string {
    20	  if (days === 30) return "1M"
    21	  if (days === 90) return "3M"
    22	  if (days === 180) return "6M"
    23	  return `${days}d`
    24	}
    25	
    26	function clamp(v: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    27	  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v))
    28	}
    29	
    30	function cellAlpha(price: number, t: ForecastTarget): number {
    31	  if (t.priceLow === null || t.priceHigh === null || t.oofPrice === null) {
    32	    return 0.08
    33	  }
    34	
    35	  const low = Math.min(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    36	  const high = Math.max(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    37	  const halfWidth = Math.max((high - low) / 2, 0.1)
    38	  const centerDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / halfWidth
    39	  const insideZone = price >= low && price <= high
    40	
    41	  if (insideZone) {
    42	    return clamp(1 - centerDist * 0.75, 0.25, 1)
    43	  }
    44	
    45	  const outsideDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / (halfWidth * 2.5)
    46	  return clamp(0.18 - outsideDist * 0.12, 0.04, 0.18)
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function ProbabilitySurface() {
    50	  const [targets, setTargets] = useState<ForecastTarget[]>([])
    51	  const [asOfDate, setAsOfDate] = useState<string | null>(null)
    52	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    53	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    54	
    55	  useEffect(() => {
    56	    let cancelled = false
    57	
    58	    async function loadTargets() {
    59	      setLoading(true)
    60	      setError(null)
    61	      try {
    62	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/forecast-targets", { cache: "no-store" })
    63	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    64	        const json = await res.json()
    65	        if (cancelled) return
    66	        setTargets(
    67	          (json.targets ?? [])
    68	            .filter(
    69	              (t: ForecastTarget) =>
    70	                AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(t?.horizonDays as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]) &&
    71	                typeof t?.horizonDays === "number" &&
    72	                typeof t?.priceLow === "number" &&
    73	                typeof t?.priceHigh === "number" &&
    74	                typeof t?.oofPrice === "number",
    75	            )
    76	            .map((t: ForecastTarget) => ({
    77	              ...t,
    78	              horizonLabel: horizonLabel(t.horizonDays),
    79	            }))
    80	            .sort((a: ForecastTarget, b: ForecastTarget) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays),
    81	        )
    82	        setAsOfDate(json.asOfDate ?? null)
    83	      } catch (e) {
    84	        if (cancelled) return
    85	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to load target zones")
    86	      } finally {
    87	        if (!cancelled) setLoading(false)
    88	      }
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    loadTargets()
    92	    return () => { cancelled = true }
    93	  }, [])
    94	
    95	  const priceBins = useMemo(() => {
    96	    const resolvedTargets = targets.filter(
    97	      (t) => t.priceLow !== null && t.priceHigh !== null && t.oofPrice !== null,
    98	    )
    99	    if (resolvedTargets.length === 0) return [] as number[]
   100	
   101	    const low = Math.min(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.min(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   102	    const high = Math.max(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.max(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   103	    if (!Number.isFinite(low) || !Number.isFinite(high)) return [] as number[]
   104	
   105	    const span = Math.max(high - low, 1)
   106	    const min = low - span * 0.05
   107	    const max = high + span * 0.05
   108	    const step = (max - min) / (BIN_COUNT - 1)
   109	
   110	    return Array.from(
   111	      { length: BIN_COUNT },
   112	      (_, idx) => Number((max - idx * step).toFixed(2)),
   113	    )
   114	  }, [targets])
   115	
   116	  const displayTargets = useMemo(() => {
   117	    const byHorizon = new Map<number, ForecastTarget>()
   118	    for (const t of targets) byHorizon.set(t.horizonDays, t)
   119	
   120	    return AG_HORIZON_DAYS.map((horizonDays) => {
   121	      const resolved = byHorizon.get(horizonDays)
   122	      if (resolved) return resolved
   123	
   124	      return {
   125	        id: `missing-${horizonDays}`,
   126	        horizonDays,
   127	        horizonLabel: horizonLabel(horizonDays),
   128	        priceLow: null,
   129	        priceHigh: null,
   130	        oofPrice: null,
   131	        coveragePct: null,
   132	        isMissing: true,
   133	      } satisfies ForecastTarget
   134	    })
   135	  }, [targets])
   136	
   137	  const gridTemplateColumns = `56px repeat(${Math.max(displayTargets.length, 1)}, minmax(0,1fr))`
   138	
   139	  return (
   140	    <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
   141	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   142	        <div>
   143	          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">
   144	            L3 Probability Surface
   145	          </h3>
   146	          <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   147	            Real target zone density from latest AG trading-model forecast (1M/3M/6M)
   148	            {asOfDate ? ` (as of ${asOfDate})` : ""}
   149	          </p>
   150	        </div>
   151	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-slate-500">
   152	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   153	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/90" />
   154	            High
   155	          </div>
   156	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   157	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/20" />
   158	            Low
   159	          </div>
   160	        </div>
   161	      </div>
   162	
   163	      {loading && (
   164	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">Loading forecast density...</div>
   165	      )}
   166	
   167	      {!loading && error && (
   168	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-red-400">Failed to load probability data: {error}</div>
   169	      )}
   170	
   171	      {!loading && !error && targets.length === 0 && (
   172	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">
   173	          No production target zones available yet. This view populates automatically once forecast rows are present.
   174	        </div>
   175	      )}
   176	
   177	      {!loading && !error && targets.length > 0 && (
   178	        <div className="mt-6 space-y-2">
   179	          <div className="grid gap-1" style={{ gridTemplateColumns }}>
   180	            <div />
   181	            {displayTargets.map((t) => (
   182	              <div key={`h-${t.id}`} className="text-center text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">
   183	                <div>{t.horizonLabel}</div>
   184	                {t.isMissing && (
   185	                  <div className="text-[9px] text-slate-600">pending</div>
   186	                )}
   187	              </div>
   188	            ))}
   189	
   190	            {priceBins.map((price) => (
   191	              <React.Fragment key={`row-${price}`}>
   192	                <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 font-mono pr-2 text-right">
   193	                  ${price.toFixed(2)}
   194	                </div>
   195	                {displayTargets.map((t) => {
   196	                  const alpha = cellAlpha(price, t)
   197	                  const title = t.isMissing
   198	                    ? `${t.horizonLabel} | awaiting forecast rows`
   199	                    : `${t.horizonLabel} | zone $${t.priceLow!.toFixed(2)}-$${t.priceHigh!.toFixed(2)} | median $${t.oofPrice!.toFixed(2)}`
   200	                  return (
   201	                    <div
   202	                      key={`${t.id}-${price}`}
   203	                      className="h-5 rounded-[2px] border border-white/5"
   204	                      style={{
   205	                        backgroundColor: `rgba(34, 211, 238, ${alpha})`,

   207	                      }}
   208	                      title={title}
   209	                    />
   210	                  )
   211	                })}
   212	              </React.Fragment>
   213	            ))}

   221	              </div>

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
     4	import {
     5	  createChart,
     6	  LineSeries,
     7	  HistogramSeries,
     8	  ColorType,
     9	  LineStyle,
    10	  type IChartApi,
    11	  type Time,
    12	} from "lightweight-charts"
    13	
    14	type MarketRegime = "BULLISH" | "BEARISH" | "NEUTRAL" | "SUPPLY_CRISIS" | "DEMAND_SHOCK"
    15	
    16	const REGIME_COLORS: Record<MarketRegime, { bg: string; border: string }> = {
    17	  BULLISH: { bg: "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15)", border: "#22C55E" },
    18	  BEARISH: { bg: "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)", border: "#EF4444" },
    19	  NEUTRAL: { bg: "rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.1)", border: "#6B7280" },
    20	  SUPPLY_CRISIS: { bg: "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25)", border: "#DC2626" },
    21	  DEMAND_SHOCK: { bg: "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25)", border: "#16A34A" },
    22	}
    23	
    24	interface RegimeZone {
    25	  start: string
    26	  end: string
    27	  regime: MarketRegime
    28	}
    29	
    30	function toChartDay(dateStr: string): Time {
    31	  return dateStr.slice(0, 10) as unknown as Time
    32	}
    33	
    34	function rollingSma(values: number[], period: number): Array<number | null> {
    35	  const out: Array<number | null> = Array(values.length).fill(null)
    36	  if (period <= 0 || values.length < period) return out
    37	
    38	  let sum = 0
    39	  for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i += 1) {
    40	    sum += values[i]
    41	    if (i >= period) sum -= values[i - period]
    42	    if (i >= period - 1) out[i] = sum / period
    43	  }
    44	  return out
    45	}
    46	
    47	export function RegimeAnalysisChart({
    48	  height = 400,
    49	  timeRange = "1Y",
    50	}: {
    51	  height?: number
    52	  timeRange?: "1M" | "3M" | "6M" | "1Y"
    53	}) {
    54	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    55	  const chartRef = useRef<IChartApi | null>(null)
    56	  const [selectedRange, setSelectedRange] = useState(timeRange)
    57	  const [priceData, setPriceData] = useState<{ timestamp: string; close: number }[]>([])
    58	  const [currentRegime, setCurrentRegime] = useState<MarketRegime>("NEUTRAL")
    59	
    60	  useEffect(() => {
    61	    fetch("/api/zl/price-1d")
    62	      .then((r) => r.json())
    63	      .then((json) => {
    64	        if (json.data) {
    65	          setPriceData(
    66	            json.data.map((d: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
    67	              timestamp: String(d.tradeDate),
    68	              close: Number(d.close),
    69	            })),
    70	          )
    71	        }
    72	      })
    73	      .catch(() => {})
    74	  }, [])
    75	
    76	  useEffect(() => {
    77	    if (!containerRef.current || priceData.length === 0) return
    78	
    79	    // Filter by selected range
    80	    const days = { "1M": 30, "3M": 90, "6M": 180, "1Y": 365 }[selectedRange]
    81	    const cutoff = new Date()
    82	    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days)
    83	    const filtered = priceData.filter((d) => new Date(d.timestamp) >= cutoff)
    84	    if (filtered.length === 0) return
    85	
    86	    if (chartRef.current) {
    87	      try { chartRef.current.remove() } catch { /* disposed */ }
    88	      chartRef.current = null
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    const chart = createChart(containerRef.current, {
    92	      width: containerRef.current.clientWidth,
    93	      height,
    94	      layout: {
    95	        background: { type: ColorType.Solid, color: "transparent" },
    96	        textColor: "#525252",
    97	        attributionLogo: false,
    98	      },
    99	      grid: {
   100	        vertLines: { visible: false },
   101	        horzLines: { color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)" },
   102	      },
   103	      handleScroll: false,
   104	      handleScale: false,
   105	      crosshair: {
   106	        vertLine: {
   107	          color: "rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2)",
   108	          width: 1,
   109	          style: LineStyle.Dashed,
   110	          labelVisible: true,
   111	        },
   112	        horzLine: { visible: false, labelVisible: false },
   113	      },
   114	      timeScale: {
   115	        visible: true,
   116	        borderVisible: false,
   117	        fixLeftEdge: true,
   118	        fixRightEdge: true,
   119	      },
   120	      rightPriceScale: { borderVisible: false, visible: false },
   121	      leftPriceScale: { visible: true, borderVisible: false },
   122	    })
   123	
   124	    chartRef.current = chart
   125	
   126	    const lineData = filtered
   127	      .map((d) => ({ time: toChartDay(d.timestamp), value: d.close }))
   128	      .sort((a, b) => String(a.time).localeCompare(String(b.time)))
   129	
   130	    // SMA-based regime detection
   131	    const regimeZones: RegimeZone[] = []
   132	    let currentZoneStart = lineData[0]?.time as string
   133	    let prevRegime: MarketRegime = "NEUTRAL"
   134	
   135	    const closeValues = lineData.map((d) => d.value)
   136	    const shortPeriod = Math.min(20, Math.max(8, Math.floor(lineData.length * 0.35)))
   137	    const longPeriod = Math.min(50, Math.max(shortPeriod + 8, Math.floor(lineData.length * 0.75)))
   138	    const bullThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 1.02 : 1.01
   139	    const bearThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 0.98 : 0.99
   140	    const supplyThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 0.95 : 0.97
   141	    const demandThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 1.08 : 1.05
   142	    const smaShort = rollingSma(closeValues, shortPeriod)
   143	    const smaLong = rollingSma(closeValues, longPeriod)
   144	
   145	    for (let i = 0; i < lineData.length; i += 1) {
   146	      const sShort = smaShort[i]
   147	      const sLong = smaLong[i]
   148	      if (sShort == null || sLong == null) continue
   149	
   150	      const price = lineData[i].value
   151	      let regime: MarketRegime = "NEUTRAL"
   152	      if (sShort > sLong * bullThreshold && price > sShort) regime = "BULLISH"
   153	      else if (sShort < sLong * bearThreshold && price < sShort) regime = "BEARISH"
   154	      else if (price < sLong * supplyThreshold) regime = "SUPPLY_CRISIS"
   155	      else if (price > sLong * demandThreshold) regime = "DEMAND_SHOCK"
   156	
   157	      if (regime !== prevRegime) {
   158	        if (currentZoneStart) {
   159	          regimeZones.push({ start: currentZoneStart, end: lineData[i].time as string, regime: prevRegime })
   160	        }
   161	        currentZoneStart = lineData[i].time as string
   162	        prevRegime = regime
   163	      }
   164	    }
   165	
   166	    if (currentZoneStart && lineData.length > 0) {
   167	      regimeZones.push({ start: currentZoneStart, end: lineData[lineData.length - 1].time as string, regime: prevRegime })
   168	      setCurrentRegime(prevRegime)
   169	    }
   170	
   171	    // Draw regime zones as histogram background
   172	    for (const zone of regimeZones) {
   173	      const zoneData = lineData
   174	        .filter((d) => (d.time as string) >= zone.start && (d.time as string) <= zone.end)
   175	        .map((d) => ({ time: d.time, value: 1, color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg }))
   176	
   177	      if (zoneData.length > 0) {
   178	        const maxPrice = Math.max(...lineData.map((d) => d.value))
   179	        const minPrice = Math.min(...lineData.map((d) => d.value))
   180	        const range = maxPrice - minPrice
   181	
   182	        const zoneSeries = chart.addSeries(HistogramSeries, {
   183	          priceLineVisible: false,
   184	          lastValueVisible: false,
   185	          priceScaleId: "regime",
   186	          color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg,
   187	        })
   188	
   189	        zoneSeries.setData(
   190	          zoneData.map((d) => ({
   191	            time: d.time,
   192	            value: maxPrice + range * 0.1,
   193	            color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg,
   194	          })),
   195	        )
   196	      }
   197	    }
   198	
   199	    // Price line on top
   200	    const priceLine = chart.addSeries(LineSeries, {
   201	      color: "#ffffff",
   202	      lineWidth: 2,
   203	      priceLineVisible: false,
   204	      lastValueVisible: true,
   205	      priceScaleId: "left",
   206	    })
   207	    priceLine.setData(lineData)
   208	
   209	    chart.timeScale().fitContent()
   210	
   211	    let disposed = false
   212	    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
   213	      if (disposed || !entries[0]) return
   214	      const { width } = entries[0].contentRect
   215	      try { chart.applyOptions({ width, height }) } catch { /* disposed */ }
   216	    })
   217	    observer.observe(containerRef.current)
   218	
   219	    return () => {
   220	      disposed = true
   221	      observer.disconnect()
   222	      try { chart.remove() } catch { /* disposed */ }
   223	      chartRef.current = null
   224	    }
   225	  }, [priceData, selectedRange, height])
   226	
   227	  return (
   228	    <div className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
   229	      {/* Header */}
   230	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/5">
   231	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   232	          <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-white">ZL Futures - Regime Analysis</h3>
   233	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-bold uppercase bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30">
   234	            Beta
   235	          </span>
   236	          <span
   237	            className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase"
   238	            style={{
   239	              backgroundColor: REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].bg,
   240	              color: REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].border,
   241	              border: `1px solid ${REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].border}30`,
   242	            }}
   243	          >
   244	            {currentRegime.replace("_", " ")}
   245	          </span>
   246	        </div>
   247	
   248	        <div className="flex items-center bg-white/5 rounded-lg p-0.5">
   249	          {(["1M", "3M", "6M", "1Y"] as const).map((range) => (
   250	            <button
   251	              key={range}
   252	              onClick={() => setSelectedRange(range)}
   253	              className={`px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
   254	                selectedRange === range ? "bg-white/10 text-white" : "text-slate-500 hover:text-white"
   255	              }`}
   256	            >
   257	              {range}
   258	            </button>
   259	          ))}
   260	        </div>
   261	      </div>
   262	
   263	      {/* Chart */}
   264	      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ height }} />
   265	
   266	      {/* Legend */}
   267	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-6 py-2 border-t border-white/5 bg-white/[0.02]">
   268	        {(Object.entries(REGIME_COLORS) as [MarketRegime, { bg: string; border: string }][])
   269	          .map(([regime, colors]) => (
   270	            <div key={regime} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   271	              <div
   272	                className="w-3 h-3 rounded-sm"
   273	                style={{ backgroundColor: colors.bg, border: `1px solid ${colors.border}40` }}
   274	              />
   275	              <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase">
   276	                {regime.replace("_", " ")}
   277	              </span>
   278	            </div>
   279	          ))}
   280	      </div>
   281	    </div>
   282	  )
   283	}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	type DriverData = {
     6	  score: number | null
     7	  components?: Record<string, number | null>
     8	}
     9	
    10	type RiskFactorsResponse = {
    11	  drivers?: {
    12	    vix_stress?: DriverData
    13	    crush_pressure?: DriverData
    14	    china_tension?: DriverData
    15	    tariff_threat?: DriverData
    16	    energy_stress?: DriverData
    17	  }
    18	  summary?: {
    19	    average_pressure?: number
    20	  }
    21	}
    22	
    23	type TickerRow = {
    24	  label: string
    25	  sublabel: string
    26	  value: number | null
    27	  score: number | null
    28	}
    29	
    30	const PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT = 55
    31	const RISK_HIGH = 55
    32	const RISK_LOW = 45
    33	const HOURLY_REFRESH_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000
    34	
    35	function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    36	  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value))
    37	}
    38	
    39	function toNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
    40	  const parsed = Number(value)
    41	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null
    42	}
    43	
    44	function stateFromScore(score: number | null): -1 | 0 | 1 {
    45	  if (score == null) return 0
    46	  if (score >= RISK_HIGH) return -1
    47	  if (score <= RISK_LOW) return 1
    48	  return 0
    49	}
    50	
    51	function stateLabel(state: -1 | 0 | 1): string {
    52	  if (state === 1) return "▲"
    53	  if (state === -1) return "▼"
    54	  return "—"
    55	}
    56	
    57	function stateColor(state: -1 | 0 | 1): string {
    58	  if (state === 1) return "#26C6DA"
    59	  if (state === -1) return "#FF0000"
    60	  return "rgba(255,255,255,0.20)"
    61	}
    62	
    63	function formatValue(label: string, value: number | null): string {
    64	  if (value == null) return "—"
    65	  if (label === "CNY") return value.toFixed(4)
    66	  return value.toFixed(2)
    67	}
    68	
    69	export function MarketSymbolPressureBar() {
    70	  const [riskFactors, setRiskFactors] = useState<RiskFactorsResponse | null>(null)
    71	
    72	  useEffect(() => {
    73	    let active = true
    74	
    75	    async function load() {
    76	      try {
    77	        const riskRes = await fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
    78	        const riskJson = (await riskRes.json()) as RiskFactorsResponse
    79	
    80	        if (!active) return
    81	        setRiskFactors(riskJson)
    82	      } catch {
    83	        if (!active) return
    84	        setRiskFactors(null)
    85	      }
    86	    }
    87	
    88	    void load()
    89	    const interval = setInterval(load, HOURLY_REFRESH_MS)
    90	    return () => {
    91	      active = false
    92	      clearInterval(interval)
    93	    }
    94	  }, [])
    95	
    96	  const tickerData = useMemo<TickerRow[]>(() => {
    97	    const drivers = riskFactors?.drivers
    98	    const vix = drivers?.vix_stress
    99	    const crush = drivers?.crush_pressure
   100	    const china = drivers?.china_tension
   101	    const tariff = drivers?.tariff_threat
   102	    const energy = drivers?.energy_stress
   103	
   104	    return [
   105	      {
   106	        label: "CL",
   107	        sublabel: "Crude Oil",
   108	        value: toNumber(energy?.components?.cl_price),
   109	        score: toNumber(energy?.score),
   110	      },
   111	      {
   112	        label: "VIX",
   113	        sublabel: "Volatility",
   114	        value: toNumber(vix?.components?.vix_value),
   115	        score: toNumber(vix?.score),
   116	      },
   117	      {
   118	        label: "OVX",
   119	        sublabel: "Oil Volatility",
   120	        value: toNumber(energy?.components?.ovx_value) ?? toNumber(vix?.components?.ovx_value),
   121	        score: toNumber(energy?.score) ?? toNumber(vix?.score),
   122	      },
   123	      {
   124	        label: "CNY",
   125	        sublabel: "Yuan",
   126	        value: toNumber(china?.components?.cny_rate),
   127	        score: toNumber(china?.score),
   128	      },
   129	      {
   130	        label: "CRUSH",
   131	        sublabel: "Crush Margin",
   132	        value: toNumber(crush?.components?.board_crush_value),
   133	        score: toNumber(crush?.score) ?? toNumber(tariff?.score),
   134	      },
   135	    ]
   136	  }, [riskFactors])
   137	
   138	  const laneImpacts = tickerData.map((row) => {
   139	    const score = row.score
   140	    if (score == null) return 0
   141	    return 50 - score
   142	  })
   143	  const upPressure = laneImpacts.reduce((sum, impact) => sum + Math.max(0, impact), 0)
   144	  const downPressure = laneImpacts.reduce((sum, impact) => sum + Math.max(0, -impact), 0)
   145	  const totalAbs = upPressure + downPressure
   146	  const upPressurePct = totalAbs > 0 ? (upPressure / totalAbs) * 100 : 50
   147	  const downPressurePct = 100 - upPressurePct
   148	  const confluencePct = Math.max(upPressurePct, downPressurePct)
   149	
   150	  const netUpDominant = upPressurePct >= PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT
   151	  const netDownDominant = downPressurePct >= PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT
   152	  const netDirectionLabel = netUpDominant ? "Bullish" : netDownDominant ? "Bearish" : "Balanced"
   153	
   154	  return (
   155	    <div
   156	      className="flex flex-col w-full flex-shrink-0"
   157	      style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   158	    >
   159	      <div className="flex items-center gap-0 w-full overflow-x-auto">
   160	        {tickerData.map((row, index) => {
   161	          const laneImpact = laneImpacts[index] ?? 0
   162	          const lanePressurePct = totalAbs > 0 ? (Math.abs(laneImpact) / totalAbs) * 100 : 0
   163	          const state = stateFromScore(row.score)
   164	          const scoreOpacity = row.score == null ? 0.45 : clamp(0.45 + (Math.abs(laneImpact) / 50) * 0.55, 0.45, 1)
   165	          const tintAlpha =
   166	            row.score == null
   167	              ? 0.04
   168	              : clamp(0.07 + (lanePressurePct / 100) * 0.22, 0.07, 0.30)
   169	          const laneBg =
   170	            state === 1
   171	              ? `rgba(38, 198, 218, ${tintAlpha})`
   172	              : state === -1
   173	                ? `rgba(242, 54, 69, ${tintAlpha})`
   174	                : "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)"
   175	
   176	          return (
   177	            <div
   178	              key={row.label}
   179	              className="flex-1 min-w-[90px] px-3 py-0 flex flex-col gap-0"
   180	              style={{
   181	                background: laneBg,
   182	                borderRight: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
   183	                transition: "background 0.3s ease",
   184	                opacity: scoreOpacity,
   185	              }}
   186	            >
   187	              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   188	                <span className="text-[11px] font-bold" style={{ color: stateColor(state) }}>
   189	                  {stateLabel(state)}
   190	                </span>
   191	                <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/55 tracking-wide">
   192	                  {row.label}
   193	                </span>
   194	                <span className="text-[9px] text-white tracking-wider">
   195	                  {row.sublabel}
   196	                </span>
   197	              </div>
   198	              <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2 flex-wrap">
   199	                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-white tabular-nums">
   200	                  {formatValue(row.label, row.value)}
   201	                </span>
   202	                <span className="text-[10px] text-white tabular-nums">
   203	                  {row.score == null ? "—" : `${Math.round(row.score)}`}
   204	                </span>
   205	                <span className="text-[9px] text-white tabular-nums">
   206	                  {lanePressurePct.toFixed(0)}%
   207	                </span>
   208	              </div>
   209	            </div>
   210	          )
   211	        })}
   212	
   213	        <div
   214	          className="flex-none min-w-[80px] px-3 py-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-0"
   215	          style={{
   216	            background: netUpDominant
   217	              ? "rgba(38, 198, 218, 0.14)"
   218	              : netDownDominant
   219	                ? "rgba(242, 54, 69, 0.16)"
   220	                : "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",
   221	            borderLeft: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
   222	          }}
   223	        >
   224	          <span className="text-[9px] text-white/30 uppercase tracking-wider font-medium">
   225	            Pressure
   226	          </span>
   227	          <span
   228	            className="text-2xl leading-none font-extrabold tabular-nums"
   229	            style={{ color: "#FFFFFF" }}
   230	          >
   231	            {confluencePct.toFixed(0)}%
   232	          </span>
   233	          <span className="text-[9px] text-white uppercase tracking-wide">{netDirectionLabel}</span>
   234	        </div>
   235	      </div>
   236	    </div>
   237	  )
   238	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	import { requireAuthenticatedApiRequest } from "@/lib/server/auth-guards";
     5	import type { ApiEnvelope } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     6	
     7	type DashboardMetric = {
     8	  key: string;
     9	  label: string;
    10	  value: number;
    11	};
    12	
    13	export async function GET() {
    14	  try {
    15	    const unauthorized = await requireAuthenticatedApiRequest();
    16	    if (unauthorized) {
    17	      return unauthorized;
    18	    }
    19	
    20	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    21	
    22	    // Get the latest dashboard metrics
    23	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    24	      .schema("analytics")
    25	      .from("dashboard_metrics")
    26	      .select("metric_key, metric_value, trade_date")
    27	      .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
    28	      .limit(20);
    29	
    30	    if (error) {
    31	      return NextResponse.json(
    32	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    33	        { status: 500 },
    34	      );
    35	    }
    36	
    37	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    38	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DashboardMetric[]> = {
    39	        ok: true,
    40	        data: [],
    41	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    42	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
    43	      };
    44	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    45	    }
    46	
    47	    // Filter to latest trade_date
    48	    const latestDate = rows[0].trade_date;
    49	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestDate);
    50	
    51	    const metrics: DashboardMetric[] = latestRows.map((row) => ({
    52	      key: row.metric_key,
    53	      label: row.metric_key.replace(/_/g, " "),
    54	      value: Number(row.metric_value),
    55	    }));
    56	
    57	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DashboardMetric[]> = {
    58	      ok: true,
    59	      data: metrics,
    60	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    61	      source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
    62	    };
    63	
    64	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    65	  } catch (err) {
    66	    return NextResponse.json(
    67	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    68	      { status: 500 },
    69	    );
    70	  }
    71	}

    15	
    16	    // Get the latest regime state
    17	    const { data: row, error } = await supabase
    18	      .schema("analytics")
    19	      .from("regime_state_1d")
    20	      .select("regime, confidence, trade_date")
    21	      .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
    22	      .limit(1)
    23	      .maybeSingle();
    24	
    25	    if (error) {
    26	      return NextResponse.json(
    27	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    28	        { status: 500 },
    29	      );
    30	    }
    31	
    32	    const regime: RegimeState | null = row
    33	      ? {
    34	          regime: row.regime,
    35	          confidence: Number(row.confidence),
    36	          updatedAt: row.trade_date,
    37	        }
    38	      : null;
    39	
    40	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<RegimeState | null> = {
    41	      ok: true,
    42	      data: regime,
    43	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    44	      source: "analytics.regime_state_1d",
    45	    };
    46	
    47	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    48	  } catch (err) {
    49	    return NextResponse.json(
    50	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    51	      { status: 500 },
    52	    );
    53	  }
    54	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	
     5	export async function GET() {
     6	  const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
     7	  const siteUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL?.trim() ?? null;
     8	  const siteUrlConfigured = Boolean(siteUrl);
     9	  const siteUrlIsLocalhost = Boolean(siteUrl && siteUrl.includes("localhost"));
    10	
    11	  try {
    12	    const admin = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    13	    const { error } = await admin
    14	      .schema("ops")
    15	      .from("source_registry")
    16	      .select("source_id", { count: "exact", head: true })
    17	      .limit(1);
    18	
    19	    if (!error) {
    20	      return NextResponse.json({
    21	        ok: true,
    22	        dbReachable: true,
    23	        schemaReady: true,
    24	        siteUrlConfigured,
    25	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    26	        checkedAt,
    27	      });
    28	    }
    29	
    30	    const schemaNotReady = error.code === "42P01";
    31	
    32	    return NextResponse.json(
    33	      {
    34	        ok: schemaNotReady,
    35	        dbReachable: true,
    36	        schemaReady: false,
    37	        siteUrlConfigured,
    38	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    39	        error: error.message,
    40	        checkedAt,
    41	      },
    42	      { status: schemaNotReady ? 200 : 503 },
    43	    );
    44	  } catch (error) {
    45	    return NextResponse.json(
    46	      {
    47	        ok: false,
    48	        dbReachable: false,
    49	        schemaReady: false,
    50	        siteUrlConfigured,
    51	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    52	        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown health error",
    53	        checkedAt,
    54	      },
    55	      { status: 503 },
    56	    );
    57	  }
    58	}

    26	
    27	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    28	class PipelineConfig:
    29	    supabase_db_url: str | None
    30	    supabase_pooler_url: str | None
    31	    local_training_db_url: str
    32	    model_version: str
    33	    local_data_dir: Path
    34	    model_artifact_dir: Path
    35	
    36	
    37	def _first_non_empty(*values: str | None) -> str | None:
    38	    for value in values:
    39	        if value:
    40	            return value
    41	    return None
    42	
    43	
    44	def load_config() -> PipelineConfig:
    45	    import os
    46	
    47	    local_data_dir = Path(os.getenv("FUSION_LOCAL_DATA_DIR", "data/fusion")).expanduser()
    48	    model_artifact_dir = Path(os.getenv("FUSION_MODEL_ARTIFACT_DIR", "models/fusion")).expanduser()
    49	
    50	    return PipelineConfig(
    51	        # DATABASE_URL is the canonical cloud DB contract for V16.
    52	        # SUPABASE_DB_URL remains a compatibility alias for existing scripts.
    53	        supabase_db_url=_first_non_empty(
    54	            os.getenv("DATABASE_URL"),
    55	            os.getenv("SUPABASE_DB_URL"),
    56	            # Vercel env pull exposes direct Postgres URL under this key.
    57	            os.getenv("POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING"),
    58	        ),
    59	        # Keep compatibility with environments that expose POSTGRES_URL.
    60	        supabase_pooler_url=_first_non_empty(
    61	            os.getenv("SUPABASE_POOLER_URL"),
    62	            os.getenv("POSTGRES_URL"),
    63	        ),
    64	        local_training_db_url=_first_non_empty(
    65	            os.getenv("FUSION_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL"),
    66	            os.getenv("LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL"),
    67	            DEFAULT_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL,
    68	        )
    69	        or DEFAULT_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL,
    70	        model_version=os.getenv("MODEL_VERSION", "v16-scaffold"),
    71	        local_data_dir=local_data_dir,
    72	        model_artifact_dir=model_artifact_dir,
    73	    )
    74	
    75	
    76	def resolve_cloud_db_url() -> str | None:
    77	    cfg = load_config()
    78	    return cfg.supabase_db_url or cfg.supabase_pooler_url
    79	
    80	
    81	def resolve_local_training_db_url() -> str:
    82	    return load_config().local_training_db_url

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import argparse
     4	from typing import Callable
     5	
     6	from . import build_matrix
     7	from . import generate_forward_forecasts
     8	from . import generate_specialist_features
     9	from . import generate_specialist_signals
    10	from . import generate_target_zones

    13	from . import run_monte_carlo
    14	from . import training_readiness_gate
    15	from . import train_models
    16	
    17	PhaseFn = Callable[..., dict[str, object]]
    18	
    19	PHASE_MAP: dict[str, PhaseFn] = {
    20	    "matrix": build_matrix.run,
    21	    "specialists": generate_specialist_features.run,
    22	    "signals": generate_specialist_signals.run,
    23	    "train-readiness": training_readiness_gate.run,
    24	    "train": train_models.run,
    25	    "forecast": generate_forward_forecasts.run,
    26	    "monte-carlo": run_monte_carlo.run,
    27	    "garch": run_garch.run,
    28	    "target-zones": generate_target_zones.run,
    29	    "promote": promote_to_cloud.run,
    30	}
    31	
    32	PIPELINE_ORDER = [
    33	    "matrix",
    34	    "specialists",
    35	    "signals",
    36	    "train-readiness",
    37	    "train",
    38	    "forecast",
    39	    "garch",
    40	    "monte-carlo",
    41	    "target-zones",
    42	    "promote",
    43	]
    44	
    45	
    46	def run_phase(
    47	    name: str,
    48	    *,
    49	    dry_run: bool,
    50	    approve_training: bool,
    51	    approve_promotion: bool,
    52	) -> dict[str, object]:
    53	    fn = PHASE_MAP[name]
    54	    if name == "train":
    55	        return fn(dry_run=dry_run, approved=approve_training)
    56	    if name == "promote":
    57	        return fn(dry_run=dry_run or not approve_promotion, approved=approve_promotion)
    58	    return fn(dry_run=dry_run)
    59	
    60	
    61	def main() -> None:
    62	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ZINC Fusion v16 pipeline runner")
    63	    parser.add_argument("--all", action="store_true", help="Run all phases in pipeline order")
    64	    parser.add_argument("--phase", choices=PIPELINE_ORDER, help="Run one phase")
    65	    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true", help="Show intent only, no writes")
    66	    parser.add_argument(
    67	        "--approve-training",
    68	        action="store_true",
    69	        help="Explicit training approval gate for non-dry-run train phase",
    70	    )
    71	    parser.add_argument(
    72	        "--approve-promotion",
    73	        action="store_true",
    74	        help="Explicit cloud promotion approval gate for non-dry-run promote phase",
    75	    )
    76	    args = parser.parse_args()
    77	
    78	    selected: list[str]
    79	    if args.all:
    80	        selected = PIPELINE_ORDER
    81	    elif args.phase:
    82	        selected = [args.phase]
    83	    else:
    84	        parser.error("Select --all or --phase")
    85	
    86	    for phase in selected:
    87	        result = run_phase(
    88	            phase,
    89	            dry_run=args.dry_run,
    90	            approve_training=args.approve_training,
    91	            approve_promotion=args.approve_promotion,
    92	        )
    93	        print(result)
    94	
    95	
    96	if __name__ == "__main__":
    97	    main()

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import json
     4	import os
     5	import subprocess
     6	import sys

     8	from urllib.parse import urlparse
     9	from uuid import uuid4
    10	
    11	import pandas as pd

    14	from .artifacts import (
    15	    feature_columns,
    16	    matrix_path,
    17	    model_artifact_dir,
    18	    read_parquet,
    19	    target_columns,
    20	    training_runs_path,

    25	from .training_readiness_gate import run as run_training_readiness

    27	
    28	class TrainingApprovalError(RuntimeError):
    29	    pass
    30	
    31	
    32	class TrainingContractError(RuntimeError):
    33	    pass
    34	
    35	
    36	LOCKED_PRESET = "best_quality"
    37	LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS = 3600
    38	LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS = 5
    39	LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS = 1
    40	LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE = "full_zoo"
    41	LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE = "local_postgres"
    42	LOCKED_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY = 0.70
    43	MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS = 8
    44	MODEL_SELECTION_MODES = {"full_zoo", "include_only", "exclude_only"}
    45	TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES = {"local_postgres", "parquet_artifacts"}
    46	INTERNAL_MODEL_TYPE_EXCLUSIONS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    47	    "DUMMY",
    48	    "ENS_WEIGHTED",
    49	    "SIMPLE_ENS_WEIGHTED",
    50	    "GBM_PREP",
    51	    "AG_IMAGE_NN",
    52	    "AG_TEXT_NN",
    53	    "FASTTEXT",
    54	)
