    56	
    57	def _parse_int_env(name: str, default: int) -> int:
    58	    value = os.getenv(name)
    59	    if value is None or not value.strip():
    60	        return default
    61	    return int(value)
    62	
    63	
    64	def _parse_float_env(name: str, default: float) -> float:
    65	    value = os.getenv(name)
    66	    if value is None or not value.strip():
    67	        return default
    68	    return float(value)
    69	
    70	
    71	def _parse_csv_env(name: str, default: str = "") -> list[str]:
    72	    raw = os.getenv(name, default)
    73	    return [item.strip() for item in raw.split(",") if item.strip()]
    74	
    75	
    76	def _normalize_model_types(values: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    77	    normalized: list[str] = []
    78	    seen: set[str] = set()
    79	    for item in values:
    80	        key = item.strip().upper()
    81	        if not key or key in seen:
    82	            continue
    83	        seen.add(key)
    84	        normalized.append(key)
    85	    return normalized
    86	
    87	
    88	def _resolve_num_cpus() -> int:
    89	    requested = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_CPUS", 0)
    90	    if requested > 0:
    91	        return requested
    92	    cpu_total = os.cpu_count() or 1
    93	    return max(1, min(cpu_total, MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS))
    94	
    95	
    96	def _apply_runtime_thread_guard(*, num_cpus: int) -> dict[str, int]:
    97	    thread_budget = max(1, min(num_cpus, MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS))
    98	    runtime_vars = {
    99	        "OMP_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   100	        "OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   101	        "MKL_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   102	        "VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   103	        "NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   104	    }
   105	    for key, value in runtime_vars.items():
   106	        os.environ[key] = str(value)
   107	    return runtime_vars
   108	
   109	
   110	def _resolve_runtime_guard(*, dry_run: bool) -> dict[str, object]:
   111	    allow_unsafe = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUNTIME", "0").strip() == "1"
   112	    requires_guard = sys.version_info[:2] >= (3, 12)
   113	    runtime = {
   114	        "python_version": f"{sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}.{sys.version_info.micro}",
   115	        "python_executable": sys.executable,
   116	        "allow_unsafe_runtime": allow_unsafe,
   117	        "requires_safe_runtime": requires_guard,
   118	    }
   119	    if requires_guard and not allow_unsafe and not dry_run:
   120	        raise TrainingContractError(
   121	            "Unsafe AutoGluon runtime detected on Python 3.12+. "
   122	            "Use the project's .venv-ag311 environment for approved training runs, "
   123	            "or set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUNTIME=1 only for explicit crash-risk override runs."
   124	        )
   125	    return runtime
   126	
   127	
   128	def _resolve_openmp_runtime() -> dict[str, object]:
   129	    try:
   130	        import lightgbm  # noqa: F401
   131	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   132	        return {"detected": False, "error": f"lightgbm import failed: {exc}", "openmp_libraries": []}
   133	    try:
   134	        import sklearn  # noqa: F401
   135	    except Exception:
   136	        # sklearn import is optional for this guard; proceed with whatever is loaded.
   137	        pass
   138	
   139	    try:
   140	        from threadpoolctl import threadpool_info
   141	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   142	        return {"detected": False, "error": f"threadpoolctl unavailable: {exc}", "openmp_libraries": []}
   143	
   144	    info = threadpool_info()
   145	    openmp_libraries = sorted(
   146	        {
   147	            str(entry.get("filepath"))
   148	            for entry in info
   149	            if entry.get("user_api") == "openmp" and entry.get("filepath")
   150	        }
   151	    )
   152	    return {
   153	        "detected": True,
   154	        "openmp_libraries": openmp_libraries,
   155	        "openmp_library_count": len(openmp_libraries),
   156	    }
   157	
   158	
   159	def _discover_full_zoo_model_types() -> list[str]:
   160	    from autogluon.tabular.trainer.model_presets import presets
   161	
   162	    registry_keys = getattr(presets.ag_model_registry, "keys", [])
   163	    if not isinstance(registry_keys, list) or not registry_keys:
   164	        raise TrainingContractError("unable to discover AutoGluon model registry keys for full-zoo selection")
   165	
   166	    internal = set(INTERNAL_MODEL_TYPE_EXCLUSIONS)
   167	    selected: list[str] = []
   168	    for raw_key in registry_keys:
   169	        key = str(raw_key).strip().upper()
   170	        if not key:
   171	            continue
   172	        if key in internal:
   173	            continue
   174	        if key.startswith("IM_"):
   175	            continue
   176	        selected.append(key)
   177	    selected = _normalize_model_types(selected)
   178	    if not selected:
   179	        raise TrainingContractError("full-zoo selection resolved to 0 model types")
   180	    return selected
   181	
   182	
   183	def _resolve_model_selection(*, allow_override: bool) -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[str], bool]:
   184	    selection_mode = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE", LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE).strip().lower()
   185	    if selection_mode not in MODEL_SELECTION_MODES:
   186	        raise TrainingContractError(
   187	            f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE={selection_mode!r}; "
   188	            f"valid={sorted(MODEL_SELECTION_MODES)}"
   189	        )
   190	
   191	    requested_included = _normalize_model_types(_parse_csv_env("AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"))
   192	    requested_excluded = _normalize_model_types(_parse_csv_env("AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"))
   193	    available_full_zoo = _discover_full_zoo_model_types()
   194	    available_set = set(available_full_zoo)
   195	
   196	    unknown_included = sorted([value for value in requested_included if value not in available_set])
   197	    unknown_excluded = sorted([value for value in requested_excluded if value not in available_set])
   198	    if unknown_included or unknown_excluded:
   199	        raise TrainingContractError(
   200	            "unknown model types in selection request: "
   201	            + f"included_unknown={unknown_included}, excluded_unknown={unknown_excluded}"
   202	        )
   203	
   204	    if selection_mode == "full_zoo":
   205	        if not allow_override and (requested_included or requested_excluded):
   206	            raise TrainingContractError(
   207	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=full_zoo does not accept "
   208	                "AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES or AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES unless "
   209	                "AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1."
   210	            )
   211	        included_model_types = available_full_zoo
   212	        excluded_model_types: list[str] = []
   213	    elif selection_mode == "include_only":
   214	        if not requested_included:
   215	            raise TrainingContractError(
   216	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=include_only requires AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   217	            )
   218	        if requested_excluded:
   219	            raise TrainingContractError(
   220	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=include_only cannot be combined with "
   221	                "AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   222	            )
   223	        included_model_types = requested_included
   224	        excluded_model_types = []
   225	    else:
   226	        if requested_included:
   227	            raise TrainingContractError(
   228	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=exclude_only cannot be combined with "
   229	                "AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   230	            )
   231	        included_model_types = []
   232	        excluded_model_types = requested_excluded
   233	
   234	    return selection_mode, included_model_types, excluded_model_types, available_full_zoo, selection_mode == LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE
   235	
   236	
   237	def _resolve_training_source(*, allow_override: bool) -> str:
   238	    source = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE", LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE).strip().lower() or LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE
   239	    if source not in TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES:
   240	        raise TrainingContractError(
   241	            f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE={source!r}; valid={sorted(TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES)}"
   242	        )
   243	    if not allow_override and source != LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE:
   244	        raise TrainingContractError(
   245	            "Hard lock violation on AG training source: "
   246	            + f"AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE={source!r} (locked={LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE!r}). "
   247	            + "Set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1 only for explicit, approved override runs."
   248	        )
   249	    return source
   250	
   251	
   252	def _resolve_training_contract() -> tuple[int, str, int, int, str, list[str], list[str], list[str], str, bool, bool]:
   253	    allow_override = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE", "0").strip() == "1"
   254	    requested_time_limit = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS", LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS)
   255	    requested_presets = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_PRESETS", LOCKED_PRESET)
   256	    requested_num_bag_folds = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS", LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS)
   257	    requested_num_stack_levels = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS", LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS)
   258	    training_source = _resolve_training_source(allow_override=allow_override)
   259	    (
   260	        selection_mode,
   261	        included_model_types,
   262	        excluded_model_types,
   263	        available_full_zoo,
   264	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   265	    ) = _resolve_model_selection(allow_override=allow_override)
   266	
   267	    if allow_override:
   268	        return (
   269	            requested_time_limit,
   270	            requested_presets,
   271	            requested_num_bag_folds,
   272	            requested_num_stack_levels,
   273	            selection_mode,
   274	            included_model_types,
   275	            excluded_model_types,
   276	            available_full_zoo,
   277	            training_source,
   278	            False,
   279	            model_selection_lock_enforced,
   280	        )
   281	
   282	    conflicts: list[str] = []
   283	    if requested_time_limit != LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS:
   284	        conflicts.append(
   285	            f"AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS={requested_time_limit} (locked={LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS})"
   286	        )
   287	    if requested_presets != LOCKED_PRESET:
   288	        conflicts.append(f"AUTOGLUON_PRESETS={requested_presets!r} (locked={LOCKED_PRESET!r})")
   289	    if requested_num_bag_folds != LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS:
   290	        conflicts.append(
   291	            f"AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS={requested_num_bag_folds} (locked={LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS})"
   292	        )
   293	    if requested_num_stack_levels != LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS:
   294	        conflicts.append(
   295	            f"AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS={requested_num_stack_levels} (locked={LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS})"
   296	        )
   297	    if conflicts:
   298	        raise TrainingContractError(
   299	            "Hard lock violation on ZL AG training contract: "
   300	            + "; ".join(conflicts)
   301	            + ". Set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1 only for explicit, approved override runs."
   302	        )
   303	
   304	    return (
   305	        LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS,
   306	        LOCKED_PRESET,
   307	        LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS,
   308	        LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS,
   309	        selection_mode,
   310	        included_model_types,
   311	        excluded_model_types,
   312	        available_full_zoo,
   313	        training_source,
   314	        True,
   315	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   316	    )
   317	
   318	
   319	def _git_sha() -> str | None:
   320	    try:
   321	        return subprocess.check_output(["git", "rev-parse", "HEAD"], text=True).strip()
   322	    except Exception:
   323	        return None
   324	
   325	
   326	def _pip_freeze() -> list[str]:
   327	    try:
   328	        output = subprocess.check_output([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "freeze"], text=True)
   329	        return [line for line in output.splitlines() if line.strip()]
   330	    except Exception:
   331	        return []
   332	
   333	
   334	def _load_training_frame_from_artifacts(*, target_mode: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   335	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
   336	    if matrix.empty:
   337	        raise TrainingContractError("matrix artifact is empty")
   338	
   339	    labels = target_columns(matrix.columns)
   340	    expected_labels = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=h) for h in HORIZONS]
   341	    if labels != expected_labels:
   342	        missing = [label for label in expected_labels if label not in labels]
   343	        extra = [label for label in labels if label not in expected_labels]
   344	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unexpected target labels. missing={missing}, extra={extra}")
   345	
   346	    frame = matrix.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
   347	    if frame.empty:
   348	        raise TrainingContractError("matrix artifact has no training rows")
   349	    if target_mode not in {"price", "returns"}:
   350	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE={target_mode!r}")
   351	
   352	    if target_mode == "price":
   353	        for label in expected_labels:
   354	            usable = int(frame[label].notna().sum())
   355	            if usable == 0:
   356	                raise TrainingContractError(f"target label column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   357	        label_map = {horizon: TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon) for horizon in HORIZONS}
   358	        return frame, label_map
   359	
   360	    if "close" not in frame.columns:
   361	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires close column in matrix artifact")
   362	    close = pd.to_numeric(frame["close"], errors="coerce")
   363	    if (close <= 0).all():
   364	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires positive close values")
   365	
   366	    label_map: dict[int, str] = {}
   367	    for horizon in HORIZONS:
   368	        price_label = TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon)
   369	        returns_label = f"target_return_{horizon}d"
   370	        frame[returns_label] = pd.to_numeric(frame[price_label], errors="coerce") / close - 1.0
   371	        label_map[horizon] = returns_label
   372	
   373	    for label in label_map.values():
   374	        usable = int(frame[label].notna().sum())
   375	        if usable == 0:
   376	            raise TrainingContractError(f"returns target column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   377	
   378	    return frame, label_map
   379	
   380	
   381	def _validate_local_training_db_url(db_url: str) -> None:
   382	    parsed = urlparse(db_url)
   383	    if parsed.scheme not in {"postgres", "postgresql"}:
   384	        raise TrainingContractError(f"local AG DB URL must be postgres/postgresql, got: {parsed.scheme!r}")
   385	    host = (parsed.hostname or "").lower()
   386	    if host not in {"localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1"}:
   387	        raise TrainingContractError(
   388	            "local AG DB URL must resolve to localhost/127.0.0.1/::1. "
   389	            + f"got host={host or '<empty>'!r}"
   390	        )
   391	    db_name = (parsed.path or "").lstrip("/")
   392	    if db_name != "fusion":
   393	        raise TrainingContractError(
   394	            "local AG DB URL must target database 'fusion'. "
   395	            + f"got {db_name or '<empty>'!r}"
   396	        )
   397	
   398	
   399	def _load_training_frame_from_local_postgres(*, target_mode: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   400	    db_url = resolve_local_training_db_url()
   401	    _validate_local_training_db_url(db_url)
   402	
   403	    try:
   404	        with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_train_local_source") as conn:
   405	            with conn.cursor() as cur:
   406	                cur.execute("SELECT trade_date, feature_snapshot FROM training.matrix_1d ORDER BY trade_date")
   407	                matrix_rows = pd.DataFrame(cur.fetchall(), columns=["trade_date", "feature_snapshot"])
   408	                cur.execute(
   409	                    """
   410	                    SELECT trade_date, target_price_30d, target_price_90d, target_price_180d
   411	                    FROM training.matrix_targets_1d
   412	                    ORDER BY trade_date
   413	                    """
   414	                )
   415	                target_rows = pd.DataFrame(
   416	                    cur.fetchall(),
   417	                    columns=["trade_date", "target_price_30d", "target_price_90d", "target_price_180d"],
   418	                )
   419	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   420	        message = str(exc)

    77	    required_fred_series: tuple[str, ...]
    78	    min_daily_rows_per_symbol: int
    79	    min_hourly_rows_per_symbol: int
    80	    min_symbol_count: int
    81	    min_hourly_source_rows: int

    85	    min_fred_series: int
    86	    min_fred_rows: int
    87	    min_weather_series: int
    88	    min_weather_rows: int

    98	    min_specialist_feature_keys: int
    99	    min_signal_keys: int

   117	def _parse_csv(value: str | None, default: tuple[str, ...]) -> tuple[str, ...]:
   118	    if not value:
   119	        return default
   120	    parsed = tuple(item.strip().upper() for item in value.split(",") if item.strip())
   121	    return parsed or default
   122	
   123	
   124	def _parse_float(value: str | None, default: float) -> float:
   125	    if not value:
   126	        return default
   127	    return float(value)
   128	
   129	
   130	def _as_utc_datetime(value: Any) -> datetime | None:
   131	    if value is None:
   132	        return None
   133	    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   134	        return value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   135	    if isinstance(value, date):
   136	        return datetime(value.year, value.month, value.day, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   137	    if isinstance(value, str):
   138	        parsed = pd.to_datetime(value, errors="coerce", utc=True)
   139	        if pd.isna(parsed):
   140	            return None
   141	        return parsed.to_pydatetime()
   142	    return None
   143	
   144	
   145	def _age_hours(value: Any, now_utc: datetime) -> float | None:
   146	    dt = _as_utc_datetime(value)
   147	    if dt is None:
   148	        return None
   149	    return (now_utc - dt).total_seconds() / 3600.0
   150	
   151	
   152	def _age_days(value: Any, now_utc: datetime) -> float | None:
   153	    hours = _age_hours(value, now_utc)
   154	    if hours is None:
   155	        return None
   156	    return hours / 24.0
   157	
   158	
   159	def _ratio(numerator: int, denominator: int) -> float:
   160	    if denominator <= 0:
   161	        return 0.0
   162	    return float(numerator) / float(denominator)
   163	
   164	
   165	def _format_issues(issues: list[str]) -> str:
   166	    if len(issues) <= _ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT:
   167	        return "; ".join(issues)
   168	    shown = "; ".join(issues[:_ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT])
   169	    return f"{shown}; ... {len(issues) - _ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT} more"
   170	
   171	
   172	def _table_exists(cur: Any, *, schema: str, table: str) -> bool:
   173	    cur.execute(
   174	        """
   175	        SELECT EXISTS (
   176	          SELECT 1
   177	          FROM information_schema.tables
   178	          WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s
   179	        )
   180	        """,
   181	        (schema, table),
   182	    )
   183	    return bool(cur.fetchone()[0])
   184	
   185	
   186	def _column_exists(cur: Any, *, schema: str, table: str, column: str) -> bool:
   187	    cur.execute(
   188	        """
   189	        SELECT EXISTS (
   190	          SELECT 1
   191	          FROM information_schema.columns
   192	          WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s AND column_name = %s
   193	        )
   194	        """,
   195	        (schema, table, column),
   196	    )
   197	    return bool(cur.fetchone()[0])

   200	def _load_contract() -> TrainingGateContract:
   201	    enforce_parity = os.getenv("TRAINING_ENFORCE_CLOUD_LOCAL_PARITY", "0").strip().lower()
   202	    single_matrix = os.getenv("TRAINING_SINGLE_MATRIX_CONTRACT", "1").strip().lower()
   203	    require_options = os.getenv("TRAINING_REQUIRE_OPTIONS", "0").strip().lower()
   204	    return TrainingGateContract(
   205	        required_symbols=_parse_csv(
   206	            os.getenv("TRAINING_REQUIRED_SYMBOLS"),
   207	            (),
   208	        ),
   209	        required_fred_series=_parse_csv(
   210	            os.getenv("TRAINING_REQUIRED_FRED_SERIES"),
   211	            (),
   212	        ),
   213	        min_daily_rows_per_symbol=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_DAILY_ROWS_PER_SYMBOL", "250")),
   214	        min_hourly_rows_per_symbol=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_HOURLY_ROWS_PER_SYMBOL", "500")),
   215	        min_symbol_count=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SYMBOL_COUNT", "20")),
   216	        min_hourly_source_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_HOURLY_SOURCE_ROWS", "500000")),
   217	        min_matrix_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_MATRIX_ROWS", "500000")),
   218	        min_signal_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SIGNAL_ROWS", "250")),
   219	        min_specialist_feature_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SPECIALIST_FEATURE_ROWS", "250")),
   220	        min_fred_series=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_FRED_SERIES", "50")),
   221	        min_fred_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_FRED_ROWS", "500000")),
   222	        min_weather_series=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_WEATHER_SERIES", "4")),
   223	        min_weather_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_WEATHER_ROWS", "500000")),
   224	        min_alt_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_ALT_ROWS", "1")),
   225	        max_daily_price_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_DAILY_PRICE_AGE_DAYS", "4")),
   226	        max_hourly_price_age_hours=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_HOURLY_PRICE_AGE_HOURS", "72")),
   227	        max_factor_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_FACTOR_AGE_DAYS", "45")),
   228	        max_profarmer_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_PROFARMER_AGE_DAYS", "10")),
   229	        # Training labels require forward horizon availability; 180-day targets
   230	        # naturally shift max trade_date far behind "today".
   231	        max_training_trade_date_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_TRADE_DATE_AGE_DAYS", "320")),
   232	        max_daily_ohlc_violations=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_DAILY_OHLC_VIOLATIONS", "0")),
   233	        max_hourly_ohlc_violations=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_HOURLY_OHLC_VIOLATIONS", "0")),
   234	        min_matrix_feature_keys=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_MATRIX_FEATURE_KEYS", "20")),
   235	        min_specialist_feature_keys=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SPECIALIST_FEATURE_KEYS", "5")),
   236	        min_signal_keys=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SIGNAL_KEYS", str(len(SPECIALISTS) * 3))),
   237	        max_specialist_leakage_match_ratio=_parse_float(
   238	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_SPECIALIST_LEAKAGE_MATCH_RATIO"),
   239	            0.98,
   240	        ),
   241	        max_signal_identity_ratio=_parse_float(
   242	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_SIGNAL_IDENTITY_RATIO"),
   243	            0.98,
   244	        ),
   245	        enforce_cloud_local_parity=enforce_parity not in {"0", "false", "no", "off"},
   246	        max_cloud_local_date_lag_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_CLOUD_LOCAL_DATE_LAG_DAYS", "0")),
   247	        max_cloud_local_missing_ratio=_parse_float(
   248	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_CLOUD_LOCAL_MISSING_RATIO"),
   249	            0.0,
   250	        ),
   251	        max_cloud_local_value_mismatch_ratio=_parse_float(
   252	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_CLOUD_LOCAL_VALUE_MISMATCH_RATIO"),
   253	            0.0,
   254	        ),
   255	        cloud_local_value_tolerance=_parse_float(
   256	            os.getenv("TRAINING_CLOUD_LOCAL_VALUE_TOLERANCE"),
   257	            1e-9,
   258	        ),
   259	        single_matrix_training_contract=single_matrix not in {"0", "false", "no", "off"},
   260	        require_options_data=require_options in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"},
   261	        min_options_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_OPTIONS_ROWS", "1000")),
   262	        max_options_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_OPTIONS_AGE_DAYS", "14")),
   263	    )
   264	
   265	
   266	def _check_symbol_table(
   267	    cur: Any,
   268	    *,
   269	    schema: str,
   270	    table: str,
   271	    ts_column: str,
   272	    required_symbols: tuple[str, ...],
   273	    min_rows: int,
   274	    max_age_hours: int | None,
   275	    max_age_days: int | None,
   276	    now_utc: datetime,
   277	) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   278	    query = sql.SQL(
   279	        "SELECT symbol, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS row_count, MAX({ts_col}) AS latest_ts "
   280	        "FROM {schema_name}.{table_name} "
   281	        "WHERE symbol = ANY(%s) "
   282	        "GROUP BY symbol"
   283	    ).format(
   284	        ts_col=sql.Identifier(ts_column),
   285	        schema_name=sql.Identifier(schema),
   286	        table_name=sql.Identifier(table),
   287	    )
   288	    cur.execute(query, (list(required_symbols),))
   289	    rows = cur.fetchall()
   290	    by_symbol = {row[0].upper(): {"rows": int(row[1]), "latest": row[2]} for row in rows}
   291	    issues: list[str] = []
   292	
   293	    for symbol in required_symbols:
   294	        info = by_symbol.get(symbol)
   295	        if info is None:
   296	            issues.append(f"{symbol}: missing")
   297	            continue
   298	        if info["rows"] < min_rows:
   299	            issues.append(f"{symbol}: rows={info['rows']} (<{min_rows})")
   300	        if max_age_hours is not None:
   301	            age = _age_hours(info["latest"], now_utc)
   302	            if age is None:
   303	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: no latest timestamp")
   304	            elif age > max_age_hours:
   305	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: stale age_hours={age:.1f} (>{max_age_hours})")
   306	        if max_age_days is not None:
   307	            age_days = _age_days(info["latest"], now_utc)
   308	            if age_days is None:
   309	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: no latest timestamp")
   310	            elif age_days > max_age_days:
   311	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: stale age_days={age_days:.1f} (>{max_age_days})")
   312	
   313	    if issues:
   314	        return False, f"{schema}.{table} failed -> " + _format_issues(issues)
   315	    return True, f"{schema}.{table} passed for {len(required_symbols)} symbols"
   316	
   317	
   318	def _check_ohlc_integrity(
   319	    cur: Any,
   320	    *,
   321	    schema: str,
   322	    table: str,
   323	    required_symbols: tuple[str, ...],
   324	    max_violations: int,
   325	) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   326	    query = sql.SQL(
   327	        "SELECT "
   328	        "COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE high < GREATEST(open, close))::BIGINT AS high_violations, "
   329	        "COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE low > LEAST(open, close))::BIGINT AS low_violations "
   330	        "FROM {schema_name}.{table_name} "
   331	        "WHERE symbol = ANY(%s)"
   332	    ).format(
   333	        schema_name=sql.Identifier(schema),
   334	        table_name=sql.Identifier(table),
   335	    )
   336	    cur.execute(query, (list(required_symbols),))
   337	    high_violations, low_violations = cur.fetchone()
   338	    high_violations = int(high_violations or 0)
   339	    low_violations = int(low_violations or 0)
   340	    total = high_violations + low_violations
   341	
   342	    if total > max_violations:
   343	        return (
   344	            False,
   345	            f"{schema}.{table} ohlc violations={total} (high={high_violations}, low={low_violations}, "
   346	            f"max={max_violations})",
   347	        )
   348	    return True, f"{schema}.{table} ohlc violations={total}"
   349	
   350	
   351	def _discover_local_symbols(cur: Any, *, contract: TrainingGateContract) -> tuple[tuple[str, ...], str]:
   352	    if contract.required_symbols:
   353	        return contract.required_symbols, f"env override ({len(contract.required_symbols)} symbols)"
   354	
   355	    if not _table_exists(cur, schema="raw", table="databento_ohlcv_1h"):
   356	        return (), "raw.databento_ohlcv_1h missing"
   357	
   358	    cur.execute(
   359	        """
   360	        SELECT symbol

exec

    10	
    11	def _frame_with_target(values: list[object]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    12	    rows = len(values)
    13	    return pd.DataFrame(
    14	        {
    15	            "trade_date": pd.date_range("2020-01-01", periods=rows, freq="D"),
    16	            "close": [50.0 + (idx * 0.01) for idx in range(rows)],
    17	            "volume": [1000 + idx for idx in range(rows)],
    18	            "target_price_30d": values,
    19	        }
    20	    )
    21	
    22	
    23	class SplitTemporalContractTest(unittest.TestCase):
    24	    def test_decimal_object_target_is_coerced_to_numeric_before_fit(self) -> None:
    25	        frame = _frame_with_target([Decimal("70.25") + Decimal(idx) / Decimal("100") for idx in range(1200)])
    26	
    27	        train, validation, test, meta = _split_temporal(frame, label="target_price_30d", horizon=30)
    28	
    29	        self.assertEqual(meta["label"], "target_price_30d")
    30	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(train["target_price_30d"]))
    31	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(validation["target_price_30d"]))
    32	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(test["target_price_30d"]))
    33	
    34	    def test_non_numeric_target_fails_before_autogluon_fit(self) -> None:
    35	        frame = _frame_with_target(["not-a-price"] * 1200)
    36	
    37	        with self.assertRaisesRegex(TrainingContractError, "target_price_30d has no numeric values"):
    38	            _split_temporal(frame, label="target_price_30d", horizon=30)

   420	        message = str(exc)
   421	        if "relation" in message and (

   428	            ) from exc
   429	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unable to read local AG training source: {exc}") from exc

   432	        raise TrainingContractError("local training.matrix_1d is empty; run local AG load before training")
   433	    if target_rows.empty:
   434	        raise TrainingContractError("local training.matrix_targets_1d is empty; run local AG load before training")

   437	    matrix = pd.concat([matrix_rows[["trade_date"]], matrix_features], axis=1)

   448	
   449	
   450	def _coerce_training_frame(frame: pd.DataFrame, *, target_mode: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   451	    expected_labels = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=h) for h in HORIZONS]
   452	    labels = target_columns(frame.columns)
   453	    if labels != expected_labels:
   454	        missing = [label for label in expected_labels if label not in labels]
   455	        extra = [label for label in labels if label not in expected_labels]
   456	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unexpected target labels. missing={missing}, extra={extra}")
   457	
   458	    if target_mode not in {"price", "returns"}:
   459	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE={target_mode!r}")
   460	
   461	    if target_mode == "price":
   462	        for label in expected_labels:
   463	            usable = int(pd.to_numeric(frame[label], errors="coerce").notna().sum())
   464	            if usable == 0:
   465	                raise TrainingContractError(f"target label column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   466	        label_map = {horizon: TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon) for horizon in HORIZONS}
   467	        return frame, label_map
   468	
   469	    if "close" not in frame.columns:
   470	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires close column in training frame")
   471	    close = pd.to_numeric(frame["close"], errors="coerce")
   472	    if (close <= 0).all():
   473	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires positive close values")
   474	
   475	    label_map: dict[int, str] = {}
   476	    for horizon in HORIZONS:
   477	        price_label = TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon)
   478	        returns_label = f"target_return_{horizon}d"
   479	        frame[returns_label] = pd.to_numeric(frame[price_label], errors="coerce") / close - 1.0
   480	        label_map[horizon] = returns_label
   481	
   482	    for label in label_map.values():
   483	        usable = int(pd.to_numeric(frame[label], errors="coerce").notna().sum())
   484	        if usable == 0:
   485	            raise TrainingContractError(f"returns target column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   486	
   487	    return frame, label_map
   488	
   489	
   490	def _load_training_frame(*, target_mode: str, training_source: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   491	    if training_source == "parquet_artifacts":
   492	        frame, _ = _load_training_frame_from_artifacts(target_mode="price")
   493	        return _coerce_training_frame(frame, target_mode=target_mode)
   494	    if training_source == "local_postgres":
   495	        return _load_training_frame_from_local_postgres(target_mode=target_mode)
   496	    raise TrainingContractError(f"unsupported training source: {training_source!r}")
   497	
   498	
   499	def _split_temporal(
   500	    frame: pd.DataFrame,
   501	    *,
   502	    label: str,
   503	    horizon: int,
   504	) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, dict[str, object]]:
   505	    model_columns = ["trade_date", *feature_columns(frame.columns), label]
   506	    clean = frame[model_columns].copy()
   507	    clean[label] = pd.to_numeric(clean[label], errors="coerce")
   508	    if int(clean[label].notna().sum()) == 0:
   509	        raise TrainingContractError(f"{label} has no numeric values after coercion")
   510	    clean = clean.dropna(subset=[label])
   511	    numeric_cols = [column for column in model_columns if column not in {"trade_date", label}]
   512	    for column in numeric_cols:
   513	        clean[column] = pd.to_numeric(clean[column], errors="coerce")
   514	    clean = clean.dropna(axis=1, how="all")
   515	    clean = clean.dropna(subset=[column for column in clean.columns if column not in {"trade_date", label}], how="all")
   516	
   517	    n_rows = len(clean)
   518	    min_holdout = max(horizon * 2, 180)
   519	    test_rows = min(max(int(n_rows * 0.15), min_holdout), max(1, n_rows // 4))
   520	    val_rows = min(max(int(n_rows * 0.15), min_holdout), max(1, n_rows // 4))
   521	    embargo = horizon
   522	    train_end = n_rows - val_rows - test_rows - (embargo * 2)
   523	    val_start = train_end + embargo
   524	    val_end = val_start + val_rows
   525	    test_start = val_end + embargo
   526	
   527	    if train_end <= 500 or test_start >= n_rows:
   528	        raise TrainingContractError(
   529	            f"not enough rows for temporal split: rows={n_rows}, horizon={horizon}, train_end={train_end}, test_start={test_start}"
   530	        )
   531	
   532	    train = clean.iloc[:train_end].drop(columns=["trade_date"]).copy()
   533	    val = clean.iloc[val_start:val_end].drop(columns=["trade_date"])
   534	    test = clean.iloc[test_start:].drop(columns=["trade_date"])
   535	    for split_name, split_frame in (("train", train), ("validation", val), ("test", test)):
   536	        if not pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(split_frame[label]):
   537	            raise TrainingContractError(
   538	                f"{label} is not numeric in {split_name} split: dtype={split_frame[label].dtype}"
   539	            )
   540	        unsafe_features = [
   541	            column
   542	            for column in split_frame.columns
   543	            if column != label and not pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(split_frame[column])
   544	        ]
   545	        if unsafe_features:
   546	            preview = ", ".join(unsafe_features[:10])
   547	            raise TrainingContractError(
   548	                f"non-numeric feature columns in {split_name} split before AutoGluon fit: {preview}"
   549	            )
   550	
   551	    meta = {
   552	        "rows": n_rows,
   553	        "horizon_days": horizon,
   554	        "label": label,
   555	        "embargo_rows": embargo,
   556	        "train_rows": int(len(train)),
   557	        "validation_rows": int(len(val)),
   558	        "test_rows": int(len(test)),
   559	        "train_start": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[0]),
   560	        "train_end": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[train_end - 1]),
   561	        "validation_start": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[val_start]),
   562	        "validation_end": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[val_end - 1]),
   563	        "test_start": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[test_start]),
   564	        "test_end": str(clean["trade_date"].iloc[-1]),
   565	        "feature_count": int(len([column for column in train.columns if column != label])),
   566	    }
   567	    return train, val, test, meta
   568	
   569	
   570	def _train_one_horizon(
   571	    frame: pd.DataFrame,
   572	    *,
   573	    horizon: int,
   574	    label: str,
   575	    target_mode: str,
   576	    run_id: str,
   577	    presets: str,
   578	    time_limit: int,
   579	    num_cpus: int,
   580	    min_directional_accuracy: float,
   581	    model_selection_mode: str,
   582	    included_model_types: list[str],
   583	    excluded_model_types: list[str],
   584	    num_bag_folds: int,
   585	    num_stack_levels: int,
   586	) -> dict[str, object]:
   587	    from autogluon.tabular import TabularPredictor
   588	
   589	    train, val, test, split_meta = _split_temporal(frame, label=label, horizon=horizon)
   590	    output_dir = model_artifact_dir(run_id).joinpath(f"horizon_{horizon}d")
   591	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
   592	
   593	    predictor = TabularPredictor(
   594	        label=label,
   595	        problem_type="regression",
   596	        eval_metric="mae",
   597	        path=str(output_dir),
   598	        verbosity=2,
   599	        log_to_file=True,
   600	    )
   601	    fit_kwargs: dict[str, object] = {
   602	        "train_data": train,
   603	        "tuning_data": val,
   604	        "presets": presets,
   605	        "time_limit": time_limit,
   606	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   607	        "ag_args_fit": {"num_gpus": 0},
   608	    }
   609	    if included_model_types:
   610	        fit_kwargs["included_model_types"] = included_model_types
   611	    if excluded_model_types:
   612	        fit_kwargs["excluded_model_types"] = excluded_model_types
   613	    if num_bag_folds >= 2:
   614	        fit_kwargs["num_bag_folds"] = num_bag_folds
   615	        fit_kwargs["num_stack_levels"] = num_stack_levels
   616	        fit_kwargs["use_bag_holdout"] = True
   617	    predictor.fit(**fit_kwargs)
   618	
   619	    leaderboard = predictor.leaderboard(test, silent=True)
   620	    leaderboard_path = output_dir.joinpath("leaderboard.csv")
   621	    leaderboard.to_csv(leaderboard_path, index=False)
   622	
   623	    importance = predictor.feature_importance(data=test, num_shuffle_sets=5)
   624	    importance_path = output_dir.joinpath("feature_importance.csv")
   625	    importance.to_csv(importance_path)
   626	
   627	    predictions = predictor.predict(test.drop(columns=[label]))
   628	    mae = float((predictions - test[label]).abs().mean())
   629	    if target_mode == "returns":
   630	        naive_mae = float(test[label].abs().mean())
   631	    elif "close" in test.columns:
   632	        naive_mae = float((pd.to_numeric(test["close"], errors="coerce") - test[label]).abs().mean())
   633	    else:
   634	        naive_mae = float((test[label].shift(1).fillna(test[label].iloc[0]) - test[label]).abs().mean())
   635	
   636	    if target_mode == "returns":
   637	        predicted_direction = pd.Series(predictions).astype(float).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   638	        actual_direction = pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   639	    else:
   640	        if "close" in test.columns:
   641	            baseline = pd.to_numeric(test["close"], errors="coerce")
   642	        else:
   643	            baseline = pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").shift(1).fillna(pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").iloc[0])
   644	        predicted_direction = (pd.Series(predictions).astype(float) - baseline).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   645	        actual_direction = (pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce") - baseline).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   646	
   647	    direction_pairs = pd.DataFrame({"pred": predicted_direction, "actual": actual_direction}).dropna()
   648	    directional_accuracy = float((direction_pairs["pred"] == direction_pairs["actual"]).mean()) if not direction_pairs.empty else 0.0
   649	    passes_accuracy_threshold = directional_accuracy >= min_directional_accuracy
   650	
   651	    summary = {
   652	        "horizon_days": horizon,
   653	        "label": label,
   654	        "eval_metric": "mae",
   655	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   656	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   657	        "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   658	        "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   659	        "mae": mae,
   660	        "naive_mae": naive_mae,
   661	        "beats_naive": mae < naive_mae,
   662	        "directional_accuracy": directional_accuracy,
   663	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   664	        "passes_accuracy_threshold": passes_accuracy_threshold,
   665	        "model_path": str(output_dir),
   666	        "leaderboard_path": str(leaderboard_path),
   667	        "feature_importance_path": str(importance_path),
   668	        "split": split_meta,
   669	    }
   670	    output_dir.joinpath("summary.json").write_text(json.dumps(summary, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
   671	    return summary
   672	
   673	
   674	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False, approved: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   675	    readiness = run_training_readiness(dry_run=dry_run)
   676	    cfg = load_config()
   677	    target_mode = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE", "price").strip().lower() or "price"
   678	    min_directional_accuracy = _parse_float_env("AUTOGLUON_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY", LOCKED_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY)
   679	    labels = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon) for horizon in HORIZONS]
   680	    run_id = f"{cfg.model_version}-{datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}-{uuid4().hex[:8]}"
   681	    runtime_guard = _resolve_runtime_guard(dry_run=dry_run)
   682	    num_cpus = _resolve_num_cpus()
   683	    runtime_thread_guard = _apply_runtime_thread_guard(num_cpus=num_cpus)
   684	    openmp_runtime = _resolve_openmp_runtime()
   685	    allow_multiple_openmp = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_MULTIPLE_OPENMP", "0").strip() == "1"
   686	    strict_openmp_guard = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_STRICT_OPENMP_GUARD", "0").strip() == "1"
   687	    (
   688	        time_limit,
   689	        presets,
   690	        num_bag_folds,
   691	        num_stack_levels,
   692	        model_selection_mode,
   693	        included_model_types,
   694	        excluded_model_types,
   695	        available_full_zoo,
   696	        training_source,
   697	        contract_lock_enforced,
   698	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   699	    ) = _resolve_training_contract()
   700	    if num_stack_levels > 0 and num_bag_folds < 2:
   701	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS requires AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS >= 2")
   702	    if target_mode not in {"price", "returns"}:
   703	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE must be 'price' or 'returns'")
   704	    if min_directional_accuracy <= 0 or min_directional_accuracy > 1:
   705	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY must be in (0, 1]")
   706	    if (
   707	        not dry_run
   708	        and openmp_runtime.get("detected", False)
   709	        and int(openmp_runtime.get("openmp_library_count", 0)) > 1
   710	        and (
   711	            bool(runtime_guard.get("requires_safe_runtime", False))
   712	            or strict_openmp_guard
   713	        )
   714	        and not allow_multiple_openmp
   715	    ):
   716	        raise TrainingContractError(
   717	            "Multiple OpenMP runtimes detected in process. "
   718	            + f"libraries={openmp_runtime.get('openmp_libraries', [])}. "
   719	            + "This is a known crash risk for full-zoo runs. Align libraries to one OpenMP runtime "
   720	            + "or set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_MULTIPLE_OPENMP=1 for explicit risk override."
   721	        )
   722	
   723	    if dry_run:
   724	        frame_status: dict[str, object]
   725	        try:
   726	            frame, label_map = _load_training_frame(target_mode=target_mode, training_source=training_source)
   727	            frame_status = {
   728	                "rows": int(len(frame)),
   729	                "feature_columns": len(feature_columns(frame.columns)),
   730	                "target_columns": list(label_map.values()),
   731	                "trade_date_min": str(frame["trade_date"].min()),
   732	                "trade_date_max": str(frame["trade_date"].max()),
   733	            }
   734	        except Exception as exc:
   735	            frame_status = {"training_source_check": "blocked", "error": str(exc)}
   736	
   737	        return {
   738	            "phase": "train",
   739	            "dry_run": True,
   740	            "approved": approved,
   741	            "readiness": readiness,
   742	            "training_frame": frame_status,
   743	            "labels": labels,
   744	            "target_mode": target_mode,
   745	            "model_run_id_example": run_id,
   746	            "presets": presets,
   747	            "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   748	            "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   749	            "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,
   750	            "num_stack_levels": num_stack_levels,
   751	            "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   752	            "training_source": training_source,
   753	            "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   754	            "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   755	            "available_full_zoo_model_types": available_full_zoo,
   756	            "contract_lock_enforced": contract_lock_enforced,
   757	            "model_selection_lock_enforced": model_selection_lock_enforced,
   758	            "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   759	            "runtime_guard": runtime_guard,
   760	            "runtime_thread_guard": runtime_thread_guard,
   761	            "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   762	            "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   763	            "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,
   764	            "writes": [str(model_artifact_dir(run_id)), str(training_runs_path())],
   765	            "cloud_writes": [],
   766	            "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   767	            "status": "dry-run",
   768	        }
   769	
   770	    if not approved:
   771	        raise TrainingApprovalError(
   772	            "Training requires explicit approval. Use dry-run or pass approved=True."
   773	        )
   774	    if not readiness.get("ready", False):
   775	        blockers = readiness.get("blockers", [])
   776	        lines = "\n".join(f"- {item}" for item in blockers)
   777	        raise TrainingReadinessError(
   778	            "Training readiness gate failed. Resolve blockers before running train:\n" + lines
   779	        )
   780	    if time_limit <= 0:
   781	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS must be > 0")
   782	
   783	    frame, label_map = _load_training_frame(target_mode=target_mode, training_source=training_source)
   784	    run_dir = model_artifact_dir(run_id)
   785	    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
   786	    started_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
   787	
   788	    summaries = [
   789	        _train_one_horizon(
   790	            frame,
   791	            horizon=horizon,
   792	            label=label_map[horizon],
   793	            target_mode=target_mode,
   794	            run_id=run_id,
   795	            presets=presets,
   796	            time_limit=time_limit,
   797	            num_cpus=num_cpus,
   798	            min_directional_accuracy=min_directional_accuracy,
   799	            model_selection_mode=model_selection_mode,
   800	            included_model_types=included_model_types,
   801	            excluded_model_types=excluded_model_types,
   802	            num_bag_folds=num_bag_folds,
   803	            num_stack_levels=num_stack_levels,
   804	        )
   805	        for horizon in HORIZONS
   806	    ]
   807	    failed_accuracy = [item for item in summaries if not item.get("passes_accuracy_threshold", False)]
   808	    accuracy_gate_passed = len(failed_accuracy) == 0
   809	    run_status = "ok" if accuracy_gate_passed else "accuracy-blocked"
   810	
   811	    run_record = {
   812	        "run_id": run_id,
   813	        "model_version": cfg.model_version,
   814	        "started_at": started_at,
   815	        "finished_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
   816	        "git_sha": _git_sha(),
   817	        "matrix_path": str(matrix_path()) if training_source == "parquet_artifacts" else "local_postgres.training.matrix_1d",
   818	        "signals_path": "not_used_single_matrix_contract",
   819	        "model_artifact_dir": str(run_dir),
   820	        "presets": presets,
   821	        "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   822	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   823	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   824	        "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,
   825	        "num_stack_levels": num_stack_levels,
   826	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   827	        "training_source": training_source,
   828	        "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   829	        "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   830	        "contract_lock_enforced": contract_lock_enforced,
   831	        "model_selection_lock_enforced": model_selection_lock_enforced,
   832	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   833	        "accuracy_gate_passed": accuracy_gate_passed,
   834	        "failed_accuracy_horizons": [item["horizon_days"] for item in failed_accuracy],
   835	        "runtime_guard": runtime_guard,
   836	        "runtime_thread_guard": runtime_thread_guard,
   837	        "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   838	        "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   839	        "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,
   840	        "status": run_status,
   841	        "horizons": summaries,
   842	        "pip_freeze": _pip_freeze(),
   843	        "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   844	    }
   845	    run_dir.joinpath("training_run.json").write_text(json.dumps(run_record, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
   846	
   847	    run_history_row = {
   848	        "run_id": run_id,
   849	        "model_version": cfg.model_version,
   850	        "started_at": run_record["started_at"],
   851	        "finished_at": run_record["finished_at"],
   852	        "git_sha": run_record["git_sha"],
   853	        "matrix_path": run_record["matrix_path"],
   854	        "signals_path": run_record["signals_path"],
   855	        "model_artifact_dir": run_record["model_artifact_dir"],
   856	        "presets": presets,
   857	        "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   858	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   859	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   860	        "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,

exec

   903	        "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   904	        "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   905	        "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba python/fusion/promote_to_cloud.py | sed -n '1,260p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import argparse
     4	import json
     5	from datetime import datetime, timezone
     6	from typing import Any
     7	
     8	import pandas as pd
     9	import psycopg2
    10	from psycopg2 import sql as pgsql
    11	from psycopg2.extras import execute_values
    12	
    13	from .artifacts import (
    14	    assert_no_target_columns,
    15	    feature_columns,
    16	    matrix_path,
    17	    read_parquet,
    18	    signals_path,
    19	    specialist_features_path,
    20	    target_columns,
    21	)
    22	from .config import SPECIALISTS, resolve_cloud_db_url
    23	
    24	
    25	class PromotionApprovalError(RuntimeError):
    26	    pass
    27	
    28	
    29	def _json_from_row(row: pd.Series, *, exclude: set[str]) -> str:
    30	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
    31	    for key, value in row.items():
    32	        if key in exclude:
    33	            continue
    34	        if pd.isna(value):
    35	            continue
    36	        if isinstance(value, (pd.Timestamp, datetime)):
    37	            payload[key] = value.isoformat()
    38	        elif hasattr(value, "item"):
    39	            payload[key] = value.item()
    40	        else:
    41	            payload[key] = value
    42	    return json.dumps(payload, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True)
    43	
    44	
    45	def _validate_matrix() -> pd.DataFrame:
    46	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
    47	    labels = target_columns(matrix.columns)
    48	    if not labels:
    49	        raise RuntimeError("matrix artifact has no target label columns")
    50	    features = feature_columns(matrix.columns)
    51	    if not features:
    52	        raise RuntimeError("matrix artifact has no feature columns")
    53	    for label in labels:
    54	        series = pd.to_numeric(matrix[label], errors="coerce")
    55	        null_count = int(series.isna().sum())
    56	        try:
    57	            horizon = int(label.replace("target_price_", "").replace("d", ""))
    58	        except ValueError:
    59	            horizon = 0
    60	        if null_count > horizon:
    61	            raise RuntimeError(f"{label} NULL rows={null_count} (>horizon={horizon})")
    62	        if null_count > 0:
    63	            null_positions = series[series.isna()].index.to_list()
    64	            trailing = list(range(len(series) - null_count, len(series)))
    65	            if null_positions != trailing:
    66	                raise RuntimeError(f"{label} NULL rows are not trailing-only")
    67	    return matrix
    68	
    69	
    70	def _validate_specialist(specialist: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    71	    frame = read_parquet(specialist_features_path(specialist))
    72	    if frame.empty:
    73	        raise RuntimeError(f"specialist artifact is empty: {specialist}")
    74	    assert_no_target_columns(frame, context=f"{specialist} promotion artifact")
    75	    return frame
    76	
    77	
    78	def _validate_signals() -> pd.DataFrame:
    79	    signals = read_parquet(signals_path())
    80	    if signals.empty:
    81	        raise RuntimeError("specialist signals artifact is empty")
    82	    assert_no_target_columns(signals, context="signals promotion artifact")
    83	    expected = len(SPECIALISTS) * 3
    84	    actual = len([column for column in signals.columns if column != "trade_date"])
    85	    if actual != expected:
    86	        raise RuntimeError(f"specialist signals column count={actual}, expected={expected}")
    87	    return signals
    88	
    89	
    90	def _promote_matrix(cur: Any, matrix: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
    91	    excluded = {"trade_date", *target_columns(matrix.columns)}
    92	    rows = [
    93	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude=excluded))
    94	        for _, row in matrix.iterrows()
    95	    ]
    96	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.matrix_1d")
    97	    execute_values(
    98	        cur,
    99	        """
   100	        INSERT INTO training.matrix_1d (trade_date, feature_snapshot, created_at, ingested_at)
   101	        VALUES %s
   102	        """,
   103	        rows,
   104	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   105	        page_size=1000,
   106	    )
   107	    return len(rows)
   108	
   109	
   110	def _promote_specialist(cur: Any, specialist: str, frame: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   111	    rows = [
   112	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"}))
   113	        for _, row in frame.iterrows()
   114	    ]
   115	    table_id = pgsql.Identifier("training", f"specialist_features_{specialist}")
   116	    cur.execute(pgsql.SQL("TRUNCATE TABLE {}").format(table_id))
   117	    execute_values(
   118	        cur,
   119	        pgsql.SQL(
   120	            "INSERT INTO {} (trade_date, feature_payload, created_at, ingested_at) VALUES %s"
   121	        ).format(table_id),
   122	        rows,
   123	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   124	        page_size=1000,
   125	    )
   126	    return len(rows)
   127	
   128	
   129	def _promote_signals(cur: Any, signals: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   130	    rows = [
   131	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"}))
   132	        for _, row in signals.iterrows()
   133	    ]
   134	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.specialist_signals_1d")
   135	    execute_values(
   136	        cur,
   137	        """
   138	        INSERT INTO training.specialist_signals_1d (trade_date, signal_payload, created_at, ingested_at)
   139	        VALUES %s
   140	        """,
   141	        rows,
   142	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   143	        page_size=1000,
   144	    )
   145	    return len(rows)
   146	
   147	
   148	def run(*, dry_run: bool = True, approved: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   149	    matrix = _validate_matrix()
   150	    specialists = {specialist: _validate_specialist(specialist) for specialist in SPECIALISTS}
   151	    signals = _validate_signals()
   152	
   153	    payload: dict[str, object] = {
   154	        "phase": "promote",
   155	        "dry_run": dry_run,
   156	        "approved": approved,
   157	        "reads": [
   158	            str(matrix_path()),
   159	            str(signals_path()),
   160	            *[str(specialist_features_path(specialist)) for specialist in SPECIALISTS],
   161	        ],
   162	        "writes": ["training.matrix_1d", "training.specialist_signals_1d", *[f"training.specialist_features_{s}" for s in SPECIALISTS]],
   163	        "target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload": target_columns(matrix.columns),
   164	        "matrix_rows": int(len(matrix)),
   165	        "signal_rows": int(len(signals)),
   166	        "specialist_rows": {specialist: int(len(frame)) for specialist, frame in specialists.items()},
   167	        "status": "dry-run" if dry_run else "pending",
   168	    }
   169	
   170	    if dry_run:
   171	        return payload
   172	    if not approved:
   173	        raise PromotionApprovalError("Cloud promotion requires explicit approval. Pass approved=True or --execute.")
   174	
   175	    db_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   176	    if not db_url:
   177	        raise RuntimeError(
   178	            "Cloud DB URL is not set. Configure DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_DB_URL, POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING, or SUPABASE_POOLER_URL."
   179	        )
   180	
   181	    with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_promote_to_cloud") as conn:
   182	        with conn.cursor() as cur:
   183	            promoted = {
   184	                "training.matrix_1d": _promote_matrix(cur, matrix),
   185	                "training.specialist_signals_1d": _promote_signals(cur, signals),
   186	            }
   187	            for specialist, frame in specialists.items():
   188	                promoted[f"training.specialist_features_{specialist}"] = _promote_specialist(cur, specialist, frame)
   189	
   190	    payload["status"] = "ok"
   191	    payload["promoted_rows"] = promoted
   192	    payload["promoted_at"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
   193	    return payload
   194	
   195	
   196	def main() -> None:
   197	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Validate and promote local V16 training artifacts to cloud Supabase")
   198	    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true", default=True, help="Validate local artifacts without cloud writes")
   199	    parser.add_argument("--execute", action="store_true", help="Perform approved cloud promotion")
   200	    args = parser.parse_args()
   201	
   202	    result = run(dry_run=not args.execute, approved=args.execute)
   203	    print(result)
   204	
   205	
   206	if __name__ == "__main__":
   207	    main()

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	from decimal import Decimal
     4	from typing import Any
     5	
     6	import pandas as pd
     7	import psycopg2
     8	
     9	from .artifacts import feature_columns, matrix_path, target_columns, write_parquet
    10	from .config import HORIZONS, TARGET_TEMPLATE, resolve_cloud_db_url
    11	
    12	
    13	_MATRIX_SQL = """
    14	WITH
    15	zl AS (
    16	  SELECT
    17	    bucket_ts::date AS trade_date,
    18	    open::numeric AS open,
    19	    high::numeric AS high,
    20	    low::numeric AS low,
    21	    close::numeric AS close,
    22	    volume::numeric AS volume
    23	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    24	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL'
    25	),
    26	zs AS (
    27	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    28	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    29	  WHERE symbol = 'ZS'
    30	),
    31	zm AS (
    32	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    33	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    34	  WHERE symbol = 'ZM'
    35	),
    36	cl AS (
    37	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    38	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    39	  WHERE symbol = 'CL'
    40	),
    41	joined AS (
    42	  SELECT
    43	    z.trade_date,
    44	    z.open,
    45	    z.high,
    46	    z.low,
    47	    z.close,
    48	    z.volume,
    49	    zs.close AS zs_close,
    50	    zm.close AS zm_close,
    51	    cl.close AS cl_close
    52	  FROM zl z
    53	  LEFT JOIN zs USING (trade_date)
    54	  LEFT JOIN zm USING (trade_date)
    55	  LEFT JOIN cl USING (trade_date)
    56	),
    57	features AS (
    58	  SELECT
    59	    trade_date,
    60	    open,
    61	    high,
    62	    low,
    63	    close,
    64	    volume,
    65	    zs_close,
    66	    zm_close,
    67	    cl_close,
    68	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 1) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_1d,
    69	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 5) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_5d,
    70	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 10) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_10d,
    71	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 20) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_20d,
    72	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 30) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_30d,
    73	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 60) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_60d,
    74	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 90) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_90d,
    75	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 180) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_180d,
    76	    (volume / NULLIF(LAG(volume, 1) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS vol_chg_1d,
    77	    (volume / NULLIF(LAG(volume, 5) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS vol_chg_5d,
    78	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_50,
    79	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 99 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_100,
    80	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_200,
    81	    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS std_20,
    82	    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS std_60,
    83	    close - AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mean_revert_20,
    84	    close - AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mean_revert_50,
    85	    close - COALESCE(zs_close, close) AS spread_zl_zs,
    86	    close - COALESCE(zm_close, close) AS spread_zl_zm,
    87	    close - COALESCE(cl_close, close) AS spread_zl_cl,
    88	    close / NULLIF(zs_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_zs,
    89	    close / NULLIF(zm_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_zm,
    90	    close / NULLIF(cl_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_cl,
    91	    CASE
    92	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
    93	      ELSE (0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0)
    94	    END AS crush_margin_board,
    95	    CASE
    96	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
    97	      ELSE (
    98	        (
    99	          (0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0)
   100	        ) - LAG((0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0), 20) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date)
   101	      )
   102	    END AS crush_margin_chg_20d,
   103	    CASE
   104	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
   105	      ELSE ((11.0 * (close / 100.0)) / NULLIF((0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)), 0)) * 100.0
   106	    END AS crush_oil_share_pct,
   107	    LEAD(close, 30) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_30d,
   108	    LEAD(close, 90) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_90d,
   109	    LEAD(close, 180) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_180d
   110	  FROM joined
   111	)
   112	SELECT *
   113	FROM features
   114	WHERE ret_1d IS NOT NULL
   115	  AND ret_5d IS NOT NULL
   116	  AND ret_10d IS NOT NULL
   117	  AND ret_20d IS NOT NULL
   118	  AND ret_30d IS NOT NULL
   119	  AND ret_60d IS NOT NULL
   120	  AND ret_90d IS NOT NULL
   121	  AND ret_180d IS NOT NULL
   122	  AND ma_50 IS NOT NULL
   123	  AND ma_100 IS NOT NULL
   124	  AND ma_200 IS NOT NULL
   125	  AND std_20 IS NOT NULL
   126	  AND std_60 IS NOT NULL
   127	ORDER BY trade_date;
   128	"""
   129	
   130	
   131	def _to_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
   132	    if value is None:
   133	        return None
   134	    if isinstance(value, Decimal):
   135	        return float(value)
   136	    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   137	        return float(value)
   138	    return float(value)
   139	
   140	
   141	def _normalize_matrix(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
   142	    if df.empty:
   143	        raise RuntimeError("matrix build returned 0 rows")
   144	
   145	    df = df.copy()
   146	    df["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["trade_date"]).dt.date
   147	
   148	    for column in df.columns:
   149	        if column == "trade_date":
   150	            continue
   151	        df[column] = df[column].map(_to_float).astype("float64")
   152	
   153	    expected_targets = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=h) for h in HORIZONS]
   154	    missing_targets = [column for column in expected_targets if column not in df.columns]
   155	    if missing_targets:
   156	        raise RuntimeError(f"matrix is missing target columns: {', '.join(missing_targets)}")
   157	
   158	    feature_cols = feature_columns(df.columns)
   159	    label_cols = target_columns(df.columns)
   160	    if not feature_cols:
   161	        raise RuntimeError("matrix has no non-target feature columns")
   162	    return df[["trade_date", *feature_cols, *label_cols]]
   163	
   164	
   165	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   166	    output_path = matrix_path()
   167	    if dry_run:
   168	        return {
   169	            "phase": "matrix",
   170	            "dry_run": True,
   171	            "reads": ["mkt.price_1d"],
   172	            "writes": [str(output_path)],
   173	            "cloud_writes": [],
   174	            "status": "dry-run",
   175	        }
   176	
   177	    db_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   178	    if not db_url:
   179	        raise RuntimeError(
   180	            "Cloud DB URL is not set. Configure DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_DB_URL, POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING, or SUPABASE_POOLER_URL."
   181	        )
   182	
   183	    with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_build_matrix") as conn:
   184	        df = pd.read_sql_query(_MATRIX_SQL, conn)
   185	
   186	    matrix = _normalize_matrix(df)
   187	    write_parquet(matrix, output_path)
   188	
   189	    return {
   190	        "phase": "matrix",
   191	        "dry_run": False,
   192	        "reads": ["mkt.price_1d"],
   193	        "writes": [str(output_path)],
   194	        "cloud_writes": [],
   195	        "status": "ok",
   196	        "rows_written": int(len(matrix)),
   197	        "feature_columns": len(feature_columns(matrix.columns)),
   198	        "target_columns": target_columns(matrix.columns),
   199	        "target_non_null_counts": {
   200	            column: int(matrix[column].notna().sum()) for column in target_columns(matrix.columns)
   201	        },
   202	        "target_null_counts": {
   203	            column: int(matrix[column].isna().sum()) for column in target_columns(matrix.columns)
   204	        },
   205	        "trade_date_min": str(matrix["trade_date"].min()),
   206	        "trade_date_max": str(matrix["trade_date"].max()),
   207	    }

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""ZINC Fusion V16 Quality Playbook wrapper.
     3	
     4	This wrapper keeps the upstream Quality Playbook checkout as the source of
     5	truth, verifies the repo-local installed bundles, and avoids the quarantined
     6	Codex.app binary path by resolving `codex` from PATH.
     7	"""
     8	
     9	from __future__ import annotations
    10	
    11	import argparse
    12	import json
    13	import os
    14	import signal
    15	import shutil
    16	import subprocess
    17	import sys
    18	import tempfile
    19	from pathlib import Path
    20	from typing import Any
    21	
    22	
    23	ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
    24	CONFIG_PATHS = (
    25	    ROOT / "docs" / "runbooks" / "qplaybook_config.json",
    26	    ROOT / "quality" / "qplaybook_config.json",
    27	)
    28	BLOCKED_CODEX_PATH = Path("/Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources/codex")
    29	
    30	REQUIRED_BUNDLE_PATHS = (
    31	    "SKILL.md",
    32	    "quality_gate.py",
    33	    "references/constitution.md",
    34	    "references/phase1_exploration_guide.md",
    35	    "references/phase2_generation_guide.md",
    36	    "references/phase6_verify_guide.md",
    37	    "references/role_map_queries.md",

    43	    "bin/reference_docs_ingest.py",
